name: Single Leg Hip Thrust
instructions: 1) Grab a bench or step and lay down on your back (face up). Have your torso flat on the bench with your arms by your sides. One of your feet should be planted on the floor with your knees bent at an acute angle (less than 90 degrees), the other should be extended towards the ceiling as vertical as possible. This is your starting position.

2) To initiate the movement, exhale and drive through your heel to lift your hips toward the ceiling by squeezing your glutes. As you do so, lean back onto your shoulders and keep driving upward until your glutes are fully contracted.

3) After a brief pause, inhale and gently relax your glutes to drop your pelvis towards the floor (the resistance should be placed through your heel). Continue to drop your pelvis until your glutes touch the floor.
4) Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.

en: 1) Grab a bench or step and lay down on your back (face up). Have your torso flat on the bench with your arms by your sides. One of your feet should be planted on the floor with your knees bent at an acute angle (less than 90 degrees), the other should be extended towards the ceiling as vertical as possible. This is your starting position.

2) To initiate the movement, exhale and drive through your heel to lift your hips toward the ceiling by squeezing your glutes. As you do so, lean back onto your shoulders and keep driving upward until your glutes are fully contracted.

3) After a brief pause, inhale and gently relax your glutes to drop your pelvis towards the floor (the resistance should be placed through your heel). Continue to drop your pelvis until your glutes touch the floor.
4) Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.
es: 1) Coge un banco o escalón y acuéstate boca arriba. Mantén el torso apoyado en el banco con los brazos a los lados. Uno de tus pies debe estar plantado en el suelo con las rodillas dobladas en un ángulo agudo (menos de 90 grados), el otro debe estar extendido hacia el techo lo más vertical posible. Esta es tu posición inicial.

2) Para iniciar el movimiento, exhala y conduce con el talón para levantar las caderas hacia el techo apretando los glúteos. Mientras lo haces, inclínate hacia atrás sobre los hombros y sigue subiendo hasta que los glúteos estén completamente contraídos.

3) Después de una breve pausa, inhala y relaja tuavemente los glúteos para dejar caer la pelvis hacia el suelo (la resistencia debe colocarse a través del talón). Continúa bajando la pelvis hasta que los glúteos toquen el suelo.
4) Repite el número recomendado de repeticiones y cambia de lado.

name: Lateral Squat to Cross Body Row
instructions: 1) Grab a resistance band.
2) Have a wide leg stance.
3) Place one end of the band under one foot.
4) With the other hand grab the other end of the band.
5) Transfer weight over towards the foot with the band under and reach the arm towards the foot then come back up to standing and pull the band into a high row position with elbow leading the move.
6) Repeat as many repetitions as prescribed.

name.en: Lateral Squat to Cross Body Row

en: 1) Grab a resistance band.
2) Have a wide leg stance.
3) Place one end of the band under one foot.
4) With the other hand grab the other end of the band.
5) Transfer weight over towards the foot with the band under and reach the arm towards the foot then come back up to standing and pull the band into a high row position with elbow leading the move.
6) Repeat as many repetitions as prescribed.
es: 1) Coge una banda de resistencia.
2) Tener una postura de piernas amplias.
3) Coloca un extremo de la banda debajo de un pie.
4) Con la otra mano agarre el otro extremo de la banda.

5) Transfiera el peso hacia el pie con la banda debajo y lleve el brazo hacia el pie, luego vuelva a ponerse de pie y neumático de la banda a una posición de remo alto con el codo liderando el movimiento.
6) Repite tantas repeticiones como le hayan prescrito.

name: Banded Squats
instructions: 1) Place a small band around the thighs just above the knee.
2) Adopt a shoulder width stance with your toes slightly pointing outward. Maintain a straight back throughout the movement and keep your head up.

3) Inhale and begin to descend by bending at your knees and hips. Your weight should be put predominantly through your heels as you sit back into the movement until your thighs are either parallel or just past to the floor.

4) After a brief pause, exhale and return to the starting position along the same path, push through your heels with the force being driven through your quads to do so. Stand to attention with your legs fully extended, back straight and shoulders relaxed.
5) Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

en: 1) Place a small band around the thighs just above the knee.
2) Adopt a shoulder width stance with your toes slightly pointing outward. Maintain a straight back throughout the movement and keep your head up.

3) Inhale and begin to descend by bending at your knees and hips. Your weight should be put predominantly through your heels as you sit back into the movement until your thighs are either parallel or just past to the floor.

4) After a brief pause, exhale and return to the starting position along the same path, push through your heels with the force being driven through your quads to do so. Stand to attention with your legs fully extended, back straight and shoulders relaxed.
5) Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
es: 1) Coloca una pequeña banda alrededor de los muslos, justo por encima de la rodilla.
2) Adopta una postura a la anchura de los hombros con las puntas de los pies ligeramente apuntando hacia afuera. Mantén la espalda recta durante todo el movimiento y mantén la cabeza erguida.

3) Inhala y empieza a descender doblando las rodillas y las caderas. Su peso debe colocarse predominantemente a través de los talones mientras se lleva la cadera atrás en el movimiento hasta que tus muslos estén paralelos o apenas pasados ​​​​del suelo.

4) Después de una breve pausa, exhala y regresa a la posición inicial siguiendo el mismo camino, empujando los talones con la fuerza impulsada a través de los cuádriceps para hacerlo. Colócate de pie firme con las piernas completamente extendidas, la espalda recta y los hombros relajados.
5) Repite el número recomendado de repeticiones.

name: Banded Squat Jump
instructions: 1) Grab a small band and place it round the thighs just above the knee.

2) Adopt a standing, shoulder width stance with your toes pointing slightly outward. Allow your arms to hang comfortably by your sides at this point. Throughout the movement you should keep your head up and maintain a straight back. This will be your starting position.

3) Inhale and descend slowly by bending your knees until your thighs are parallel with the floor. Keep a straight back so that your posture is not compromised. Bring your arms out in front of you so that they are also parallel to the floor at this point. Tip: When at the bottom of the movement your knees should be behind your toes.

4) Once you have hit the bottom of the movement, exhale and push hard through your heels to drive your hips forward. As you extend at your knee and ankle joints in order to jump as high as you can, pull your arms down towards the sides of your torso at the top of the jump (this will help to generate more height), before landing into your next rep.
5) Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

en: 1) Grab a small band and place it round the thighs just above the knee.

2) Adopt a standing, shoulder width stance with your toes pointing slightly outward. Allow your arms to hang comfortably by your sides at this point. Throughout the movement you should keep your head up and maintain a straight back. This will be your starting position.

3) Inhale and descend slowly by bending your knees until your thighs are parallel with the floor. Keep a straight back so that your posture is not compromised. Bring your arms out in front of you so that they are also parallel to the floor at this point. Tip: When at the bottom of the movement your knees should be behind your toes.

4) Once you have hit the bottom of the movement, exhale and push hard through your heels to drive your hips forward. As you extend at your knee and ankle joints in order to jump as high as you can, pull your arms down towards the sides of your torso at the top of the jump (this will help to generate more height), before landing into your next rep.
5) Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
es: 1) Coge una pequeña banda y colócala alrededor de los muslos, justo por encima de la rodilla.

2) Adopta una postura de pie, a la anchura de los hombros, con las puntas de los pies apuntando ligeramente hacia afuera. En este punto, deja que tus brazos cuelguen cómodamente a los costados. Durante todo el movimiento debes mantener la cabeza erguida y mantener la espalda recta. Esta es tu posición inicial.

3) Inhala y desciende lentamente doblando las rodillas hasta que tus muslos queden paralelos al suelo. Mantén la espalda recta para que su postura no se vea comprometida. Extiende los brazos frente a ti para que también queden paralelos al suelo en este punto. Consejo: cuando estés en la parte inferior del movimiento, tus rodillas deben estar detrás de las puntas de los pies.

4) Una vez que hayas llegado al final del movimiento, exhala y empuja con fuerza los talones para impulsar las caderas hacia adelante. Mientras extiendes las articulaciones de la rodilla y el tobillo para saltar lo más alto que puedas, baja los brazos hacia los lados del torso en la parte superior del salto (esto ayudará a generar más altura), antes de aterrizar en tu siguiente repetición.
5) Repite el número recomendado de repeticiones.

name: Banded Reverse Lunge
instructions: 1) Grab a small band and place it round the thighs just above the knees whilst in a standing position. This will be your starting position.
2) Take a step backwards (slightly larger than a normal step) and as you land, drop your body down so that you create two right angles at your knees. Whilst maintaining a straight torso.
3) Make sure that you keep your front knee over your heel and not over your toes. Your front shin should now be perpendicular to the floor.
4) As you exhale, use mainly the heel of your front foot and push off the floor towards the starting position again.
5) Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and then change sides.

en: 1) Grab a small band and place it round the thighs just above the knees whilst in a standing position. This will be your starting position.
2) Take a step backwards (slightly larger than a normal step) and as you land, drop your body down so that you create two right angles at your knees. Whilst maintaining a straight torso.
3) Make sure that you keep your front knee over your heel and not over your toes. Your front shin should now be perpendicular to the floor.
4) As you exhale, use mainly the heel of your front foot and push off the floor towards the starting position again.
5) Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and then change sides.
es: 1) Coge una banda pequeña y colóquela alrededor de los muslos, justo por encima de las rodillas, mientras está de pie. Esta es tu posición inicial.
2) Da un paso hacia atrás (un poco más grande que un paso normal) y, cuando aterrices, deja caer el cuerpo para crear dos ángulos rectos en las rodillas. Manteniendo el torso recto.
3) Asegúrate de mantener la rodilla delantera sobre el talón y no sobre las puntas de los pies. Tu espinilla delantera ahora debería estar perpendicular al suelo.
4) Mientras exhalass, utiliza principalmente el talón de tu pie delantero y empuja nuevamente desde el suelo hacia la posición inicial.
5) Repite el número recomendado de repeticiones y luego cambia de lado.

name: Banded Lateral Step Out Squat
instructions: 1) Grab a small band and place it round the thighs just above the knees.

2) Starting with feet hip distance apart brace the abs and step out laterally dropping into a squat position by bending the knees and hinging at the hips. Keep the chest lifted and sit back into the heels whilst pushing your knees into the band.
3) Step back to the starting position by pushing out of the ground and then repeat on the other side.
4) Repeat for prescribed repetitions.

name.es: Sentadilla con paso lateral con banda

en: 1) Grab a small band and place it round the thighs just above the knees.

2) Starting with feet hip distance apart brace the abs and step out laterally dropping into a squat position by bending the knees and hinging at the hips. Keep the chest lifted and sit back into the heels whilst pushing your knees into the band.
3) Step back to the starting position by pushing out of the ground and then repeat on the other side.
4) Repeat for prescribed repetitions.
es: 1) Coge una banda pequeña y colócala alrededor de los muslos, justo por encima de las rodillas.

2) Comenzando con los pies separados a la anchura de las caderas, contraiga los abdominales y dé un paso lateral cayendo hasta quedar de sentadilla doblando las rodillas y doblando las caderas. Mantén el pecho elevado y lleva el peso hacia los talones mientras empuja las rodillas hacia la banda.
3) Vuelva a la posición inicial empujándose desde el suelo y luego repite en el otro lado.
4) Repite para las repeticiones prescritas.

name: Banded Kickbacks
instructions: 1) Grab a small band and place it round the ankles.
2) Take a small step back.
3) Raise the leg squeezing the glutes as you lift and slightly lean forwards.
4) Keep abs engaged and chest lifted throughout.
5) Return the leg back to the start position and then repeat for the prescribed repetitions.
6) Do the same on the other leg.

es: 1) Coge una pequeña banda y colócala alrededor de los tobillos.
2) Da un pequeño paso atrás.
3) Eleva la pierna apretando los glúteos mientras levantas e inclínate ligeramente hacia delante.
4) Mantén los abdominales contraídos y el pecho elevado en todo momento.
5) Vuelve la pierna a la posición inicial y luego repite las repeticiones prescritas.
6) Haz lo mismo con la otra pierna.

name: Banded Fire Hydrant
instructions: 1) Grab a small band and place it round the thighs just above the knees.
2) Adopt an all fours position on the floor with hands directly under the shoulders and knees directly under the hips.
3) Brace abs and keep hips as stable as possible whilst keeping the leg bent and lifting it up out to the side, squeezing the glutes and leading with the knee.
4) Return to the starting position and then repeat for prescribed repetitions, then do the same on the other leg.

2) Adopta una posición a cuatro patas en el suelo con las manos directamente debajo de los hombros y las rodillas directamente debajo de las caderas.
3) Contraer los abdominales y mantener la cadera lo más estable posible manteniendo la pierna doblada y levantándola hacia un lado, apretando los glúteos y liderando con la rodilla.
4) Vuelve a la posición inicial y luego repite las repeticiones prescritas, luego haz lo mismo con la otra pierna.

name: Banded Face Pull
instructions: 1) Grab a band and tie one end around something stable at around shoulder height.
2) Take hold of the other end of the band with both hands and step slightly back so there is some tension in the band.
3) With palms facing down, leading with the elbows move the band towards your face keeping the elbows high. Squeeze the shoulder blades together.
4) Return back to the start position and repeat for the prescribed repetitions.

es: 1) Coge una banda y ata un extremo alrededor de algo estable a la anchura de los hombros.
2) Sujeta el otro extremo de la banda con ambas manos y retrocede ligeramente para que haya algo de tensión en la banda.
3) Con las palmas hacia abajo, liderando con los codos, mueva la banda hacia tu cara manteniendo los codos en alto. Apriete los omódiscos juntos.
4) Vuelve a la posición inicial y repite las repeticiones prescritas.

name: Banded Donkey Kicks
instructions: 1) Grab a small band and place one side round one ankle and the other side round the sole of the other foot.
2) Adopt an all fours position on the floor with hands directly under the shoulders and knees under the hips.
3) Brace abs and keep hips as stable as possible.
4) With the leg that has the band around the sole of the foot, flex the foot and push the heel towards the ceiling until you get full glute contraction without moving the hips.
5) Come back down until the knee is nearly back on the floor and repeat for the prescribed repetitions.
6) Complete on the other leg.

es: 1) Coge una banda pequeña y coloca un lado alrededor de un tobillo y el otro lado alrededor de la planta del otro pie.
2) Adopta una posición a cuatro patas en el suelo con las manos directamente debajo de los hombros y las rodillas debajo de las caderas.
3) Contraiga los abdominales y mantén las caderas lo más estables posible.
4) Con la pierna que tiene la banda alrededor de la planta del pie, flexiona el pie y empuja el talón hacia el techo hasta conseguir la contracción completa del glúteo sin mover la cadera.
5) Vuelva a bajar hasta que la rodilla esté casi en el suelo y repite las repeticiones prescritas.
6) Completar con la otra pierna.

name: Banded Crab Walks
instructions: 1) Grab a small band and place it around both ankles, hip distance apart.
2) Squat down bending the knees and hinging at the hips.
3) Sit into your heels and keep chest lifted and abs braced throughout.
4) Move laterally by pushing against the band and taking small steps.
5) With the other leg resist the band as you step in.
6) Maintain the position and squeeze glutes throughout.
7) Repeat for the prescribed repetitions on one leg and then complete on the other side.

en: 1) Grab a small band and place it around both ankles, hip distance apart.
2) Squat down bending the knees and hinging at the hips.
3) Sit into your heels and keep chest lifted and abs braced throughout.
4) Move laterally by pushing against the band and taking small steps.
5) With the other leg resist the band as you step in.
6) Maintain the position and squeeze glutes throughout.
7) Repeat for the prescribed repetitions on one leg and then complete on the other side.
es: 1) Coge una banda pequeña y colóquela alrededor de ambos tobillos, separadas a la anchura de las caderas.
2) Agáchese doblando las rodillas y doblando las caderas.
3) Siéntate sobre tus talones y mantén el pecho elevado y los abdominales firmes en todo momento.
4) Muévete lateralmente empujando contra la banda y dando pequeños pasos.
5) Con la otra pierna resiste la banda mientras entras.
6) Mantén la posición y apriete los glúteos en todo momento.
7) Repite las repeticiones prescritas en una pierna y luego complete en el otro lado.

name: Banded Barbell Hip Thrust
instructions: 1) Grab a small band and place it around the thighs just above the knees.
2) Set up a bench or a step and barbell.
3) Take a seat on the floor with your legs underneath the bar, your back should be supported by a bench or an elevated step with your shoulder blades being the point of contact.
4) Roll the bar up and over your legs until it is directly above your hips, bend at your knees and walk your feet in towards your glutes.

5) Whilst exhaling, push your knees into the band, squeeze your glutes and drive your heels to lift your hips towards the ceiling. As you do so, keep your chin on your chest keep driving upward until your glutes are fully contracted and your body is parallel with the floor.
6) Inhale and gently relax your glutes to return the barbell back along the same path to the starting position.
7) Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

name.es: Hip thrust con barra y banda

en: 1) Grab a small band and place it around the thighs just above the knees.
2) Set up a bench or a step and barbell.
3) Take a seat on the floor with your legs underneath the bar, your back should be supported by a bench or an elevated step with your shoulder blades being the point of contact.
4) Roll the bar up and over your legs until it is directly above your hips, bend at your knees and walk your feet in towards your glutes.

5) Whilst exhaling, push your knees into the band, squeeze your glutes and drive your heels to lift your hips towards the ceiling. As you do so, keep your chin on your chest keep driving upward until your glutes are fully contracted and your body is parallel with the floor.
6) Inhale and gently relax your glutes to return the barbell back along the same path to the starting position.
7) Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
es: 1) Coge una pequeña banda y colócala alrededor de los muslos, justo por encima de las rodillas.
2) Instale un banco o un escalón y una barra.
3) Siéntate en el suelo con las piernas debajo de la barra, tu espalda debe estar apoyada en un banco o un escalón elevado con los omódiscos como punto de contacto.
4) Enrolle la barra hacia arriba y sobre tus piernas hasta que esté directamente encima de tus caderas, dobla las rodillas y camina con los pies hacia los glúteos.

5) Mientras exhalass, empuja las rodillas hacia la banda, aprieta los glúteos y empuja los talones para levantar las caderas hacia el techo. Mientras lo haces, mantén la barbilla sobre el pecho y sigue avanzando hacia arriba hasta que los glúteos estén completamente contraídos y el cuerpo quede paralelo al suelo.
6) Inhala y relaje suavemente los glúteos para devolver la barra por el mismo camino hasta la posición inicial.
7) Repite el número recomendado de repeticiones.

name: Banded Abductors
instructions: 1) Stand with feet hip-width apart and a resistance band looped around both ankles.
2) Engage your core and maintain a slight bend in your knees.
3) Lift one leg out to the side squeezing the glutes, stretching the band, then return to the starting position. Repeat for prescribed repetitions and then repeat on the other side.

en: 1) Stand with feet hip-width apart and a resistance band looped around both ankles.
2) Engage your core and maintain a slight bend in your knees.
3) Lift one leg out to the side squeezing the glutes, stretching the band, then return to the starting position. Repeat for prescribed repetitions and then repeat on the other side.
es: 1) Colócate de pie con los pies separados a la anchura de las caderas y una banda de resistencia enrollada alrededor de ambos tobillos.
2) Involucre tu core y mantén una ligera flexión de las rodillas.
3) Levanta una pierna hacia un lado apretando los glúteos, estirando la banda, luego regresa a la posición inicial. Repite las repeticiones prescritas y luego repite en el otro lado.

name: Russian Twist with Dumbbell
instructions: 1) Sit on the floor with your knees bent, holding a dumbbell with both hands close to your chest.
2) Lean back slightly and lift your feet off the ground, balancing on your sit bones.
3) Twist your torso to one side, lowering the dumbbell towards the floor beside your hip.
4) Return to the centre and twist to the opposite side, alternating sides for each repetition.
5) Focus on controlled movements keeping the chin off the chest and engage your core throughout. This exercise targets your obliques and improves core strength and rotational stability.

en: 1) Sit on the floor with your knees bent, holding a dumbbell with both hands close to your chest.
2) Lean back slightly and lift your feet off the ground, balancing on your sit bones.
3) Twist your torso to one side, lowering the dumbbell towards the floor beside your hip.
4) Return to the centre and twist to the opposite side, alternating sides for each repetition.
5) Focus on controlled movements keeping the chin off the chest and engage your core throughout. This exercise targets your obliques and improves core strength and rotational stability.
es: 1) Siéntate en el suelo con las rodillas dobladas, sujetando una mancuerna con ambas manos cerca del pecho.
2) Inclínese ligeramente hacia atrás y levanta los pies del suelo, manteniendo el equilibrio sobre los isquiones.
3) Gira el torso hacia un lado, bajando la mancuerna hacia el suelo al lado de tu cadera.
4) Vuelve al centro y gire hacia el lado opuesto, alternando lados en cada repetición.

5) Concéntrate en movimientos controlados manteniendo la barbilla alejada del pecho y activa tu core en todo momento. Este ejercicio se dirige a los oblicuos y mejora la fuerza central y la estabilidad rotacional.

This exercise targets your obliques and improves core strength and rotational stability.

5) Concéntrate en movimientos controlados manteniendo la barbilla alejada del pecho y activa tu core en todo momento.
Este ejercicio se dirige a los oblicuos y mejora la fuerza central y la estabilidad rotacional.

name: Plate Bicep Curl
instructions: 1) Stand with feet shoulder-width apart, holding a weight plate with both hands, palms facing in.
2) Keep elbows close to your sides, curl the plate towards your shoulders.
3) Pause briefly at the top, then slowly lower the plate back down.
4) Repeat for desired reps.
5) Focus on controlled movements and engage your biceps throughout. This exercise targets your biceps and improves arm strength.

es: 1) Colócate de pie con los pies separados a la anchura de los hombros, sosteniendo un disco de pesas con ambas manos, con las palmas hacia adentro.
2) Mantén los codos pegados a los costados y dobla la placa hacia los hombros.
3) Haga una breve pausa en la parte superior y luego baje lentamente la placa.
4) Repite para las repeticiones deseadas.
5) Concéntrate en movimientos controlados y activa tus bíceps en todo momento. Este ejercicio apunta a tus bíceps y mejora la fuerza del brazo.

name: Dumbbell Hip Thrust
instructions: 1) Sit on the ground with your upper back against a bench and a dumbbell across your hips.
2) Hold the dumbbell securely and plant your feet flat on the floor, hip-width apart.
3) Press through your heels to lift your hips up until your body forms a straight line from your knees to your shoulders.
4) Pause briefly at the top, then lower your hips back down.
5) Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
6) Focus on squeezing your glutes at the top of the movement.

en: 1) Sit on the ground with your upper back against a bench and a dumbbell across your hips.

es: 1) Siéntate en el suelo con la parte superior de la espalda apoyada en un banco y una mancuerna sobre las caderas.
2) Sujeta la mancuerna de forma segura y coloca los pies apoyados en el suelo, separados a la anchura de las caderas.
3) Presione con los talones para levantar las caderas hasta que tu cuerpo forme una línea recta desde las rodillas hasta los hombros.
4) Haga una breve pausa en la parte superior y luego baje las caderas.
5) Repite hasta el número de repeticiones deseado.
6) Concéntrate en apretar los glúteos en la parte superior del movimiento.

name: Alternating Reverse Jump Lunges
instructions: 1) Stand with your feet hip-width apart.
2) Step back with one leg into a reverse lunge, lowering your body until your front thigh is parallel to the ground.
3) Push through your front heel and jump immediately switching legs, performing a reverse lunge on the other side.
4) Continue alternating legs with each repetition.
5) Keep your chest up and core engaged throughout the movement.
This exercise targets your legs, glutes, and core while also improving balance and coordination.

en: 1) Stand with your feet hip-width apart.
2) Step back with one leg into a reverse lunge, lowering your body until your front thigh is parallel to the ground.
3) Push through your front heel and jump immediately switching legs, performing a reverse lunge on the other side.
4) Continue alternating legs with each repetition.
5) Keep your chest up and core engaged throughout the movement.

es: 1) Colócate de pie con los pies separados a la anchura de las caderas.
2) Da un paso atrás con una pierna en una estocada inversa, bajando el cuerpo hasta que el muslo delantero quede paralelo al suelo.
3) Empuja con el talón delantero y salta inmediatamente cambiando de pierna, realizando una estocada inversa en el otro lado.
4) Continúa alternando piernas en cada repetición.
5) Mantén el pecho erguido y el core comprometido durante todo el movimiento.
Este ejercicio se dirige a las piernas, los glúteos y el tronco y al mismo tiempo mejora el equilibrio y la coordinación.

name: Bodyweight Reverse Lunge
instructions: 1) Stand with your feet hip-width apart and hands on your hips.
2) Step back with one foot and lower your body until both knees are bent at a 90-degree angle.
3) Pause briefly, then push through your front heel to return to the starting position.
4) Switch legs and repeat.
5) Focus on keeping your torso upright and engaging your core for stability. This exercise targets your legs and glutes.

en: 1) Stand with your feet hip-width apart and hands on your hips.

3) Pause briefly, then push through your front heel to return to the starting position.
4) Switch legs and repeat.
5) Focus on keeping your torso upright and engaging your core for stability. This exercise targets your legs and glutes.
es: 1) Colócate de pie con los pies separados a la anchura de las caderas y las manos en las caderas.
2) Da un paso atrás con un pie y baja el cuerpo hasta que ambas rodillas estén dobladas en un ángulo de 90 grados.
3) Haga una pausa breve y luego empuja con el talón delantero para volver a la posición inicial.
4) Cambia de pierna y repite.
5) Concéntrate en mantener el torso erguido y activa el core para lograr estabilidad. Este ejercicio apunta a tus piernas y glúteos.

name: Crab Walks
instructions: 1) Start in a seated position with your knees bent and feet flat on the floor, hip-width apart. Place your hands under shoulders.
2) Lift your hips off the ground, forming a tabletop position with your torso and thighs parallel to the floor.
3) Begin to walk forwards by taking small steps with your hands and feet, moving in one direction.
4) Maintain tension in your core and keep your hips lifted throughout the movement.
5) Continue walking for the desired distance or number of steps.
6) Reverse direction and walk back to your starting point.
7) Focus on controlled movements and keep your core engaged to target your glutes and hip muscles.

en: 1) Start in a seated position with your knees bent and feet flat on the floor, hip-width apart. Place your hands under shoulders.
2) Lift your hips off the ground, forming a tabletop position with your torso and thighs parallel to the floor.
3) Begin to walk forwards by taking small steps with your hands and feet, moving in one direction.
4) Maintain tension in your core and keep your hips lifted throughout the movement.
5) Continue walking for the desired distance or number of steps.
6) Reverse direction and walk back to your starting point.
7) Focus on controlled movements and keep your core engaged to target your glutes and hip muscles.
es: 1) Empieza en una posición sentada con las rodillas dobladas y los pies apoyados en el suelo, separados a la anchura de las caderas. Coloca tus manos debajo de los hombros.
2) Levanta las caderas del suelo, formando una posición de mesa con el torso y los muslos paralelos al suelo.
3) Empieza a caminar hacia adelante dando pequeños pasos con las manos y los pies, moviéndose en una dirección.
4) Mantén la tensión en tu core y mantén las caderas elevadas durante todo el movimiento.
5) Continúa caminando la distancia o el número de pasos deseado.
6) Invierta la dirección y camina de regreso a tu punto de partida.
7) Concéntrese en movimientos controlados y mantén tu core comprometido para apuntar a tus glúteos y músculos de la cadera.

name: Duck Walks
instructions: 1) Stand with your feet hip-width apart and toes pointed slightly outwards.
2) Lower into a squat position, keeping your chest up and knees tracking over your toes.
3) Take small steps forward, staying low to the ground and maintaining the squat position.
4) Continue walking forward for a set distance or number of steps.
5) Focus on keeping your core engaged and your weight distributed evenly on both feet.
6) Reverse the movement to walk backward if desired.
Duck walks target your quads, glutes, and hip flexors while improving lower body strength and mobility.

en: 1) Stand with your feet hip-width apart and toes pointed slightly outwards.
2) Lower into a squat position, keeping your chest up and knees tracking over your toes.
3) Take small steps forward, staying low to the ground and maintaining the squat position.
4) Continue walking forward for a set distance or number of steps.
5) Focus on keeping your core engaged and your weight distributed evenly on both feet.
6) Reverse the movement to walk backward if desired.
Duck walks target your quads, glutes, and hip flexors while improving lower body strength and mobility.
es: 1) Colócate de pie con los pies separados a la anchura de las caderas y las puntas de los pies apuntando ligeramente hacia afuera.
2) Baja a una sentadilla, manteniendo el pecho erguido y las rodillas sobre las puntas de los pies.
3) Da pequeños pasos hacia adelante, manteniéndote cerca del suelo y manteniendo la posición de sentadilla.
4) Continúa caminando hacia adelante durante una distancia o número de pasos determinados.
5) Concéntrese en mantener tu core comprometido y tu peso distribuido uniformemente en ambos pies.
6) Invierta el movimiento para caminar hacia atrás si lo desea.
Las caminatas en pato apuntan a los cuádriceps, los glúteos y los flexores de la cadera mientras mejoran la fuerza y ​​la movilidad de la parte inferior del cuerpo.

name: Donkey Kicks
instructions: 1) Adopt an all fours position on the floor with hands directly under the shoulders and knees under the hips.
3) Brace abs and keep hips as stable as possible.
4) With one leg, flex the foot and push the heel towards the ceiling until you get full glute contraction without moving the hips.
5) Come back down until the knee is nearly back on the floor and repeat for the prescribed repetitions.
6) Complete on the other leg.

5) Vuelva a bajar hasta que la rodilla esté casi en el suelo y repite las repeticiones prescritas.

name: Elevated Glute Bridge
instructions: 1) Sit on the ground with your knees bent and feet flat. Lean back, resting your upper back against a sturdy surface.
2) Drive through your heels to lift your hips towards the ceiling, squeezing your glutes at the top.
3) Pause briefly, then lower your hips back down.
4) Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
5) Focus on squeezing your glutes at the top of the movement.

name: Quad Dominant Lunges
instructions: 1) Stand with your feet hip-width apart.
2) Take a small step forward with one foot, bending both knees to lower your body.
3) As you lunge, focus on driving your front knee forward over the toes.
4) Keep your torso upright and core engaged.
5) As you stand up think about driving the knee back.
6) Repeat for prescribed amount of reps on one side.
7) Repeat on the other leg.
This exercise targets your quads and improves lower body strength.

es: 1) Colócate de pie con los pies separados a la anchura de las caderas.

4) Mantén el torso erguido y el core comprometido.
5) Mientras se pone de pie, piense en llevar la rodilla hacia atrás.
6) Repite la cantidad prescrita de repeticiones en un lado.
7) Repite con la otra pierna.

name: Hip Dominant Lunges
instructions: Start in a split stance keeping your feet roughly hip-width apart.
Lunge down keeping your weight above your leading leg.
As you stand back up from the lunge, aim to shift your weight back more towards your hips, creating a more vertical shin angle and forward lean.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

name: Single Leg Romanian Deadlift
instructions: Hold a dumbbell by your thigh, keeping your other arm free.
Lift one leg off the ground and move the foot behind you whilst leaning forwards slightly.
Keeping your back straight, hinge at the hips to lean further forward, raising your back leg behind you to maintain balance.
Lower until you feel the stretch in your standing leg's hamstring, then return to the starting position.

name.es: Peso muerto rumano con una sola pierna

en: Hold a dumbbell by your thigh, keeping your other arm free.
Lift one leg off the ground and move the foot behind you whilst leaning forwards slightly.
Keeping your back straight, hinge at the hips to lean further forward, raising your back leg behind you to maintain balance.
Lower until you feel the stretch in your standing leg's hamstring, then return to the starting position.
es: Sostenga una mancuerna por el muslo, manteniendo el otro brazo libre.
Levanta una pierna del suelo y mueva el pie hacia atrás mientras se inclina ligeramente hacia adelante.
Manteniendo la espalda recta, gire las caderas para inclinarse más hacia adelante y levanta la pierna trasera detrás de usted para mantener el equilibrio.
Baje hasta que sienta el estiramiento en el isquiosurales de la pierna de apoyo, luego vuelve a la posición inicial.

name: Landmine Deadlift
instructions: Place a barbell in a landmine attachment and load the free end of the bar with weight plates.
If your gym doesn't have a landmine attachment you can wedge the end of the barbell in a corner and place a heavy dumbbell over the bar to help keep it in place.
Stand with your feet slightly wider than shoulder-width apart, holding the end of the barbell with both hands supinated.
Keeping your arms extended below you and back straight, keep your core and lats braced and stand up from the lengthened position.
In a controller manner, bring the bar back down keeping your posture tight and chest up.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

en: Place a barbell in a landmine attachment and load the free end of the bar with weight plates.
If your gym doesn't have a landmine attachment you can wedge the end of the barbell in a corner and place a heavy dumbbell over the bar to help keep it in place.
Stand with your feet slightly wider than shoulder-width apart, holding the end of the barbell with both hands supinated.
Keeping your arms extended below you and back straight, keep your core and lats braced and stand up from the lengthened position.
In a controller manner, bring the bar back down keeping your posture tight and chest up.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
es: Coloca una barra en un anclaje landmine y carga el extremo libre de la barra con discos.
Si tu gimnasio no tiene un anclaje landmine, puedes colocar el extremo de la barra en una esquina y colocar una mancuerna pesada sobre la barra para ayudar a mantenerla en su sitio.
Colócate de pie con los pies ligeramente más separados que el ancho de los hombros, sosteniendo el extremo de la barra con ambas manos en tupinación.
Manteniendo los brazos extendidos debajo de usted y la espalda recta, mantén el core y los dorsales reforzados y levántese desde la posición alargada.
De manera controlada, baje la barra manteniendo la postura firme y el pecho hacia arriba.
Repite el número recomendado de repeticiones.

name: Landmine Shoulder Press
instructions: Place a barbell in a landmine attachment and load the free end of the bar with weight plates.
If your gym doesn't have a landmine attachment you can wedge the end of the barbell in a corner and place a heavy dumbbell over the bar to help keep it in place.
Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding the barbell with one hand at shoulder height
Keeping the bar at shoulder height, press the bar up and forwards so that your arm is extended with a slight bend in the elbow at the top of the rep.
In a controller manner, bring the barbell back down to shoulder height to complete the rep.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

name: Landmine Squat
instructions: Place a barbell in a landmine attachment and load the free end of the bar with weight plates.
If your gym doesn't have a landmine attachment you can wedge the end of the barbell in a corner and place a heavy dumbbell over the bar to help keep it in place.
Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding the barbell with both hands at chest height
Keeping the bar at chest height, slowly squat down until your upper and lower legs make a 90-degree angle.
As you exhale, press through your heels to drive up, keeping your quadriceps and glutes engaged throughout the rep.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

name: Squat Hold

As you inhale, slowly squat down until your upper and lower legs make a 90-degree angle and hold your position.
Hold this position for the recommended amount of time.
When it's time to return to standing, exhale and drive through your heels to stand up.

name: Heel Elevated Dumbbell Squat
instructions: Place a foam block or two weight plates on the ground, put your heels on the edge of the wedge/plates to create a shoulder width stance.
Once in the correct position, step onto the platform so that your heels are on the edge.
From here, squat down to grab your dumbbells. This will be your starting position.
As you inhale, slowly squat down until your upper and lower legs make a 90-degree angle.
As you exhale, press through your heels to drive up, engaging your quadriceps and glutes throughout the movement.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

name.es: Sentadilla en copa con talón elevado

en: Place a foam block or two weight plates on the ground, put your heels on the edge of the wedge/plates to create a shoulder-width stance.
Once in the correct position, squat down to pick up the dumbbell, resting your palms on the inner surface to keep it sturdy.
Squat up, keeping a neutral posture. This will be your starting position.
As you inhale, slowly squat down until your upper and lower legs make a 90-degree angle.
As you exhale, press through your heels to drive up, engaging your quadriceps and glutes in order to do so.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
es: Coloca un bloque de espuma o dos discos de pesas en el suelo, coloca los talones en el borde de la cuña/discos para crear una postura a la anchura de los hombros.
Una vez en la posición correcta, agáchate para levantar la mancuerna, apoyando las palmas de las manos en la tuperficie interior para mantenerla resistente.
Ponte de sentadilla manteniendo una postura neutra. Esta es tu posición inicial.
Mientras inhalas, agáchese lentamente hasta que la parte superior e inferior de las piernas formen un ángulo de 90 grados.
Mientras exhalas, presione los talones para tubir, involucrando los cuádriceps y los glúteos para hacerlo.
Repite el número recomendado de repeticiones.

name: Heel Elevated Barbell Back Squat
instructions: Place a foam block or two weight plates on the ground, put your heels on the edge of the wedge/plates to create a shoulder width stance.
Once in the correct place, step under the bar and unrack the weight so the barbell is rested on your back.
Take a step back so that your heels are on the edge of the wedge/plates. This will be your starting position.
As you inhale, slowly squat down until your upper and lower legs make a 90-degree angle.
As you exhale, press through your heels to drive the bar up, engaging your quadriceps and glutes in order to do so.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

name.es: Sentadilla trasera con barra elevada y talón

en: Place a foam block or two weight plates on the ground, put your heels on the edge of the wedge/plates to create a shoulder width stance.
Once in the correct place, step under the bar and unrack the weight so the barbell is rested on your back.
Take a step back so that your heels are on the edge of the wedge/plates. This will be your starting position.
As you inhale, slowly squat down until your upper and lower legs make a 90-degree angle.
As you exhale, press through your heels to drive the bar up, engaging your quadriceps and glutes in order to do so.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
es: Coloca un bloque de espuma o dos discos de pesas en el suelo, coloca los talones en el borde de la cuña/discos para crear una postura a la anchura de los hombros.
Una vez en el lugar correcto, colóquese debajo de la barra y reneumático el peso de modo que la barra descanse sobre tu espalda.
Da un paso atrás para que tus talones queden en el borde de la cuña/placas. Esta es tu posición inicial.
Mientras inhalas, agáchese lentamente hasta que la parte superior e inferior de las piernas formen un ángulo de 90 grados.
Mientras exhalas, presione con los talones para elevar la barra, involucrando los cuádriceps y los glúteos para hacerlo.
Repite el número recomendado de repeticiones.

name: Battle Rope Alternating Waves (Single Arm)
instructions: For this exercise you will need a heavy rope anchored at its center 15-20 feet away. Standing in front of the rope, take an end one hand with your arm extended at your side. This will be your starting position.
Initiate the movement by rapidly raising one arm to shoulder level as quickly as you can.
As you let that arm drop to the starting position, raise the opposite side.
Continue alternating your left and right arms, whipping the ropes up and down as fast as you can.

name.es: Ondas alternas con battle rope (un brazo)

en: For this exercise you will need a heavy rope anchored at its center 15-20 feet away. Standing in front of the rope, take an end one hand with your arm extended at your side. This will be your starting position.
Initiate the movement by rapidly raising one arm to shoulder level as quickly as you can.
As you let that arm drop to the starting position, raise the opposite side.
Continue alternating your left and right arms, whipping the ropes up and down as fast as you can.
es: Para este ejercicio necesitarás una cuerda pesada anclada en tu centro a una distancia de entre 15 y 20 pies. De pie frente a la cuerda, toma un extremo con una mano con el brazo extendido a tu costado. Esta es tu posición inicial.
Inicie el movimiento levantando rápidamente un brazo hasta el nivel del hombro lo más rápido que pueda.
Mientras dejas caer ese brazo a la posición inicial, levanta el lado opuesto.
Continúa alternando los brazos izquierdo y derecho, moviendo las cuerdas hacia arriba y hacia abajo lo más rápido que pueda.

name: Sandbag - Alternating Static Overhead Side Lunges
instructions: Stand up straight with the sandbag held above your head. This will be your starting position.

Take an exaggerated step out to one side and plant your foot with your toes slightly pointing outwards. Maintain a straight back throughout this movement so that you minimise the risk of injury. Inhale, push your hips backward and bend the knee of the foot you have stepped out with in order to lower your weight over that thigh. Once your thigh is parallel with the floor, pause for a brief moment, exhale and push through the heel and thigh from that planted foot.
Throughout this process the leg that remained in the starting position should be straight.
Alternate legs as you go and repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variation: Leg Press (Wide Stance).

es: Párate derecho con el sandbag sobre tu cabeza. Esta es tu posición inicial.

Da un paso exagerado hacia un lado y planta el pie con los dedos ligeramente apuntando hacia afuera. Mantén la espalda recta durante todo este movimiento para minimizar el riesgo de lesiones. Inhala, empuja la cadera hacia atrás y dobla la rodilla del pie con el que has salido para bajar el peso sobre ese muslo. Una vez que su muslo esté paralelo al suelo, haga una pausa por un breve momento, exhala y empuja a través del talón y el muslo desde el pie plantado.
Durante todo este proceso la pierna que permaneció en la posición inicial debe estar recta.
Alterne las piernas a medida que avanza y repite hasta el número recomendado de repeticiones.
Variación: Press de piernas (postura amplia).

name: Sandbag - Bent Over Rows
instructions: Grab the sandbag (palms facing each other), bend your knees slightly and bring your torso forward by bending at your hips; as you bend make sure to keep your back straight until it is almost parallel to the floor. Tip: Make sure that you keep your spine in a neutral position. The sandbag should hang directly in front of you as your arms are perpendicular to the floor and your torso. This is your starting position.

While keeping the torso stationary, lift the sandbag to your abdomen (as you exhale), elevating elbows towards the ceiling (do not exert any force with the forearm other than holding the sandbag). At the top contracted position, squeeze the back muscles and hold for a second.
Slowly lower the bag to the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution:
This exercise is not recommended for people with back issues. A Low Cable Row is a better choice for people with back pain.
Ensure perfect form and never round the back as this can cause injury.
Be cautious with the weights you are using. If you are in doubt, use a lesser weight.
Variations: Low Cable Row or a Bent Over Barbell Row

Tip: Make sure that you keep your spine in a neutral position. The sandbag should hang directly in front of you as your arms are perpendicular to the floor and your torso. While keeping the torso stationary, lift the sandbag to your abdomen (as you exhale), elevating elbows towards the ceiling (do not exert any force with the forearm other than holding the sandbag). At the top contracted position, squeeze the back muscles and hold for a second.

es: Agarra el sandbag (con las palmas una frente a la otra), dobla ligeramente las rodillas y lleve el torso hacia adelante doblando las caderas; Mientras te inclinas, asegúrate de mantener la espalda recta hasta que quede casi paralela al suelo. Consejo: asegúrate de mantener la columna en una posición neutral. El sandbag debe colgar directamente frente a ti mientras tus brazos están perpendiculares al suelo y a tu torso. Esta es tu posición inicial.

Mientras mantiene el torso inmóvil, levanta el sandbag hasta tu abdomen (mientras exhala), elevando los codos hacia el techo (no ejerza ninguna fuerza con el antebrazo que no sea sostener el sandbag). En la posición más contraída, aprieta los músculos de la espalda y mantén la posición durante un segundo.
Baje lentamente el sandbag a la posición inicial mientras inhala.
Repite el número recomendado de repeticiones.
Precaución:
Este ejercicio no se recomienda para personas con problemas de espalda. Un Low Cable Row es una mejor opción para las personas con dolor de espalda.
Asegúrate de que la forma sea perfecta y nunca redondee la espalda, ya que esto puedes causar lesiones.
Tenga cuidado con las pesas que está utilizando. Si tienes dudas, utiliza un peso menor.
Variaciones: remo bajo con cable o remo inclinado con barra

name: Sandbag - Alternating Overhead Curtsy Squats
instructions: Stand Up straight with the sandbag held above your head. This will be your starting position.

Inhale and begin to descend by bending at your knees and hips. Pick one foot up off the floor and cross it behind your other leg. Your weight should be put predominantly through your heel as you sit back into the movement until your thigh is either parallel or just past to the floor.
Drive up through your standing leg.
Alternate legs as you go and repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variation: Reverse Lunges or Sitting Squats.

name.es: Sandbag: sentadillas alternas con curtsy por encima de la cabeza

es: Párate derecho con el sandbag sobre tu cabeza. Esta es tu posición inicial.

Inhala y comienza a descender doblando las rodillas y las caderas. Levanta un pie del suelo y crúzalo detrás de la otra pierna. Su peso debe colocarse predominantemente a través del talón mientras se lleva la cadera atrás en el movimiento hasta que su muslo esté paralelo o apenas pasado del suelo.
Sube a través de tu pierna de apoyo.
Alterne las piernas a medida que avanza y repite hasta el número recomendado de repeticiones.
Variación: zancadas inversas o sentadillas sentadas.

name: Sandbag - Alternating Reverse Overhead Lunges
instructions: Whilst in a standing position, grab the sandbag and hold above your head. This will be your starting position.
Take a step back (slightly larger than a normal step) and as you land, drop your body down so that you create two right angles at your knees. Inhale as you do so whilst maintaining a straight torso.
Make sure that you keep your front knee over your heel and not over your toes. Your front shin should now be perpendicular to the floor.
As you exhale, use mainly the heel of your front foot and push off the floor towards the starting position again.
Alternate legs as you go and repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dumbbell Lunges or Barbell Lunges.

As you exhale, use mainly the heel of your front foot and push off the floor towards the starting position again.

es: Mientras está de pie, agarre el sandbag y sosténgalo por encima de tu cabeza. Esta es tu posición inicial.

Da un paso atrás (un poco más grande que un paso normal) y, cuando aterrices, deja caer tu cuerpo hacia abajo para crear dos ángulos rectos en tus rodillas. Inhala mientras lo hacess manteniendo el torso recto.
Asegúrate de mantener la rodilla delantera sobre el talón y no sobre las puntas de los pies. Tu espinilla delantera ahora debería estar perpendicular al suelo.
Mientras exhalass, utiliza principalmente el talón del pie delantero y empuja el suelo hacia la posición inicial nuevamente.
Alterne las piernas a medida que avanza y repite hasta el número recomendado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: zancadas con mancuernas o zancadas con barra.

name: Sandbag - Alternating Reverse Lunges (Back)
instructions: Whilst in a standing position, grab the sandbag and place across your back. This will be your starting position.
Take a step back (slightly larger than a normal step) and as you land, drop your body down so that you create two right angles at your knees. Inhale as you do so whilst maintaining a straight torso.
Make sure that you keep your front knee over your heel and not over your toes. Your front shin should now be perpendicular to the floor.
As you exhale, use mainly the heel of your front foot and push off the floor towards the starting position again.
Alternate legs as you go and repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dumbbell Lunges or Barbell Lunges.

Variations: Dumbbell Lunges or Barbell Lunges.
es: Mientras estás de pie, toma el sandbag y colócalo sobre tu espalda. Esta es tu posición inicial.

Da un paso atrás (un poco más grande que un paso normal) y, cuando aterrices, deja caer tu cuerpo hacia abajo para crear dos ángulos rectos en tus rodillas. Inhala mientras lo hacess manteniendo el torso recto.
Asegúrate de mantener la rodilla delantera sobre el talón y no sobre las puntas de los pies. Tu espinilla delantera ahora debería estar perpendicular al suelo.
Mientras exhalass, utiliza principalmente el talón del pie delantero y empuja el suelo hacia la posición inicial nuevamente.
Alterne las piernas a medida que avanza y repite hasta el número recomendado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: zancadas con mancuernas o zancadas con barra.

name: Banded Straight Arm Pulldowns
instructions: 1)Attach a resistance band to an overhead anchor.
2) Stand facing the anchor with feet hip-width apart.
3) Grasp the resistance band with both hands, arms extended overhead.
4) Pull the band down towards your hips, keeping your arms straight.
5) Pause briefly at the bottom, then return to the starting position.
6) Focus on engaging your lats and keeping your core stable throughout the movement.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name.es: Jalones con brazos rectos con banda

en: 1)Attach a resistance band to an overhead anchor.
2) Stand facing the anchor with feet hip-width apart.
3) Grasp the resistance band with both hands, arms extended overhead.
4) Pull the band down towards your hips, keeping your arms straight.
5) Pause briefly at the bottom, then return to the starting position.
6) Focus on engaging your lats and keeping your core stable throughout the movement.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
es: 1) Conecte una banda de resistencia a un ancla tuperior.
2) Colócate de pie frente al ancla con los pies separados a la anchura de las caderas.
3) Sujeta la banda de resistencia con ambas manos, con los brazos extendidos por encima de la cabeza.
4) Tire de la banda hacia las caderas, manteniendo los brazos rectos.
5) Haga una breve pausa en la parte inferior y luego vuelve a la posición inicial.
6) Concéntrate en activar tus dorsales y mantener tu core estable durante todo el movimiento.
Repite hasta el número de repeticiones deseado.

name: Feet Elevated Inverted Rows
instructions: 1) Grab hold of a bar with an overhand grip, and position yourself underneath with your feet elevated on a bench or box.
2) Have hands just wider than shoulder width apart.
3) Keep your body straight from head to heels, engage your core, and pull your chest towards the bar drawing the elbows down.
4) Lower yourself back down with control.
5) Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, focusing on maintaining proper form and engaging your back muscles.

en: 1) Grab hold of a bar with an overhand grip, and position yourself underneath with your feet elevated on a bench or box.
2) Have hands just wider than shoulder width apart.
3) Keep your body straight from head to heels, engage your core, and pull your chest towards the bar drawing the elbows down.
4) Lower yourself back down with control.
5) Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, focusing on maintaining proper form and engaging your back muscles.
es: 1) Sujeta una barra con un agarre prono y colóquese debajo con los pies elevados sobre un banco o caja.
2) Mantén las manos un poco más separadas que el ancho de los hombros.
3) Mantén el cuerpo recto desde la cabeza hasta los talones, active el core y neumático del pecho hacia la barra llevando los codos hacia abajo.
4) Vuelve a bajar con control.
5) Repite hasta el número de repeticiones deseado, concentrándose en mantener la buena técnica y ejercitar los músculos de la espalda.

name: Cable Hip Abduction
instructions: 1) Stand beside a low pulley cable machine with the cable attached to your ankle. Keep your core engaged and hold onto the machine for balance. Allow the leg to cross over in front of the other.
2) Lift your leg sideways against the resistance of the cable, keeping it straight.
3) Pause briefly at the top of the movement squeezing the glutes and outer thigh, then slowly lower your leg back down.
4) Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
5) Focus on controlled movements and feel the tension in your outer hip muscles.
This exercise targets hip abduction and helps strengthen the muscles around your hips.

en: 1) Stand beside a low pulley cable machine with the cable attached to your ankle. Keep your core engaged and hold onto the machine for balance. Allow the leg to cross over in front of the other.
2) Lift your leg sideways against the resistance of the cable, keeping it straight.
3) Pause briefly at the top of the movement squeezing the glutes and outer thigh, then slowly lower your leg back down.
4) Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
5) Focus on controlled movements and feel the tension in your outer hip muscles.
This exercise targets hip abduction and helps strengthen the muscles around your hips.
es: 1) Colócate al lado de una máquina de polea baja con el cable sujeto a su tobillo. Mantén el core activo y sujétate a la máquina para mantener el equilibrio. Permite que la pierna se cruce frente a la otra.
2) Levanta la pierna hacia un lado contra la resistencia del cable, manteniéndola recta.
3) Haz una breve pausa en la parte superior del movimiento apretando los gluteos y la parte externa del muslo, luego baja lentamente la pierna hacia abajo.
4) Repite durante el número deseado de repeticiones, luego cambie de lado.
5) Concéntrate en movimientos controlados y sienta la tensión en los músculos externos de la cadera.
Este ejercicio trabaja la abducción de la cadera y ayuda a fortalecer los músculos alrededor de las caderas.

name: Chest Supported Single Arm Dumbbell Rear Lateral Raise
instructions: 1) Lie facedown on an incline bench, holding a dumbbell in one hand.
2) Keep your arm slightly bent and palm facing inward.
3) Lift the dumbbell out to the side until your arm is parallel to the ground.
4) Lower back down with control.
5) Switch sides and repeat.
6) Focus on engaging your shoulder muscles and maintaining stability throughout.

4) Lower back down with control.
5) Switch sides and repeat.
6) Focus on engaging your shoulder muscles and maintaining stability throughout.

4) Baja la espalda con control.
5) Cambie de lado y repite.
6) Concéntrate en activar los músculos de los hombros y mantener la estabilidad en todo momento.

name: BOSU - Glute Bridges (Feet On Dome)
instructions: 1) Lie on your back with your feet placed on the dome of a BOSU ball.
2) Press through your heels to lift your hips towards the ceiling, squeezing your glutes at the top.
3) Lower your hips back down with control whilst bracing the abs.
4) Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, focusing on engaging your glutes throughout the movement.

name.es: BOSU - Puentes de gluteos (pies sobre cupula)

en: 1) Lie on your back with your feet placed on the dome of a BOSU ball.
2) Press through your heels to lift your hips towards the ceiling, squeezing your glutes at the top.
3) Lower your hips back down with control whilst bracing the abs.
4) Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, focusing on engaging your glutes throughout the movement.
es: 1) Túmbate boca arriba con los pies colocados sobre la cupula de una pelota BOSU.
2) Presione con los talones para levantar las caderas hacia el techo, apretando los gluteos en la parte superior.
3) Baja las caderas hacia abajo con control mientras refuerza los abdominales.
4) Repite durante el número deseado de repeticiones, concentrándose en activar los gluteos durante todo el movimiento.

name: BOSU - Single Leg Glute Bridges (Foot On Dome)
instructions: 1) Position a BOSU ball with the dome side up.
2) Lie on your back and place one foot on the dome, keeping the other leg extended.
3) Press through your heel on the BOSU to lift your hips, forming a straight line from shoulders to knees.
4) Pause briefly at the top, then lower your hips back down.
5) Repeat for the required repetitions.
6) Switch legs and repeat.
7) Focus on stability and engage your glutes throughout.
This exercise targets your glutes and hamstrings.

name.en: BOSU - Single Leg Glute Bridges (Foot On Dome)
name.es: BOSU - Puentes de gluteos de una sola pierna (pie sobre cupula)

en: 1) Position a BOSU ball with the dome side up.

This exercise targets your glutes and hamstrings.
es: 1) Coloca una bola BOSU con el lado de la cupula hacia arriba.
2) Túmbate boca arriba y coloca un pie sobre la cupula, manteniendo la otra pierna extendida.
3) Presione el BOSU con el talón para levantar las caderas, formando una línea recta desde los hombros hasta las rodillas.
4) Haz una breve pausa en la parte superior y luego baja las caderas.
5) Repite para las repeticiones requeridas.
6) Cambia de pierna y repite.
7) Concéntrate en la estabilidad y activa tus gluteos en todo momento.
Este ejercicio trabaja tus gluteos e isquiosurales.

name: BOSU - Crunches
instructions: 1) Place a BOSU ball flat-side down on the floor. Lie on your back with your lower back centred on the dome.
2) Bend your knees and place your feet flat on the floor, hip-width apart. Cross your arms over your chest or place your hands lightly behind your head.
3) Engage your core muscles and lift your shoulder blades off the BOSU, curling your upper body towards your knees.
4) Think about closing the gab between your ribcage and hips.
5) Pause briefly at the top, then lower back down with control.
6) Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, focusing on controlled movements and maintaining tension in your core throughout.

en: 1) Place a BOSU ball flat-side down on the floor. Lie on your back with your lower back centred on the dome.
2) Bend your knees and place your feet flat on the floor, hip-width apart. Cross your arms over your chest or place your hands lightly behind your head.
3) Engage your core muscles and lift your shoulder blades off the BOSU, curling your upper body towards your knees.
4) Think about closing the gab between your ribcage and hips.
5) Pause briefly at the top, then lower back down with control.
6) Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, focusing on controlled movements and maintaining tension in your core throughout.
es: 1) Coloca una pelota BOSU con el lado plano hacia abajo en el suelo. Túmbate boca arriba con la zona lumbar centrada en la cupula.
2) Doble las rodillas y coloca los pies apoyados en el suelo, separados a la altura de las caderas. Cruza los brazos sobre el pecho o coloca las manos ligeramente detrás de la cabeza.
3) Activa los core y levanta los omóplatos del BOSU, curvando la parte superior del cuerpo hacia las rodillas.
4) Piense en cerrar la brecha entre la caja torácica y las caderas.
5) Haz una breve pausa en la parte superior y luego vuelve a bajar con control.
6) Repite durante el número deseado de repeticiones, concentrándose en movimientos controlados y manteniendo la tensión en su core en todo momento.

name: BOSU - V-Sit Ups (Assisted)
instructions: 1) Sit on the rounded side of a BOSU ball with your hands planted on the ground behind you for support.
2) Lean back slightly, engaging your core, and lift your legs off the ground, forming a V shape with your body.
3) Slowly lower your upper body towards the ground while simultaneously extending your legs out in front of you.
4) Pause briefly at the bottom of the movement, then return to the starting position by sitting up and bringing your knees towards your chest.
5) Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, focusing on controlled movements and maintaining balance on the BOSU ball.

en: 1) Sit on the rounded side of a BOSU ball with your hands planted on the ground behind you for support.
2) Lean back slightly, engaging your core, and lift your legs off the ground, forming a V shape with your body.
3) Slowly lower your upper body towards the ground while simultaneously extending your legs out in front of you.
4) Pause briefly at the bottom of the movement, then return to the starting position by sitting up and bringing your knees towards your chest.
5) Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, focusing on controlled movements and maintaining balance on the BOSU ball.
es: 1) Siéntate en el lado redondeado de una pelota BOSU con las manos plantadas en el suelo detrás de ti para apoyarte.
2) Inclínate ligeramente hacia atrás, involucrando su core y levanta las piernas del suelo, formando una V con el cuerpo.
3) Baja lentamente la parte superior del cuerpo hacia el suelo mientras simultáneamente extiende las piernas frente a ti.
4) Haz una breve pausa en la parte inferior del movimiento, luego vuelve a la posición inicial sentándose y acercando las rodillas al pecho.
5) Repite durante el número deseado de repeticiones, concentrándose en movimientos controlados y manteniendo el equilibrio sobre la pelota BOSU.

name: BOSU - Side Plank With Rotation (Feet On Dome)
instructions: 1) Begin in a side plank position with your feet on the dome of a BOSU ball.
2) Keep hips stacked on top of each other and elbow directly under the shoulder.
3) Engage your core and lift your hips, forming a straight line from head to heels.
4) Rotate your torso, reaching your top arm underneath your body and towards the floor.
5) Return to the starting position and repeat the required repetitions on the same side.
6) Then repeat on the other side.
7) Focus on stability and controlled movements.
This exercise targets your obliques and improves core strength.

name.en: BOSU - Side Plank With Rotation (Feet On Dome)
name.es: BOSU - Plancha lateral con rotación (pies sobre cupula)

en: 1) Begin in a side plank position with your feet on the dome of a BOSU ball.
2) Keep hips stacked on top of each other and elbow directly under the shoulder.
3) Engage your core and lift your hips, forming a straight line from head to heels.
4) Rotate your torso, reaching your top arm underneath your body and towards the floor.
5) Return to the starting position and repeat the required repetitions on the same side.
6) Then repeat on the other side.
7) Focus on stability and controlled movements.
This exercise targets your obliques and improves core strength.
es: 1) Comienza en una posición de tabla lateral con los pies sobre la cupula de una pelota BOSU.
2) Mantén las caderas apiladas una encima de la otra y el codo directamente debajo del hombro.
3) Activa su core y levanta las caderas, formando una línea recta desde la cabeza hasta los talones.
4) Gire el torso, colocando el brazo superior debajo del cuerpo y hacia el suelo.
5) Vuelve a la posición inicial y repite las repeticiones requeridas en el mismo lado.
6) Luego repite del otro lado.
7) Centrarse en la estabilidad y los movimientos controlados.
Este ejercicio trabaja tus oblicuos y mejora la fuerza central.

name: BOSU - Side Plank With Rotation (Forearm On Dome)
instructions: 1) Begin in a side plank position with your forearm on the dome of the BOSU ball and feet stacked.
2) Raise your top arm towards the ceiling, opening up your chest and rotating your torso then rotate and reach the arm under the body.
3) Repeat for the required repetitions.
4) Switch sides and repeat.
5) Focus on stability and controlled movements.
This exercise targets your obliques and improves core strength.

3) Repeat for the required repetitions.
4) Switch sides and repeat.
5) Focus on stability and controlled movements.
This exercise targets your obliques and improves core strength.
es: 1) Comienza en una posición de plancha lateral con el antebrazo sobre la cupula de la pelota BOSU y los pies apilados.

3) Repite para las repeticiones requeridas.
4) Cambie de lado y repite.
5) Centrarse en la estabilidad y los movimientos controlados.
Este ejercicio trabaja tus oblicuos y mejora la fuerza central.

name: BOSU - Mountain Climbers
instructions: 1) Start in a plank position with your hands on the flat side of a BOSU ball.
2) Engage your core and keep your body in a straight line from head to heels.
3) Drive one knee towards your chest, then quickly switch legs, as if running in place.
4) Continue alternating legs at a moderate pace.
5) Focus on maintaining stability on the BOSU ball and keeping your core engaged throughout.

en: 1) Start in a plank position with your hands on the flat side of a BOSU ball.
2) Engage your core and keep your body in a straight line from head to heels.
3) Drive one knee towards your chest, then quickly switch legs, as if running in place.
4) Continue alternating legs at a moderate pace.
5) Focus on maintaining stability on the BOSU ball and keeping your core engaged throughout.
es: 1) Comienza en posición de tabla con las manos en el lado plano de una pelota BOSU.
2) Activa su core y mantén el cuerpo en línea recta desde la cabeza hasta los talones.
3) Lleva una rodilla hacia el pecho y luego cambia rápidamente de pierna, como si estuvieras corriendo en el mismo lugar.
4) Continuar alternando piernas a un ritmo moderado.
5) Concéntrate en mantener la estabilidad sobre la pelota BOSU y mantener tu core activo en todo momento.

name: BOSU - Crossover Climbers
instructions: 1) Start in a high plank position with your hands on the BOSU ball and your body forming a straight line from head to heels.
2) Drive one knee towards the opposite elbow, crossing your body under your torso.
3) Keep abs braced and hips as stable as possible.
4) Return to the starting position and repeat on the other side.
5) Continue alternating sides in a smooth, controlled motion.
6) Focus on engaging your core and maintaining stability on the BOSU ball throughout the exercise.

4) Return to the starting position and repeat on the other side.
5) Continue alternating sides in a smooth, controlled motion.
6) Focus on engaging your core and maintaining stability on the BOSU ball throughout the exercise.
es: 1) Comienza en posición de plancha alta con las manos sobre la pelota BOSU y el cuerpo formando una línea recta desde la cabeza hasta los talones.
2) Lleva una rodilla hacia el codo opuesto, cruzando el cuerpo por debajo del torso.
3) Mantén los abdominales firmes y las caderas lo más estables posible.
4) Regresa a la posición inicial y repite del otro lado.
5) Continúa alternando lados con un movimiento suave y controlado.
6) Concéntrate en activar su core y mantener la estabilidad en la pelota BOSU durante todo el ejercicio.

name: BOSU - Mountain Climbers (Knee Outside)
instructions: 1) Place a BOSU ball on the ground with the flat side facing up.
2) Get into a plank position with your hands on the BOSU ball and your body in a straight line from head to heels.
3) Drive one knee towards the outside of the same elbow, then return to plank position.
4) Alternate legs, moving in a smooth, controlled motion.
5) Focus on engaging your core and maintaining stability throughout the exercise.
This variation of mountain climbers targets your core, shoulders, and hip flexors.

es: 1) Coloca una pelota BOSU en el suelo con el lado plano hacia arriba.
2) Ponte en posición de plancha con las manos sobre la pelota BOSU y el cuerpo en línea recta desde la cabeza hasta los talones.
3) Mueva una rodilla hacia el exterior del mismo codo, luego vuelve a la posición de tabla.
4) Alterne las piernas, moviéndose con un movimiento suave y controlado.
5) Concéntrate en activar su core y mantener la estabilidad durante todo el ejercicio.
Esta variación de los mountain climbers trabaja los flexores del core, los hombros y la cadera.

name: BOSU - Split Squats (Flat Side Up)
instructions: 1) Stand with one foot on the center of a BOSU ball, flat side up and the other foot in front of you on the ground.
2) Lower your body by bending your knees until your back knee is just above the ground.
3) Keep your front knee aligned with your ankle and your torso upright.
4) Push through your front heel to return to the starting position.
5) Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.
6) Focus on stability and balance throughout the movement.

en: 1) Stand with one foot on the center of a BOSU ball, flat side up and the other foot in front of you on the ground.
2) Lower your body by bending your knees until your back knee is just above the ground.
3) Keep your front knee aligned with your ankle and your torso upright.
4) Push through your front heel to return to the starting position.
5) Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.
6) Focus on stability and balance throughout the movement.
es: 1) Colócate con un pie en el centro de una pelota BOSU, con el lado plano hacia arriba y el otro pie frente a ti en el suelo.
2) Baja el cuerpo doblando las rodillas hasta que la rodilla trasera esté justo por encima del suelo.
3) Mantén la rodilla delantera alineada con el tobillo y el torso erguido.
4) Empuje con el talón delantero para volver a la posición inicial.
5) Repite durante el número deseado de repeticiones, luego cambie de pierna.
6) Centrarse en la estabilidad y el equilibrio durante todo el movimiento.

name: BOSU - Split Squats (On Dome)
instructions: 1) Place a BOSU ball with the dome side facing up.
2) Place the ball of one foot on the center of the dome behind you.
3) Step forward with your other foot, maintaining balance and stability.
4) Lower your body into a split squat position by bending your front knee, keeping your back knee slightly bent.
5) Pause briefly at the bottom, then push through your front heel to return to the starting position.
6) Repeat for the desired number of repetitions on one leg before switching to the other.
7) Focus on stability and control throughout the movement.
This exercise targets your legs and glutes while also challenging your balance.

es: 1) Coloca una bola BOSU con el lado del domo hacia arriba.
2) Coloca la punta de un pie en el centro de la cupula detrás de ti.
3) Da un paso adelante con el otro pie, manteniendo el equilibrio y la estabilidad.
4) Baja el cuerpo a una posición de sentadilla dividida doblando la rodilla delantera y manteniendo la rodilla trasera ligeramente doblada.
5) Haz una breve pausa en la parte inferior, luego empuje con el talón delantero para volver a la posición inicial.
6) Repite el número deseado de repeticiones en una pierna antes de cambiar a la otra.
7) Centrarse en la estabilidad y el control durante todo el movimiento.
Este ejercicio trabaja tus piernas y gluteos y al mismo tiempo desafía tu equilibrio.

name: BOSU - Lunges (Flat Side Up)
instructions: 1) Stand with the flat side of the BOSU facing up in front of you.
2) Step forward onto the BOSU with one foot.
3) Lower your body by bending both knees until your front thigh is parallel to the ground.
4) Push through your front heel to return to the starting position.
5) Repeat for required repetitions on the same leg.
6) Complete on the other leg.
7) Focus on stability and balance.
This exercise targets your legs and core.

es: 1) Colócate con el lado plano del BOSU hacia arriba frente a ti.
2) Avanza hacia el BOSU con un pie.
3) Baja el cuerpo doblando ambas rodillas hasta que el muslo delantero quede paralelo al suelo.
4) Empuje con el talón delantero para volver a la posición inicial.
5) Repite las repeticiones requeridas en la misma pierna.
6) Completar con la otra pierna.
7) Centrarse en la estabilidad y el equilibrio.
Este ejercicio trabaja las piernas y al core.

name: BOSU - Static Lunges (Flat Side Up)
instructions: 1) Stand on the flat side of a BOSU ball with one foot positioned in the center and the other foot extended behind you.
2) Lower your body into a lunge position, bending both knees until your front thigh is parallel to the ground.
3) Keep your back straight and core engaged throughout the movement.
4) Drive through the front heel to return to start position.
5) Repeat for required repetitions.
6) Repeat on the other side.
7) Focus on stability and balance while engaging your leg muscles.

es: 1) Colócate en el lado plano de una pelota BOSU con un pie colocado en el centro y el otro pie extendido detrás de ti.

5) Repite para las repeticiones requeridas.
6) Repetir del otro lado.
