name: BOSU - Side To Side Press Ups
instructions: To start this exercise kneel down on the floor, and lean forward so that you are now bearing weight on your arms. Have your hands placed where your chest would be on dome side. Now you should come up onto your feet so that your body is suspended above the floor, the only points of contact (with the floor) should be your feet and your hands on the BOSU. Your body should be in one straight line from head to toe and your arms perpendicular to the floor under your chest. This will be your starting position.
Place your right hand out to the right of the BOSU.

Pause for a brief moment, exhale and press through your palms to return your body along the same path to the starting position. Bring your right hand to the centre of the BOSU to meet the left and then place your left hand out to the left of the BOSU. Tip: Squeeze your pectoral muscles and triceps as you do so and when you get to the top of the movement, do not lock your elbows out.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Bench Press or Press Ups.

name.en: BOSU - Side To Side Press Ups

en: To start this exercise kneel down on the floor, and lean forward so that you are now bearing weight on your arms. Have your hands placed where your chest would be on dome side. Now you should come up onto your feet so that your body is suspended above the floor, the only points of contact (with the floor) should be your feet and your hands on the BOSU. Your body should be in one straight line from head to toe and your arms perpendicular to the floor under your chest. This will be your starting position.
Place your right hand out to the right of the BOSU.

Pause for a brief moment, exhale and press through your palms to return your body along the same path to the starting position. Bring your right hand to the centre of the BOSU to meet the left and then place your left hand out to the left of the BOSU. Tip: Squeeze your pectoral muscles and triceps as you do so and when you get to the top of the movement, do not lock your elbows out.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Bench Press or Press Ups.
es: Para comenzar este ejercicio, arrodíllate en el suelo e inclínate hacia adelante de modo que ahora soportes el peso sobre tus brazos. Coloca las manos donde estaría el pecho en el lado de la cupula. Ahora debes ponerte de pie para que tu cuerpo quede suspendido sobre el piso, los únicos puntos de contacto (con el piso) deben ser tus pies y tus manos sobre el BOSU. Su cuerpo debe estar en línea recta desde la cabeza hasta los pies y los brazos perpendiculares al suelo debajo de el pecho. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Coloca su mano derecha a la derecha del BOSU.

Haz una pausa por un breve momento, exhala y presione con las palmas de las manos para que el cuerpo vuelve por el mismo camino a la posición inicial. Lleve su mano derecha al centro del BOSU para encontrarse con la izquierda y luego coloca su mano izquierda a la izquierda del BOSU. Consejo: apriete los músculos pectorales y los triceps mientras lo hace y cuando llegue a la cima del movimiento, no bloquee los codos.
Repite el movimiento durante la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Press de banca o flexiones.

name: BOSU - Power Press Ups
instructions: To start this exercise kneel down on the floor, and lean forward so that you are now bearing weight on your arms. Have your hands placed on each side of the BOSU (flat side). Now you should come up onto your feet so that your body is suspended above the floor, the only points of contact (with the floor) should be your feet and your hands on the BOSU. Your body should be in one straight line from head to toe and your arms perpendicular to the floor under your chest. This will be your starting position.
Whilst inhaling, slowly lower your chest towards the ground whilst keeping your elbows by your side.
Exhale and explosively press hard enough through your palms to return your body not only along the same path but to enable you to lift the BOSU off the floor.
When your body weight is on its descent, land into the next repetition.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Bench Press or Press Ups.

en: To start this exercise kneel down on the floor, and lean forward so that you are now bearing weight on your arms. Have your hands placed on each side of the BOSU (flat side). Now you should come up onto your feet so that your body is suspended above the floor, the only points of contact (with the floor) should be your feet and your hands on the BOSU. Your body should be in one straight line from head to toe and your arms perpendicular to the floor under your chest. This will be your starting position.
Whilst inhaling, slowly lower your chest towards the ground whilst keeping your elbows by your side.
Exhale and explosively press hard enough through your palms to return your body not only along the same path but to enable you to lift the BOSU off the floor.
When your body weight is on its descent, land into the next repetition.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Bench Press or Press Ups.
es: Para comenzar este ejercicio, arrodíllate en el suelo e inclínate hacia adelante de modo que ahora soportes el peso sobre tus brazos. Coloca las manos a cada lado del BOSU (lado plano). Ahora debes ponerte de pie para que tu cuerpo quede suspendido sobre el piso, los únicos puntos de contacto (con el piso) deben ser tus pies y tus manos sobre el BOSU. Su cuerpo debe estar en línea recta desde la cabeza hasta los pies y los brazos perpendiculares al suelo debajo de el pecho. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Mientras inhala, baja lentamente el pecho hacia el suelo manteniendo los codos a los lados.
Exhala y presione explosivamente con suficiente fuerza a través de las palmas para que el cuerpo vuelve no solo por el mismo camino sino que le permite levantar el BOSU del suelo.
Cuando el peso de tu cuerpo esté descendiendo, aterriza en la siguiente repetición.
Repite el movimiento durante la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Press de banca o flexiones.

name: BOSU - Press Up Plank (Feet On)
instructions: To start this exercise kneel down on the floor, and lean forward so that you are now bearing weight on your arms. Have your hands placed just outside of where your chest would be. Now lift both feet up onto the BOSU (dome side) so that your body is suspended above the floor, the only points of contact (with the floor) should be your hands and your feet on the BOSU (dome side). Your body should be in one straight line from head to toe and your arms perpendicular to the floor under your chest. This will be your starting position.

Keep your abdominal muscles tight throughout this exercise and keep your pelvis in line with the rest of your body to minimise risk of injury to your lower back (you can elevate your pelvis slightly to reduce lower back pain).
Hold this position for as long as you can or for the recommended amount of time.
Variations: Plank.

Mantén los músculos abdominales tensos durante este ejercicio y mantén la pelvis alineada con el resto del cuerpo para minimizar el riesgo de lesiones en la zona lumbar (puedes elevar ligeramente la pelvis para reducir el dolor lumbar).
Mantén esta posición todo el tiempo que puedas o durante el tiempo recomendado.
Variaciones: Plancha.

name: BOSU - Plank (Forearms On)
instructions: Firstly, adopt an 'all-fours' position above on the floor. From here you will need to bend your elbows to a 90 degree angle and place your upper body weight onto your forearms on top of the BOSU (dome side). After you have done that, take a step backwards with your feet and place your remaining bodyweight through your toes. At this point your body should be suspended (in a straight line) above the floor with just your forearms and toes as points of contact. This will be your starting position.

Keep your abdominal muscles tight throughout this exercise and keep your pelvis in line with the rest of your body to minimise risk of injury to your lower back (you can elevate your pelvis slightly to reduce lower back pain).
Hold this position for as long as you can or for the recommended amount of time.
Variations: Plank.

en: Firstly, adopt an 'all-fours' position above on the floor. es: En primer lugar, adopte una posición "a cuatro patas" arriba del suelo. Desde aquí, deberá doblar los codos en un ángulo de 90 grados y colocar el peso de la parte superior del cuerpo sobre los antebrazos encima del BOSU (lado del domo). Una vez hecho esto, da un paso hacia atrás con los pies y coloca el peso corporal restante entre los dedos de los pies. En este punto, tu cuerpo debe estar suspendido (en línea recta) sobre el suelo con solo los antebrazos y los dedos de los pies como puntos de contacto. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Mantén los músculos abdominales tensos durante este ejercicio y mantén la pelvis alineada con el resto del cuerpo para minimizar el riesgo de lesiones en la zona lumbar (puedes elevar ligeramente la pelvis para reducir el dolor lumbar).
Mantén esta posición todo el tiempo que puedas o durante el tiempo recomendado.
Variaciones: Plancha.

name: Double Kettlebell Split Snatch
instructions: 1) Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand at arms length.
2) Swing the kettlebells through the legs and explosively push through your legs and hips to drive the kettlebells overhead, simultaneously splitting your stance so one foot is forward and one back.
3) Lower the kettlebells back down to shoulder height and return to the starting position.
4) Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
5) Focus on explosive power and stability throughout the movement.

en: 1) Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand at arms length.
2) Swing the kettlebells through the legs and explosively push through your legs and hips to drive the kettlebells overhead, simultaneously splitting your stance so one foot is forward and one back.
3) Lower the kettlebells back down to shoulder height and return to the starting position.
4) Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
5) Focus on explosive power and stability throughout the movement.
es: 1) Colócate con los pies separados a la altura de los hombros, sosteniendo una pesa rusa en cada mano con los brazos extendidos.

2) Balancee las kettlebells a través de las piernas y empújelas explosivamente a través de las piernas y las caderas para impulsar las kettlebells por encima de la cabeza, dividiendo simultáneamente su postura de modo que un pie esté hacia adelante y el otro hacia atrás.
3) Baja las kettlebells hasta la altura de los hombros y vuelve a la posición inicial.
4) Repite durante el número deseado de repeticiones.
5) Centrarse en el poder explosivo y la estabilidad durante todo el movimiento.

name: Facepulls
instructions: 1) Stand facing a cable machine with a rope attachment set up at shoulder height.
2) Grab the ends of the rope with an overhand grip.
3) Step back slightly and position your feet shoulder-width apart, knees slightly bent.
4) Pull the rope towards your face, keeping elbows up high and spreading it apart as you pull.
5)  Squeeze your shoulder blades together.
6) Pause briefly at the peak contraction, then slowly return to the starting position.
7) Keep your core engaged and maintain a tall posture throughout the movement.
8) Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
This exercise targets your rear deltoids and upper back muscles.

es: 1) Colócate frente a una máquina de polea con un accesorio de cuerda colocado a la altura de los hombros.
2) Agarre los extremos de la cuerda con un agarre por encima de la cabeza.
3) Retroceda un poco y coloca los pies separados a la altura de los hombros y las rodillas ligeramente flexionadas.
4) Tire de la cuerda hacia su cara, manteniendo los codos en alto y separándolos mientras tira.
5) Apriete los omóplatos.
6) Haz una breve pausa en el pico de contracción y luego vuelve lentamente a la posición inicial.
7) Mantén el core activo y mantén una postura erguida durante todo el movimiento.
8) Repite durante el número deseado de repeticiones.
Este ejercicio trabaja los deltoides posteriores y los músculos de la parte superior de la espalda.

name: Cable Squats
instructions: 1) Stand facing a cable machine set up with a low pulley.
2) Grab onto the rope attachment and have feet just wider than shoulder width, toes slightly turned out.
3) Lower into a squat, keeping your back straight and chest up.
4) Pause briefly at the bottom, then push through your heels and squeeze the glutes to return to the starting position.
5) Focus on keeping tension on the cable throughout the movement.
6) Repeat for desired reps.
This exercise targets your legs and glutes while also engaging your core for stability.

es: 1) Colócate frente a una máquina de polea montada con una polea baja.
2) Agarre el accesorio de cuerda y tenga los pies un poco más anchos que el ancho de los hombros, con los dedos ligeramente hacia afuera.
3) Baja hasta ponerse en cuclillas, manteniendo la espalda recta y el pecho hacia arriba.
4) Haz una breve pausa en la parte inferior, luego empuje los talones y apriete los gluteos para volver a la posición inicial.
5) Concéntrate en mantener la tensión del cable durante todo el movimiento.
6) Repite para las repeticiones deseadas.
Este ejercicio trabaja las piernas y los gluteos y al mismo tiempo involucra el core para lograr estabilidad.

name: Landmine V Bar Rows
instructions: 1) Stand with feet shoulder-width apart over a landmine facing away from the anchor point.
2) Hold onto a V bar attachment with a bent over position.
3) Keep your back straight, abs braced and chest up.
4) Pull the V-bar towards your lower chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together and drawing your elbows towards your hips.
5) Slowly lower the V-bar back to the starting position.
6) Repeat for desired reps.
7) Focus on controlled movements and engage your back muscles throughout.
This exercise targets your upper back and biceps.

5) Slowly lower the V-bar back to the starting position.
6) Repeat for desired reps.
7) Focus on controlled movements and engage your back muscles throughout.
This exercise targets your upper back and biceps.
es: 1) Colócate con los pies separados a la altura de los hombros sobre una mina terrestre de espaldas al punto de anclaje.
2) Sujete un accesorio de barra en V con una posición inclinada.
3) Mantén la espalda recta, los abdominales firmes y el pecho erguido.
4) Tire de la barra en V hacia la parte inferior del pecho, juntando los omóplatos y llevando los codos hacia las caderas.
5) Baja lentamente la barra en V hasta la posición inicial.
6) Repite para las repeticiones deseadas.
7) Concéntrate en movimientos controlados y active los músculos de la espalda en todo momento.
Este ejercicio trabaja la parte superior de la espalda y los biceps.

name: Glute Press Machine
instructions: 1) Stand with one leg straight and the other against the foot pad of the glute machine with your knee bent.
2) Lean forward and grasp the handles or bars for stability.
3) Extend the leg straight back, squeezing your glutes at the top.
4) Pause briefly, then return to the starting position.
5) Repeat for the desired number of repetitions on each leg.
Focus on controlled movements and squeezing your glutes at the top of the movement.

es: 1) Colócate con una pierna estirada y la otra contra la almohadilla para los pies de la maquina de gluteos con la rodilla doblada.
2) Inclínate hacia adelante y agarre las manijas o barras para lograr estabilidad.
3) Extiende la pierna hacia atrás, apretando los gluteos en la parte superior.
4) Haz una breve pausa y luego vuelve a la posición inicial.
5) Repite durante el número deseado de repeticiones en cada pierna.
Concéntrate en los movimientos controlados y en apretar los gluteos en la parte superior del movimiento.

name: Hack Squat Wide Stance
instructions: 1) Stand on the Hack Squat machine with your back against the pad and your feet nice and wide.
2) Place your feet higher on the platform with toes pointed slightly outward.
3) Grasp the handles and release the safety bars.
4) Lower your body by bending your knees until your thighs are parallel to the ground.
5) Push through your heels to return to the starting position.
6) Focus on maintaining proper form and engaging your leg muscles throughout the movement.

2) Place your feet higher on the platform with toes pointed slightly outward.
3) Grasp the handles and release the safety bars.

5) Push through your heels to return to the starting position.
6) Focus on maintaining proper form and engaging your leg muscles throughout the movement.
es: 1) Colócate en la maquina Hack Squat con la espalda apoyada en la almohadilla y los pies bien abiertos.
2) Coloca los pies más arriba en la plataforma con los dedos apuntando ligeramente hacia afuera.
3) Agarre las manijas y suelte las barras de seguridad.
4) Baja el cuerpo doblando las rodillas hasta que los muslos queden paralelos al suelo.
5) Empuja con los talones para volver a la posición inicial.
6) Concéntrate en mantener la técnica correcta y en activar los músculos de las piernas durante todo el movimiento.

name: Kettlebell Swings
instructions: 1) Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell with both hands in front of you.
2) Hinge at your hips and slightly bend your knees while keeping your back straight.
3) Swing the kettlebell between your legs, then explosively thrust your hips forward and squeeze your glutes to swing it up to chest level.
4) Control the descent and repeat the movement for the desired number of repetitions.
5) Focus on using your hips to generate momentum and keep your core engaged throughout the exercise.

en: 1) Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell with both hands in front of you.
2) Hinge at your hips and slightly bend your knees while keeping your back straight.
3) Swing the kettlebell between your legs, then explosively thrust your hips forward and squeeze your glutes to swing it up to chest level.
4) Control the descent and repeat the movement for the desired number of repetitions.
5) Focus on using your hips to generate momentum and keep your core engaged throughout the exercise.
es: 1) Colócate con los pies separados a la altura de los hombros y sostenga una pesa rusa con ambas manos frente a ti.
2) Doble las caderas y doble ligeramente las rodillas mientras mantiene la espalda recta.
3) Balancee la pesa rusa entre las piernas, luego empuje explosivamente las caderas hacia adelante y apriete sus gluteos para balancearla hasta el nivel del pecho.
4) Controlar el descenso y repetir el movimiento el número de repeticiones deseado.
5) Concéntrate en usar tus caderas para generar impulso y mantener tu core comprometido durante todo el ejercicio.

name: Cable Front Squats
instructions: 1) Stand facing a cable machine with a small bar attachment on a low pulley.
2) Grab the handle with an overhand grip, palms facing the ceiling in a clean positions and step back to create tension in the cable.
3) Keep the bar close to the chest and elbows lifted.
4) Position your feet shoulder-width apart with toes slightly turned out.
5) Lower into a squat, keeping your chest up and knees tracking over your toes.
6) Pause briefly at the bottom, then push through your heels and squeeze the glutes to return to the starting position.
7) Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
8) Focus on maintaining proper form and control throughout the exercise.
Cable front squats target your quads, glutes, and core muscles.

es: 1) Colócate frente a una máquina de polea con un pequeño accesorio de barra en una polea baja.
2) Agarre el mango con un agarre por encima de la cabeza, con las palmas hacia el techo en posiciones limpias y retroceda para crear tensión en el cable.
3) Mantén la barra cerca del pecho y los codos levantados.
4) Coloca los pies separados a la altura de los hombros y con los dedos ligeramente hacia afuera.
5) Baja hasta ponerse en cuclillas, manteniendo el pecho erguido y las rodillas sobre los dedos de los pies.
6) Haz una breve pausa en la parte inferior, luego empuje los talones y apriete los gluteos para volver a la posición inicial.
7) Repite durante el número deseado de repeticiones.
8) Concéntrate en mantener la forma y el control adecuados durante todo el ejercicio.
Las sentadillas frontales con cable apuntan a los cuadriceps, los gluteos y los core.

name: alternating barbell curtsy squats
instructions: 1) Stand with your feet hip-width apart, holding a barbell across your shoulders.
2) Step one foot diagonally behind and across the opposite leg, bending both knees into a curtsy position.
3) Push through your front heel to return to standing, then alternate sides.
4) Keep your chest up and core engaged throughout.
5) Repeat for desired repetitions. This exercise targets your glutes and legs.

name.es: Sentadillas de reverencia alternas con barra

en: 1) Stand with your feet hip-width apart, holding a barbell across your shoulders.
2) Step one foot diagonally behind and across the opposite leg, bending both knees into a curtsy position.
3) Push through your front heel to return to standing, then alternate sides.
4) Keep your chest up and core engaged throughout.
5) Repeat for desired repetitions. This exercise targets your glutes and legs.
es: 1) Colócate con los pies separados a la altura de las caderas y sostenga una barra sobre los hombros.
2) Pase un pie en diagonal detrás y a través de la pierna opuesta, doblando ambas rodillas en posición de reverencia.
3) Empuje con el talón delantero para volver a ponerse de pie, luego alterne los lados.
4) Mantén el pecho erguido y el core activo en todo momento.
5) Repite para las repeticiones deseadas. Este ejercicio trabaja tus gluteos y piernas.

name: Barbell Squats (Low Bar)
instructions: 1) Position a barbell across your upper back, resting it below your neck on your traps.
2) Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointed slightly outward.
3) Brace your core and squat down by bending your knees and hips, keeping your back straight.
4) Lower until your thighs are parallel to the ground, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
5) Keep your chest up and back straight throughout the movement.
6) Repeat for desired reps, focusing on proper form and control.

es: 1) Coloca una barra en la parte superior de la espalda, apoyándola debajo del cuello sobre los trapecios.
2) Colócate con los pies separados a la altura de los hombros y los dedos apuntando ligeramente hacia afuera.
3) Apoye su core y agáchese doblando las rodillas y las caderas, manteniendo la espalda recta.
4) Baja hasta que sus muslos queden paralelos al suelo, luego empuje con los talones para volver a la posición inicial.
5) Mantén el pecho erguido y la espalda recta durante todo el movimiento.
6) Repite para las repeticiones deseadas, concentrándose en la forma y el control adecuados.

name: Dumbbell Romanian Deadlifts
instructions: 1) Stand with feet hip-width apart, holding dumbbells in front of thighs.
2) Hinge at hips with a slight bend in the knees, keeping back straight, and lower dumbbells towards shins.
3) Pause when you feel a stretch in hamstrings, then drive through the heels and return to standing position squeezing the glutes.
4) Keep core engaged throughout.
This exercise targets hamstrings and lower back.

es: 1) Colócate con los pies separados a la altura de las caderas, sosteniendo las mancuernas frente a los muslos.
2) Gire las caderas con una ligera flexión de las rodillas, mantén la espalda recta y baja las mancuernas hacia las espinillas.
3) Haz una pausa cuando sienta un estiramiento en los isquiosurales, luego impulse los talones y vuelve a la posición de pie apretando los gluteos.
4) Mantén el core comprometido en todo momento.
Este ejercicio trabaja los isquiosurales y la espalda baja.

name: Press Ups
instructions: To start this exercise kneel down on the floor, and lean forward so that you are now weight baring on your arms. Have your hands placed just outside of where your chest would be. Now you should come up onto your feet so that your body is suspended above the floor, the only points of contact (with the floor) should be your hands and feet. Your body should be in one straight line from head to toe and your arms perpendicular to the floor under your chest. This will be your starting position.

Whilst inhaling, slowly lower your chest towards the ground whist flaring your elbows out wide. When you are about an inch or so from the ground, you should have created a triangle with your hand positions and your eye line.

Pause for a brief movement, exhale and press through your palms to return your body along the same path to the starting position. Tip: Squeeze your pectoral muscles as you do so and when you get to the top of the movement, do not lock your elbows out.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Bench Press or Dumbbell Chest Press.

es: Para comenzar este ejercicio, arrodíllate en el suelo e inclínate hacia adelante de modo que ahora quedes con el peso al descubierto en tus brazos. Coloca las manos justo afuera de donde estaría el pecho. Ahora debes ponerte de pie de manera que tu cuerpo quede suspendido sobre el suelo, los únicos puntos de contacto (con el suelo) deben ser tus manos y pies. Su cuerpo debe estar en línea recta desde la cabeza hasta los pies y los brazos perpendiculares al suelo debajo de el pecho. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Mientras inhala, baja lentamente el pecho hacia el suelo mientras abre los codos. Cuando esté aproximadamente a una pulgada del suelo, debería haber creado un triángulo con las posiciones de las manos y la línea de sus ojos.

Haz una pausa para un breve movimiento, exhala y presione con las palmas para que el cuerpo vuelve por el mismo camino a la posición inicial. Consejo: apriete los músculos pectorales mientras lo hace y cuando llegue a la cima del movimiento, no bloquee los codos.
Repite el movimiento durante la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Press de banca o Press de pecho con mancuernas.

name: Seated Hammer Curls
instructions: Grab two dumbbells and take a seat on a bench which is just off vertical (70-80 degrees), and allow your arms to hang by your sides, perpendicular to the floor.
The palms of your hands should be facing each other. This will be your starting position. Tip: Throughout this movement your elbows should stay pinned to the sides of your torso.

Whilst holding the upper arm stationary, exhale as you curl both the dumbbells upward, contracting your biceps. Continue the movement until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a second as you squeeze your biceps. (Tip: Only the forearms should move.)
Inhale as you slowly begin to bring the dumbbells back along the same path, down to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Seated Hammer Curls or Cable Curls.

Continue the movement until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a second as you squeeze your biceps. (Tip: Only the forearms should move.)
Inhale as you slowly begin to bring the dumbbells back along the same path, down to the starting position.

es: Toma dos mancuernas y siéntate en un banco que esté justo fuera de la vertical (70-80 grados) y deje que los brazos cuelguen a los lados, perpendiculares al piso.
Las palmas de tus manos deben estar enfrentadas. Esta será tu posición inicial. Consejo: durante todo este movimiento, los codos deben permanecer inmovilizados a los lados del torso.

Mientras mantienes inmóvil la parte superior del brazo, exhala mientras flexionas ambas mancuernas hacia arriba, contrayendo los biceps. Continúa el movimiento hasta que tus biceps estén completamente contraídos y las mancuernas a la altura de los hombros. Mantén la posición contraída por un segundo mientras aprietas los biceps. (Consejo: sólo deben moverse los antebrazos).
Inhala mientras comienzas a llevar lentamente las mancuernas por el mismo camino, hasta la posición inicial.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Curl de martillo sentado o Curl de cable.

name: Kettlebell Jump Squats
instructions: Grab two kettlebells and stand with a shoulder width stance, toes pointing slightly outward (palms facing the side of your legs).
Throughout the movement you should keep your head up and maintain a stright back. This will be your starting position.

Inhale and descend slowly by bending your knees until your thighs are parallel with the floor. Keep a straight back so that your posture is not compromised. Tip: When at the bottom of the movement your knees should be behind your toes.

Once you have hit the bottom of the movement, exhale and push hard through your heels to drive your hips forward. Extend at your knee and ankle joints in order to jump as high as you can before landing into your next rep.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: Always be aware of your posture with this exercise as if performed incorrectly, could cause injury.
Variations: Dumbbell Jump Squats or Barbell Jump Squats.

en: Grab two kettlebells and stand with a shoulder width stance, toes pointing slightly outward (palms facing the side of your legs).

Once you have hit the bottom of the movement, exhale and push hard through your heels to drive your hips forward. Extend at your knee and ankle joints in order to jump as high as you can before landing into your next rep.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: Always be aware of your posture with this exercise as if performed incorrectly, could cause injury.
Variations: Dumbbell Jump Squats or Barbell Jump Squats.
es: Toma dos kettlebells y colócate con una postura a la altura de los hombros, con los dedos de los pies apuntando ligeramente hacia afuera (con las palmas hacia los costados de las piernas).
Durante todo el movimiento debes mantener la cabeza erguida y la espalda erguida. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Inhala y desciende lentamente doblando las rodillas hasta que tus muslos queden paralelos al suelo. Mantén la espalda recta para que su postura no se vea comprometida. Consejo: cuando estés en la parte inferior del movimiento, tus rodillas deben estar detrás de los dedos de los pies.

Una vez que hayas llegado al final del movimiento, exhala y empuja con fuerza los talones para impulsar las caderas hacia adelante. Extiende las articulaciones de la rodilla y el tobillo para saltar lo más alto que puedas antes de aterrizar en tu siguiente repetición.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Precaución: Esté siempre consciente de su postura al realizar este ejercicio, ya que, si se realiza incorrectamente, podría causar lesiones.
Variaciones: sentadillas con salto con mancuernas o sentadillas con salto con barra.

name: Cable 21's
instructions: Grab a low cable with the bar attachment on and take an underhand grip (palms facing forward). Allow your arms the hang perpendicular to the floor and adopt a standing position with a shoulder width stance and a straight back. Keep your elbows pinned in close to your torso for the duration of the exercise. Tip: Only your forearms should move and your torso remain rigid. If you are struggling with balance, split your stance so you have one foot in front of the other. This will be your starting position.

This exercise is split up into 3 different elements. The bottom half, top half and a full range bicep curl. Firstly, whilst keeping your upper arms stationary, curl the bar upward towards your shoulders by flexing your biceps. Exhale as you do so but stop once you get half way. Return the bar along the same path back to the starting position as you inhale.

After 7 repetitions, curl the bar up to your shoulders and perform the top half of your curls. In order to do so, lower the bar whilst inhaling but stop once your elbows are at 90 degrees. Exhale and curl the bar back along the same path to the starting position (shoulders).

After 7 repetitions, Lower the bar all the way until your arms are straight. Once you are here, perform 7 full range repetitions. In order to do so, curl the bar up to your shoulders on an arced path, keeping your elbows pinned to your torso, exhaling as you go. Once you have paused for a brief moment and squeezed your biceps, return the bar along the same path back into the starting position.
Variations: Dumbbell 21's or EZ Bar 21's.

en: Grab a low cable with the bar attachment on and take an underhand grip (palms facing forward). Allow your arms the hang perpendicular to the floor and adopt a standing position with a shoulder width stance and a straight back. Keep your elbows pinned in close to your torso for the duration of the exercise. Tip: Only your forearms should move and your torso remain rigid. If you are struggling with balance, split your stance so you have one foot in front of the other. This will be your starting position.

This exercise is split up into 3 different elements. The bottom half, top half and a full range bicep curl. Firstly, whilst keeping your upper arms stationary, curl the bar upward towards your shoulders by flexing your biceps. Exhale as you do so but stop once you get half way. Return the bar along the same path back to the starting position as you inhale.

After 7 repetitions, curl the bar up to your shoulders and perform the top half of your curls. In order to do so, lower the bar whilst inhaling but stop once your elbows are at 90 degrees. Exhale and curl the bar back along the same path to the starting position (shoulders).

After 7 repetitions, Lower the bar all the way until your arms are straight. Once you are here, perform 7 full range repetitions. In order to do so, curl the bar up to your shoulders on an arced path, keeping your elbows pinned to your torso, exhaling as you go. Once you have paused for a brief moment and squeezed your biceps, return the bar along the same path back into the starting position.
Variations: Dumbbell 21's or EZ Bar 21's.
es: Agarre un cable bajo con el accesorio de barra puesto y sujételo por debajo (con las palmas hacia adelante). Deje que los brazos cuelguen perpendiculares al piso y adopte una posición de pie con una postura a la altura de los hombros y la espalda recta. Mantén los codos inmovilizados cerca del torso durante todo el ejercicio. Consejo: Sólo deben moverse tus antebrazos y tu torso permanecer rígido. Si tiene dificultades con el equilibrio, divida su postura para tener un pie delante del otro. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Este ejercicio se divide en 3 elementos diferentes. La mitad inferior, la mitad superior y una flexión de biceps de rango completo. En primer lugar, mientras mantienes la parte superior de los brazos inmóviles, flexiona la barra hacia los hombros flexionando los biceps. Exhala mientras lo haces, pero detente una vez que llegues a la mitad del camino. Vuelve la barra por el mismo camino hasta la posición inicial mientras inhala.

Después de 7 repeticiones, doble la barra hasta los hombros y realiza la mitad superior de los curl. Para hacerlo, baja la barra mientras inhala, pero deténgase una vez que los codos estén a 90 grados. Exhala y flexiona la barra hacia atrás por el mismo camino hasta la posición inicial (hombros).

Después de 7 repeticiones, baja la barra completamente hasta que tus brazos estén rectos. Una vez que estés aquí, realiza 7 repeticiones de rango completo. Para hacerlo, doble la barra hasta los hombros formando un arco, manteniendo los codos pegados al torso y exhalando a medida que avanza. Una vez que hayas hecho una breve pausa y hayas apretado los biceps, regresa la barra por el mismo camino hasta la posición inicial.
Variaciones: Dumbbell 21's o 21 con barra Z.

name: Tricep Extension (Rope)
instructions: Place a rope attachment on to a high cable pulley, adopt a neutral grip (palms facing each other) and stand 12 inches away from the machine. Once you have taken hold of the rope, bring your elbows in to the sides of your torso and keep them pinned in place. This is your starting position.
As you exhale, push the rope towards the floor and split your little fingers as much as possible until your elbows are fully extended.
At this position you should squeeze your triceps and pause for a second.
Then, as you inhale, reverse the movement until your elbows are flexed at 90 degrees and you have returned to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Tricep Press Down Machine or Dumbbell Tricep Kickbacks.

en: Place a rope attachment on to a high cable pulley, adopt a neutral grip (palms facing each other) and stand 12 inches away from the machine. Once you have taken hold of the rope, bring your elbows in to the sides of your torso and keep them pinned in place. This is your starting position.
As you exhale, push the rope towards the floor and split your little fingers as much as possible until your elbows are fully extended.
At this position you should squeeze your triceps and pause for a second.
Then, as you inhale, reverse the movement until your elbows are flexed at 90 degrees and you have returned to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Tricep Press Down Machine or Dumbbell Tricep Kickbacks.
es: Coloca un accesorio de cuerda en una polea de cable alta, adopte un agarre neutral (con las palmas una frente a la otra) y colócate a 12 pulgadas de distancia de la maquina. Una vez que hayas agarrado la cuerda, lleva los codos a los lados del torso y mantenlos inmovilizados en su lugar. Esta es tu posición inicial.
Mientras exhalas, empuja la cuerda hacia el suelo y separa los deditos tanto como puedas hasta que los codos estén completamente extendidos.
En esta posición debes apretar los triceps y hacer una pausa por un segundo.
Luego, mientras inhalas, invierte el movimiento hasta que tus codos estén flexionados a 90 grados y hayas regresado a la posición inicial.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: maquina de press de triceps hacia abajo o patadas de triceps con mancuernas.

name: Seated Dumbbell Shoulder Press
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and take a seat on a bench just off vertical (around 70-80 degrees). Press the dumbbells above your head so that you arms are fully extended, yet slightly flexed/bent at your elbows. Make sure your palms are facing forward at this point. This will be your starting position.

Slowly and in a controlled fashion, descend the dumbbells until they reach the side of your head (parallel with your ears), creating a 90 degree angle at your elbows. Inhale on the downward motion and flare your elbows out wide.
After a brief pause, exhale and press the dumbbells back along this path to their starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Standing Dumbbell Shoulder Press or Cable Shoulder Press.

name.es: Press de hombros sentado con mancuernas

en: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and take a seat on a bench just off vertical (around 70-80 degrees). Press the dumbbells above your head so that you arms are fully extended, yet slightly flexed/bent at your elbows. Make sure your palms are facing forward at this point. This will be your starting position.

Slowly and in a controlled fashion, descend the dumbbells until they reach the side of your head (parallel with your ears), creating a 90 degree angle at your elbows. Inhale on the downward motion and flare your elbows out wide.
After a brief pause, exhale and press the dumbbells back along this path to their starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Standing Dumbbell Shoulder Press or Cable Shoulder Press.
es: Toma una mancuerna en cada mano y siéntate en un banco justo fuera de la vertical (alrededor de 70 a 80 grados). Presione las mancuernas sobre la cabeza para que los brazos estén completamente extendidos, pero ligeramente flexionados/doblados a la altura de los codos. Asegúrate de que sus palmas estén mirando hacia adelante en este punto. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Lentamente y de forma controlada, desciende las mancuernas hasta llegar al costado de tu cabeza (paralelo a tus orejas), creando un ángulo de 90 grados en tus codos. Inhala con el movimiento hacia abajo y abra bien los codos.
Después de una breve pausa, exhala y empuja las mancuernas hacia atrás a lo largo de este camino hasta su posición inicial.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Press de hombros con mancuernas de pie o Press de hombros con cable.

name: Plyo Lunges
instructions: Take a step forward (slightly larger than a normal step) and as you land, drop your body down so that you create two right angles at your knees. Inhale as you do so whilst maintaining a straight torso.
Make sure that you keep your front knee over your heel and not over your toes. Your front shin should now be perpendicular to the floor.

As you exhale, you need to direct force through your quadriceps and glutes in order to drive your body upward and into a jumping motion. As you leave the floor you will reverse your stance by bringing your back leg forward and your front leg back.
As you land, you land into the next repetition by bending at your knees and hips to create right angles at the joints of your front leg, inhale as you do so.
Alternate in this manner and repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dumbbell Walking Lunges or Barbell Lunges.

en: Take a step forward (slightly larger than a normal step) and as you land, drop your body down so that you create two right angles at your knees. Inhale as you do so whilst maintaining a straight torso.
Make sure that you keep your front knee over your heel and not over your toes. Your front shin should now be perpendicular to the floor.

As you exhale, you need to direct force through your quadriceps and glutes in order to drive your body upward and into a jumping motion. As you leave the floor you will reverse your stance by bringing your back leg forward and your front leg back.
As you land, you land into the next repetition by bending at your knees and hips to create right angles at the joints of your front leg, inhale as you do so.
Alternate in this manner and repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dumbbell Walking Lunges or Barbell Lunges.
es: Da un paso hacia adelante (un poco más grande que un paso normal) y, cuando aterrices, deja caer el cuerpo para crear dos ángulos rectos en las rodillas. Inhala mientras lo haces manteniendo el torso recto.
Asegúrate de mantener la rodilla delantera sobre el talón y no sobre los dedos de los pies. Tu espinilla delantera ahora debería estar perpendicular al suelo.

Mientras exhalas, debes dirigir la fuerza a través de los cuadriceps y los gluteos para impulsar tu cuerpo hacia arriba y realizar un movimiento de salto. Al levantarte del suelo, invertirás tu postura llevando la pierna trasera hacia adelante y la pierna delantera hacia atrás.
A medida que aterrizas, aterrizas en la siguiente repetición doblando las rodillas y las caderas para crear ángulos rectos en las articulaciones de la pierna delantera, inhala mientras lo haces.
Alterne de esta manera y repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: zancadas caminando con mancuernas o zancadas con barra.

name: High Knees
instructions: Stand upright with your arms beside your torso and adopt a shoulder width stance. This will be your starting position.
Inhale and lift your left leg up infront of you until your knee and hip joints are at 90 degrees. Then have your right arm bent at a 90 degree position at your elbow.
Exhale and swap your left leg for your right and your right arm for your left.
Continue to elevate your knees in alternating fashion whilst swapping your arms over so they are always opposing your legs. Tip: Take shallow breaths whilst you are performing the movement.
Alternate as fast as you can to simulate a running motion but standing still. The higher you can get your knees, the better!
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variation: Ab Bike or Mountain Climbers.

en: Stand upright with your arms beside your torso and adopt a shoulder width stance. This will be your starting position.
Inhale and lift your left leg up infront of you until your knee and hip joints are at 90 degrees. Then have your right arm bent at a 90 degree position at your elbow.
Exhale and swap your left leg for your right and your right arm for your left.
Continue to elevate your knees in alternating fashion whilst swapping your arms over so they are always opposing your legs. Tip: Take shallow breaths whilst you are performing the movement.
Alternate as fast as you can to simulate a running motion but standing still. The higher you can get your knees, the better!
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variation: Ab Bike or Mountain Climbers.
es: Colócate erguido con los brazos al lado del torso y adopte una postura a la altura de los hombros. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Inhala y levanta la pierna izquierda frente a ti hasta que las articulaciones de la rodilla y la cadera estén a 90 grados. Luego doble el brazo derecho en una posición de 90 grados a la altura del codo.
Exhala y cambia tu pierna izquierda por la derecha y tu brazo derecho por el izquierdo.
Continúa elevando las rodillas de forma alterna mientras cambia los brazos para que siempre estén opuestos a las piernas. Consejo: respira superficialmente mientras realiza el movimiento.
Alterne lo más rápido que puedas para simular un movimiento de carrera pero de pie. ¡Cuanto más arriba puedas poner las rodillas, mejor!
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variación: Ab Bike o Mountain Climbers.

name: Squat Jumps
instructions: Adopt a standing, shoulder width stance with your toes pointing slightly outward. Allow your arms to hang comfortably by your sides at this point. Throughout the movement you should keep your head up and maintain a straight back. This will be your starting position.

Inhale and descend slowly by bending your knees until your thighs are parallel with the floor. Keep a straight back so that your posture is not compromised. Bring your arms out in front of you so that they are also parallel to the floor at this point. Tip: When at the bottom of the movement your knees should be behind your toes.

Once you have hit the bottom of the movement, exhale and push hard through your heels to drive your hips forward. As you extend at your knee and ankle joints in order to jump as high as you can, pull your arms down towards the sides of your torso at the top of the jump (this will help to generate more height), before landing into your next rep.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: Always be aware of your posture with this exercise as if performed incorrectly, could cause injury.
Variations: Kettlebell Jump Squats or Dumbbell Jump Squats.

en: Adopt a standing, shoulder width stance with your toes pointing slightly outward. Allow your arms to hang comfortably by your sides at this point. Throughout the movement you should keep your head up and maintain a straight back. This will be your starting position.

Inhale and descend slowly by bending your knees until your thighs are parallel with the floor. Keep a straight back so that your posture is not compromised. Bring your arms out in front of you so that they are also parallel to the floor at this point. Tip: When at the bottom of the movement your knees should be behind your toes.

Once you have hit the bottom of the movement, exhale and push hard through your heels to drive your hips forward. As you extend at your knee and ankle joints in order to jump as high as you can, pull your arms down towards the sides of your torso at the top of the jump (this will help to generate more height), before landing into your next rep.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: Always be aware of your posture with this exercise as if performed incorrectly, could cause injury.
Variations: Kettlebell Jump Squats or Dumbbell Jump Squats.
es: Adopt a standing, shoulder width stance with your toes pointing slightly outward. En este punto, permite que los brazos cuelguen cómodamente a los costados. Durante todo el movimiento debes mantener la cabeza erguida y mantener la espalda recta. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Inhala y desciende lentamente doblando las rodillas hasta que tus muslos queden paralelos al suelo. Mantén la espalda recta para que su postura no se vea comprometida. Extienda los brazos frente a ti para que también queden paralelos al suelo en este punto. Consejo: cuando estés en la parte inferior del movimiento, tus rodillas deben estar detrás de los dedos de los pies.

Una vez que hayas llegado al final del movimiento, exhala y empuja con fuerza los talones para impulsar las caderas hacia adelante. Mientras extiendes las articulaciones de la rodilla y el tobillo para saltar lo más alto que puedas, baja los brazos hacia los lados del torso en la parte superior del salto (esto ayudará a generar más altura), antes de aterrizar en tu siguiente repetición.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Precaución: Esté siempre consciente de su postura al realizar este ejercicio, ya que, si se realiza incorrectamente, podría causar lesiones.
Variaciones: sentadillas con salto con kettlebells o sentadillas con salto con mancuernas.

name: Box Jumps
instructions: Set up a box/step/bench in front of you at the desired height. Stand upright with your arms beside your torso and adopt a shoulder width stance. This will be your starting position.

Inhale and descend into a squat position by bending at your knees and hips. Once your hips are at 90 degrees, exhale and press through your feet explosively using your thigh and glute muscles in order to generate enough power to jump up and onto the box/step/bench infront of you.
When you land on the platform, bend at your knee and hip joints once more and extend upward into a standing position.
Inhale and step back off the box/step/bench back into your starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Barbell Step Ups or Dumbbell Step Ups.

en: Set up a box/step/bench in front of you at the desired height. Stand upright with your arms beside your torso and adopt a shoulder width stance. This will be your starting position.

Inhale and descend into a squat position by bending at your knees and hips. Once your hips are at 90 degrees, exhale and press through your feet explosively using your thigh and glute muscles in order to generate enough power to jump up and onto the box/step/bench infront of you.
When you land on the platform, bend at your knee and hip joints once more and extend upward into a standing position.
Inhale and step back off the box/step/bench back into your starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Barbell Step Ups or Dumbbell Step Ups.
es: Coloca una caja/escalón/banco frente a ti a la altura deseada. Colócate erguido con los brazos al lado del torso y adopte una postura a la altura de los hombros. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Inhala y descienda hasta ponerse en cuclillas doblando las rodillas y las caderas. Una vez que las caderas estén a 90 grados, exhala y presione explosivamente a través de los pies usando los músculos de los muslos y los gluteos para generar suficiente potencia para saltar hacia la caja/escalón/banco frente a ti.
Cuando aterrice en la plataforma, doble las articulaciones de la rodilla y la cadera una vez más y extiéndase hacia arriba hasta quedar de pie.
Inhala y retroceda de la caja/escalón/banco a su posición inicial.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Step Ups con barra o Step Ups con mancuernas.

name: Burpees
instructions: Stand upright with your arms beside your torso and adopt a shoulder width stance. This will be your starting position.

Inhale and descend into a press up position. Place your hands just wider than shoulder width and jump backward with your feet so that your legs are fully extended and your body is supported by your toes and hands.
Continue to drop your torso downward towards the floor by bending at your elbows until your chest is only a few inches away.

Once you get to this point, exhale and aggressively press through your hands by extending your elbow joints and create enough upward motion to be able to jump your legs back underneath your body so that when you take your hands off the floor, you should be in the bottom of a squat.

Now, press through the middle of your feet by using your thighs and glutes, extending at both your knee and hip joints to generate power for a jumping motion (you can use your arms at this point to emphasise lift).
As you land, inhale and go straight into the next repetition.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

en: Stand upright with your arms beside your torso and adopt a shoulder width stance. This will be your starting position.

Inhale and descend into a press up position. Place your hands just wider than shoulder width and jump backward with your feet so that your legs are fully extended and your body is supported by your toes and hands.
Continue to drop your torso downward towards the floor by bending at your elbows until your chest is only a few inches away.

Once you get to this point, exhale and aggressively press through your hands by extending your elbow joints and create enough upward motion to be able to jump your legs back underneath your body so that when you take your hands off the floor, you should be in the bottom of a squat.

Now, press through the middle of your feet by using your thighs and glutes, extending at both your knee and hip joints to generate power for a jumping motion (you can use your arms at this point to emphasise lift).
As you land, inhale and go straight into the next repetition.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
es: Colócate erguido con los brazos al lado del torso y adopte una postura a la altura de los hombros. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Inhala y desciende a una posición de flexión hacia arriba. Coloca las manos un poco más anchas que el ancho de los hombros y salte hacia atrás con los pies para que las piernas estén completamente extendidas y el cuerpo quede sostenido por los dedos de los pies y las manos.
Continúa bajando el torso hacia el suelo doblando los codos hasta que el pecho esté a sólo unos centímetros de distancia.

Una vez que llegue a este punto, exhala y presione agresivamente con las manos extendiendo las articulaciones de los codos y cree suficiente movimiento hacia arriba para poder saltar con las piernas hacia atrás debajo del cuerpo, de modo que cuando retire las manos del suelo, esté en la parte inferior de una sentadilla.

Ahora, presione desde la mitad de los pies usando los muslos y los gluteos, extendiendo las articulaciones de la rodilla y la cadera para generar energía para un movimiento de salto (puedes usar los brazos en este punto para enfatizar la elevación).
Al aterrizar, inhala y pasa directamente a la siguiente repetición.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.

name: Drag Dumbbell Bicep Curl
instructions: Grab two dumbbells with a supinated grip (palms facing forward), elbows close to your torso and your arms at full extension. This will be your starting position.
As you exhale, curl the dumbbells up whilst dragging your elbows backwards until you can contract your biceps no more. Tip: Try to stop your shoulders from lifting.
Pause at this contracted position for a second before returning the dumbbells along the same plane to the starting point. Be sure to inhale as you perform this section of the movement.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variation: Barbell Curl.

name.es: Curl de biceps con mancuernas con arrastre

en: Grab two dumbbells with a supinated grip (palms facing forward), elbows close to your torso and your arms at full extension. This will be your starting position.
As you exhale, curl the dumbbells up whilst dragging your elbows backwards until you can contract your biceps no more. Tip: Try to stop your shoulders from lifting.
Pause at this contracted position for a second before returning the dumbbells along the same plane to the starting point. Be sure to inhale as you perform this section of the movement.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variation: Barbell Curl.
es: Agarre dos mancuernas con un agarre supinado (las palmas mirando hacia adelante), los codos cerca del torso y los brazos en extensión completa. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Mientras exhalas, flexiona las mancuernas hacia arriba mientras arrastras los codos hacia atrás hasta que no puedas contraer más los biceps. Consejo: intente evitar que los hombros se levantan.

Haz una pausa en esta posición contraída durante un segundo antes de devolver las mancuernas a lo largo del mismo plano hasta el punto inicial. Asegúrate de inhalar mientras realiza esta sección del movimiento.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variación: Curl con barra.

name: Pull Ups (Neutral Grip)
instructions: Take hold of the pull up bars with a neutral grip (hands should be facing each other).
Both arms should be extended as you create a small curvature in your back and push your chest out. This will be your starting position.

Now, exhale and pull your torso up until your head is at least level with your hands. Concentrate on squeezing your shoulder blades back and down (through your lats) as you reach the fully contracted position.

After a brief pause at the contracted position, inhale as you slowly return your torso to the starting position. Track the same path down as you did up. You are at the starting position when your lats are fully stretched.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variation: Wide Grip Pull Ups.

en: Take hold of the pull up bars with a neutral grip (hands should be facing each other).
Both arms should be extended as you create a small curvature in your back and push your chest out. This will be your starting position.

Now, exhale and pull your torso up until your head is at least level with your hands. Concentrate on squeezing your shoulder blades back and down (through your lats) as you reach the fully contracted position.

After a brief pause at the contracted position, inhale as you slowly return your torso to the starting position. Track the same path down as you did up. You are at the starting position when your lats are fully stretched.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variation: Wide Grip Pull Ups.
es: Sujete las barras de dominadas con un agarre neutral (las manos deben estar una frente a la otra).
Ambos brazos deben estar extendidos mientras creas una pequeña curvatura en la espalda y empujas el pecho hacia afuera. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Ahora, exhala y levanta el torso hasta que tu cabeza esté al menos al nivel de tus manos. Concéntrate en apretar los omóplatos hacia atrás y hacia abajo (a través de los dorsales) a medida que alcanza la posición completamente contraída.

Después de una breve pausa en la posición contraída, inhala mientras regresas lentamente el torso a la posición inicial. Siga el mismo camino hacia abajo que hacia arriba. Estás en la posición inicial cuando tus dorsales están completamente estirados.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variación: Pull Ups con agarre ancho.

name: Leverage Iso Row (Single Arm)
instructions: Load up the recommended weight onto the machine and adjust the height of the seat so that the handles are at chest level. Grab one of the handles with either a neutral or pronated (palms facing down) grip. Use your other hand for support (being sure to keep away from any moving parts). This will be your starting position.
Exhale and pull the handle in towards your body by flexing at the elbow. Retract your shoulder blades and engage your back as you go.
Pause at this position, inhale and slowly return the handles to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variation: One-Arm Seated Row Machine (Neutral Grip).

en: Load up the recommended weight onto the machine and adjust the height of the seat so that the handles are at chest level. Grab one of the handles with either a neutral or pronated (palms facing down) grip. Use your other hand for support (being sure to keep away from any moving parts). This will be your starting position.
Exhale and pull the handle in towards your body by flexing at the elbow. Retract your shoulder blades and engage your back as you go.
Pause at this position, inhale and slowly return the handles to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variation: One-Arm Seated Row Machine (Neutral Grip).
es: Cargue el peso recomendado en la maquina y ajuste la altura del asiento para que las manijas queden al nivel del pecho. Agarre una de las manijas con un agarre neutral o en pronación (con las palmas hacia abajo). Utilice la otra mano como apoyo (asegurándose de mantenerse alejada de cualquier pieza móvil). Esta será tu posición inicial.
Exhala y tire del mango hacia el cuerpo flexionando el codo. Retraiga los omóplatos y enganche la espalda a medida que avanza.
Haz una pausa en esta posición, inhala y vuelve lentamente las manijas a la posición inicial.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variación: Máquina de remo sentado con un brazo (agarre neutral).

name: Leg Press (Single Leg)
instructions: Load on the desired amount of weight and take a seat on the machine. Place one of your feet on the platform directly in front of you and adopt a stabilising stance with your other foot (out of the way of any moving equipment). This will be your starting position.
As you inhale, slowly flex at your knee until it is at 90 degrees. Be sure not to allow your knee to collapse in when performing this movement.
As you exhale, Press through your heel to push the foot plate away from you until you return to the starting position with your quads and glutes under tension.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Leg Press or Leg Press (Narrow Stance).

en: Load on the desired amount of weight and take a seat on the machine. Place one of your feet on the platform directly in front of you and adopt a stabilising stance with your other foot (out of the way of any moving equipment). This will be your starting position.
As you inhale, slowly flex at your knee until it is at 90 degrees. Be sure not to allow your knee to collapse in when performing this movement.
As you exhale, Press through your heel to push the foot plate away from you until you return to the starting position with your quads and glutes under tension.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Leg Press or Leg Press (Narrow Stance).
es: Cargue la cantidad de peso deseada y siéntate en la maquina. Coloca uno de los pies en la plataforma directamente frente a ti y adopte una postura estabilizadora con el otro pie (fuera del camino de cualquier equipo en movimiento). Esta será tu posición inicial.
Mientras inhala, flexione lentamente la rodilla hasta que esté a 90 grados. Asegúrate de no permitir que su rodilla colapse al realizar este movimiento.
Mientras exhala, presione a través del talón para alejar la placa del pie de ti hasta que vuelve a la posición inicial con los cuadriceps y los gluteos bajo tensión.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Press de piernas o Leg Press (postura estrecha).

name: Single-Leg Lying Hamstring Curl
instructions: Firstly, adjust the lever where your ankle will be so that it matches your height. When you lay face down on the machine the lever should be a few inches below your calves.

Once you have set the levers, lay face down on the machine and grab the handles positioned on the inside of the machine. Your toes should be straight and pointed towards the floor. This will be your starting position.
While exhaling, curl one of your heels up towards your glutes. Once you are at the top of the contraction, hold for a second before lowering your leg towards the starting position.
Inhale as you do this and repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: Do not allow your hips to lift as you contract your hamstring as this will put undue stress on the lower back.
Variations: Lying Hamstring Curl or Standing Hamstring Curl Machine.

name.es: Curl de isquiosurales acostado con una sola pierna

en: Firstly, adjust the lever where your ankle will be so that it matches your height. When you lay face down on the machine the lever should be a few inches below your calves.

Once you have set the levers, lay face down on the machine and grab the handles positioned on the inside of the machine. Your toes should be straight and pointed towards the floor. This will be your starting position.
While exhaling, curl one of your heels up towards your glutes. Once you are at the top of the contraction, hold for a second before lowering your leg towards the starting position.
Inhale as you do this and repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: Do not allow your hips to lift as you contract your hamstring as this will put undue stress on the lower back.
Variations: Lying Hamstring Curl or Standing Hamstring Curl Machine.
es: En primer lugar, ajusta la palanca donde estará tu tobillo para que coincida con tu altura. Cuando se recueste boca abajo en la maquina, la palanca debe estar unos centímetros debajo de sus gemelos.

Una vez que haya colocado las palancas, túmbate boca abajo sobre la maquina y agarre las manijas ubicadas en el interior de la maquina. Los dedos de tus pies deben estar rectos y apuntando hacia el suelo. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Mientras exhala, doble uno de los talones hacia los gluteos. Una vez que estés en la parte superior de la contracción, mantén la posición durante un segundo antes de bajar la pierna hacia la posición inicial.
Inhala mientras hace esto y repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Precaución: No permite que las caderas se levantan mientras contrae el tendón de la corva, ya que esto ejercerá una tensión indebida en la zona lumbar.
Variaciones: maquina de curl de isquiosurales acostado o maquina de curl de isquiosurales de pie.

name: 45 Degree Leg Press Wide Stance
instructions: Using a 45 degree leg press machine, take a seat and place your feet on the foot plate to create a wide stance.

Gently press the foot plate away from you as you unhook the lock bars. You will take the weight at this point, ensure your knees are not locked and your joints remain slightly flexed. This will be your starting position.
As you inhale, slowly lower the platform until your upper and lower legs make a 90-degree angle.
As you exhale, press through your heels to push the foot plate away from you, engaging your quadriceps and glutes in order to do so.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and ensure to lock the safety pins properly once you are done.
Caution: Always securely lock the safety bars once you have finished.
Variations: 45 Degree Leg Press (Shoulder Width Stance) or Barbell Side Lunges.

es: Usando una maquina de press de piernas de 45 grados, siéntate y coloca los pies en la plataforma para los pies para crear una postura amplia.

Presione suavemente la plataforma para los pies hacia afuera mientras desengancha las barras de bloqueo. Tú tomará el peso en este punto, asegúrate de que las rodillas no estén bloqueadas y sus articulaciones permanezcan ligeramente flexionadas. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Mientras inhala, baja lentamente la plataforma hasta que la parte superior e inferior de las piernas formen un ángulo de 90 grados.
Mientras exhala, presione con los talones para alejar la plataforma del pie de ti, involucrando los cuadriceps y los gluteos para hacerlo.
Repite la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones y asegúrate de bloquear los imperdibles correctamente una vez que haya terminado.
Precaución: Bloquee siempre de forma segura las barras de seguridad una vez que haya terminado.
Variaciones: Press de piernas de 45 grados (postura a la anchura de los hombros) o zancadas laterales con barra.

name: Plate Side Bends
instructions: Stand with a narrow or shoulder width stance with a weight plate in your right hand. Have your elbow fully extended with the plate by your side. This will be your starting position.

Whilst keeping your back straight and your head up, bend at the waist to the right as far as possible. Be sure to inhale as you bend to the side. Hold at the bottom of the movement for a second and come back up to the starting position as you exhale.
Tip: The rest of your body must remain stationary.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and do the same for the left hand side.
Caution: Exercise caution if you have lower back problems. Stop immediately
Variations: Dumbbell Side Bends or Barbell Side Bends

en: Stand with a narrow or shoulder width stance with a weight plate in your right hand. Have your elbow fully extended with the plate by your side. This will be your starting position.

Whilst keeping your back straight and your head up, bend at the waist to the right as far as possible. Be sure to inhale as you bend to the side. Hold at the bottom of the movement for a second and come back up to the starting position as you exhale.
Tip: The rest of your body must remain stationary.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and do the same for the left hand side.
Caution: Exercise caution if you have lower back problems. Stop immediately
Variations: Dumbbell Side Bends or Barbell Side Bends
es: Colócate en una postura estrecha o a la altura de los hombros con una placa de pesas en la mano derecha. Mantén el codo completamente extendido con la placa a su lado. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Mientras mantiene la espalda recta y la cabeza erguida, doble la cintura hacia la derecha tanto como sea posible. Asegúrate de inhalar mientras se inclina hacia un lado. Mantén la parte inferior del movimiento por un segundo y regresa a la posición inicial mientras exhalas.
Consejo: el resto de tu cuerpo debe permanecer estacionario.
Repite la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones y haz lo mismo con el lado izquierdo.
Precaución: tenga cuidado si tiene problemas de espalda baja. Detenerse inmediatamente
Variaciones: flexiones laterales con mancuernas o flexiones laterales con barra

name: Dumbbell Walking Lunges
instructions: Whilst in a standing position, grab two dumbbells and keep your arms by your sides. This will be your starting position.

Take a step forward (slightly larger than a normal step) and as you land, drop your body down so that you create two right angles at your knees. Inhale as you do so whilst maintaining a straight torso.
Make sure that you keep your front knee over your heel and not over your toes. Your front shin should now be perpendicular to the floor.
As you exhale, push off the floor with your rear foot to return your body into a standing position.
Alternate legs as you go (as you walk forwards) and repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Bodyweight Walking Lunges or Barbell Walking Lunges.

en: Whilst in a standing position, grab two dumbbells and keep your arms by your sides. This will be your starting position.

Take a step forward (slightly larger than a normal step) and as you land, drop your body down so that you create two right angles at your knees. Inhale as you do so whilst maintaining a straight torso.
Make sure that you keep your front knee over your heel and not over your toes. Your front shin should now be perpendicular to the floor.
As you exhale, push off the floor with your rear foot to return your body into a standing position.
Alternate legs as you go (as you walk forwards) and repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Bodyweight Walking Lunges or Barbell Walking Lunges.
es: Mientras estás de pie, toma dos mancuernas y mantén los brazos a los lados. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Da un paso hacia adelante (un poco más grande que un paso normal) y, cuando aterrices, deja caer el cuerpo para crear dos ángulos rectos en las rodillas. Inhala mientras lo haces manteniendo el torso recto.
Asegúrate de mantener la rodilla delantera sobre el talón y no sobre los dedos de los pies. Tu espinilla delantera ahora debería estar perpendicular al suelo.
Mientras exhala, empuje el suelo con el pie trasero para que el cuerpo vuelve a la posición de pie.
Alterne las piernas a medida que avanza (mientras camina hacia adelante) y repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: zancadas caminando con peso corporal o zancadas caminando con barra.

name: Chained Barbell Squats
instructions: To set up the chains, begin by looping the leader chain over the sleeves of the bar. The heavy chain should be attached using a snap hook. Adjust the length of the lead chain so that a few links are still on the floor at the top of the movement.

Begin by stepping under the bar and placing it across the back of the shoulders. Squeeze your shoulder blades together and rotate your elbows forward, attempting to bend the bar across your shoulders. Remove the bar from the rack, creating a tight arch in your lower back, and step back into position. Place your feet wide for more emphasis on the back, glutes, adductors, and hamstrings. Keep your head facing forward.

With your back, shoulders, and core tight, push your knees and butt out and you begin your descent. Sit back with your hips as much as possible. Ideally, your shins should be perpendicular to the ground. Lower bar position necessitates a greater torso lean to keep the bar over the heels. Continue until you break parallel, which is defined as the crease of the hip being in line with the top of the knee.

Keeping the weight on your heels and pushing your feet and knees out, drive upward as you lead the movement with your head. Continue upward, maintaining tightness head to toe, until you have returned to the starting position.

en: To set up the chains, begin by looping the leader chain over the sleeves of the bar. The heavy chain should be attached using a snap hook. Adjust the length of the lead chain so that a few links are still on the floor at the top of the movement.

Begin by stepping under the bar and placing it across the back of the shoulders. Squeeze your shoulder blades together and rotate your elbows forward, attempting to bend the bar across your shoulders. Remove the bar from the rack, creating a tight arch in your lower back, and step back into position. Place your feet wide for more emphasis on the back, glutes, adductors, and hamstrings. Keep your head facing forward.

With your back, shoulders, and core tight, push your knees and butt out and you begin your descent. Sit back with your hips as much as possible. Ideally, your shins should be perpendicular to the ground. Lower bar position necessitates a greater torso lean to keep the bar over the heels. Continue until you break parallel, which is defined as the crease of the hip being in line with the top of the knee.

Keeping the weight on your heels and pushing your feet and knees out, drive upward as you lead the movement with your head. Continue upward, maintaining tightness head to toe, until you have returned to the starting position.
es: Para configurar las cadenas, comienza enrollando la cadena guía sobre las mangas de la barra. La cadena pesada debe fijarse mediante un mosquetón. Ajuste la longitud de la cadena principal de modo que algunos eslabones todavía queden en el suelo en la parte superior del movimiento.

Comienza pasando por debajo de la barra y colocándola sobre la parte posterior de los hombros. Apriete los omóplatos y gire los codos hacia adelante, intentando doblar la barra sobre los hombros. Retire la barra de la rejilla, creando un arco apretado en la parte baja de la espalda y vuelve a colocarse en su posición. Coloca los pies abiertos para hacer más énfasis en la espalda, los gluteos, los aductores y los isquiosurales. Mantén la cabeza mirando hacia adelante.

Con la espalda, los hombros y el core tensos, empuja las rodillas y el trasero y comienza el descenso. Siéntate con las caderas tanto como sea posible. Lo ideal es que tus espinillas estén perpendiculares al suelo. La posición de la barra más baja requiere una mayor inclinación del torso para mantener la barra sobre los talones. Continúa hasta romper el paralelo, que se define como el pliegue de la cadera alineado con la parte superior de la rodilla.

Manteniendo el peso sobre los talones y empujando los pies y las rodillas hacia afuera, conduzca hacia arriba mientras dirige el movimiento con la cabeza. Continúa hacia arriba, manteniendo la tensión de la cabeza a los pies, hasta que haya regresado a la posición inicial.

name: Rope Climb
instructions: Grab the rope with both hands above your head. Pull down on the rope as you take a small jump.
Reach up as high as possible with your arms, gripping the rope tightly.
Pull yourself up with your arms, bringing your knees towards your chest.
Continue until you reach the top of the rope.
To lower yourself, reverse this process using a hand over hand motion.
Caution: Carry out safety check first. Do not attempt unattended and without the neccessary safety precautions/personnel.

es: Agarre la cuerda con ambas manos por encima de la cabeza. Tira de la cuerda hacia abajo mientras das un pequeño salto.
Levanta los brazos lo más alto posible, agarrando la cuerda con fuerza.
Levántese con los brazos y lleve las rodillas hacia el pecho.
Continúa hasta llegar a la parte superior de la cuerda.
Para bajar, invierta este proceso usando un movimiento de mano sobre mano.
Precaución: Primero realiza una verificación de seguridad. No lo intente sin supervisión y sin las precauciones de seguridad y el personal necesarios.

name: Ring Dips
instructions: Grip a ring in each hand, and then take a small jump to help you get into the starting position with your arms locked out.
Begin by flexing the elbow, lowering your body until your arms break 90 degrees. Avoid swinging, and maintain good posture throughout the descent.
Reverse the motion by extending the elbow, pushing yourself back up into the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

en: Grip a ring in each hand, and then take a small jump to help you get into the starting position with your arms locked out.

es: Agarre un anillo en cada mano y luego dé un pequeño salto para llegar a la posición inicial con los brazos bloqueados.
Comienza flexionando el codo, bajando el cuerpo hasta que los brazos rompan los 90 grados. Evite balancearse y mantén una buena postura durante todo el descenso.
Invierta el movimiento extendiendo el codo y empujándose hacia arriba hasta la posición inicial.
Repite durante el número deseado de repeticiones.
