name: Bench Hops
instructions: Begin with a box or bench 1-2 feet in front of you. Stand with your feet shoulder width apart. This will be your starting position.
Perform a short squat in preparation for the jump; swing your arms behind you.
Rebound out of this position, extending through the hips, knees, and ankles to jump as high as possible. Swing your arms forward and up.
Jump over the bench, landing with the knees bent, absorbing the impact through the legs.
Turn around and face the opposite direction, then jump back over the bench.

en: Begin with a box or bench 1-2 feet in front of you. Stand with your feet shoulder width apart. This will be your starting position.

es: Comienza con una caja o banco a 1 o 2 pies frente a ti. Colócate con los pies separados a la altura de los hombros. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Realiza una sentadilla corta como preparación para el salto; mueve los brazos detrás de ti.
Rebota fuera de esta posición, extendiéndote por las caderas, las rodillas y los tobillos para saltar lo más alto posible. Mueva los brazos hacia adelante y hacia arriba.
Salta sobre el banco aterrizando con las rodillas flexionadas, absorbiendo el impacto a través de las piernas.
Date la vuelta y mira en la dirección opuesta, luego salta sobre el banco.

name: Battle Rope Alternating Waves
instructions: For this exercise you will need a heavy rope anchored at its center 15-20 feet away. Standing in front of the rope, take an end in each hand with your arms extended at your side. This will be your starting position.
Initiate the movement by rapidly raising one arm to shoulder level as quickly as you can.
As you let that arm drop to the starting position, raise the opposite side.
Continue alternating your left and right arms, whipping the ropes up and down as fast as you can.

name.es: Ondas alternas de cuerda de batalla

en: For this exercise you will need a heavy rope anchored at its center 15-20 feet away. Standing in front of the rope, take an end in each hand with your arms extended at your side. This will be your starting position.

Continue alternating your left and right arms, whipping the ropes up and down as fast as you can.
es: Para este ejercicio necesitarás una cuerda pesada anclada en su centro a una distancia de entre 15 y 20 pies. De pie frente a la cuerda, toma un extremo en cada mano con los brazos extendidos a los costados. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Inicie el movimiento levantando rápidamente un brazo hasta el nivel del hombro lo más rápido que puedas.
Mientras dejas caer ese brazo a la posición inicial, levanta el lado opuesto.
Continúa alternando los brazos izquierdo y derecho, moviendo las cuerdas hacia arriba y hacia abajo lo más rápido que puedas.

name: Overhead Slam
instructions: Hold a medicine ball with both hands and stand with your feet at shoulder width. This will be your starting position.
Initiate the countermovement by raising the ball above your head and fully extending your body.
Reverse the motion, slamming the ball into the ground directly in front of you as hard as you can.
Receive the ball with both hands on the bounce and repeat the movement.

name.es: Slam por encima de la cabeza

en: Hold a medicine ball with both hands and stand with your feet at shoulder width. This will be your starting position.

es: Sostenga un balon medicinal con ambas manos y colócate con los pies al ancho de los hombros. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Inicie el contramovimiento levantando la pelota por encima de la cabeza y extendiendo completamente el cuerpo.
Invierte el movimiento, golpeando la pelota contra el suelo directamente frente a ti tan fuerte como puedas.
Recibe el balón con ambas manos en el rebote y repite el movimiento.

name: Underhand Cable Pulldowns
instructions: Set the weight to the recommended amount and check that the leg brace is set to the correct height. Take a seat facing the machine (tuck your hips in so they are touching the leg brace) and take a shoulder width, underhand grip with your arms extended towards the ceiling. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and pull the bar down towards your chest using the muscles across your back and your biceps. Lean back ever so slightly as your pull the weight downwards and lift your chest as much as you can. Continue to pull the bar down until either your muscles are optimally contracted or it is in contact with your chest.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the bar back along the same path into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Chin Ups or Horizontal Barbell Pull Ups.

es: Ajuste el peso a la cantidad recomendada y verifique que la abrazadera para piernas esté ajustada a la altura correcta. Siéntate frente a la maquina (meta las caderas hacia adentro para que toquen el soporte para las piernas) y toma un agarre por debajo del ancho de los hombros con los brazos extendidos hacia el techo. Esta es tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, exhala y tira de la barra hacia tu pecho usando los músculos de tu espalda y tus biceps. Inclínate ligeramente hacia atrás mientras tira del peso hacia abajo y levanta el pecho tanto como puedas. Continúa tirando de la barra hacia abajo hasta que sus músculos estén contraídos de manera óptima o esté en contacto con el pecho.
Después de una breve pausa, inhala y regresa la barra por el mismo camino hasta su posición inicial.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: dominadas o dominadas horizontales con barra.

name: Lat Pulldown Behind The Head
instructions: Set the weight to the recommended amount and check that the leg brace is set to the correct height. Take a seat facing the machine (tuck your hips in so they are touching the leg brace) and adopt a wide, overhand grip with your arms extended towards the ceiling. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and pull the bar down towards the back of your neck. Lean forwards slightly (from your hips, maintaining a straight back) as you pull the bar downwards. It is paramount that the bar does not touch your neck. Continue to descend the bar until you are a few inches away from your neck.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the bar back along the same path into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Pull-Ups or Lat Pulldowns.

es: Ajuste el peso a la cantidad recomendada y verifique que la abrazadera para piernas esté ajustada a la altura correcta. Siéntate frente a la maquina (meta las caderas hacia adentro para que toquen el soporte para las piernas) y adopte un agarre amplio y por encima de la cabeza con los brazos extendidos hacia el techo. Esta es tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, exhala y tira de la barra hacia la nuca. Inclínate ligeramente hacia adelante (desde las caderas, manteniendo la espalda recta) mientras tira de la barra hacia abajo. Es primordial que la barra no toque tu cuello. Continúa descendiendo la barra hasta que esté a unos centímetros de su cuello.
Después de una breve pausa, inhala y regresa la barra por el mismo camino hasta su posición inicial.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Pull-Ups o Lat Pulldowns.

name: Barbell Sissy Squats
instructions: Grab a barbell and place it across the back of your shoulders. Next step into the sissy squat machine, making sure that your feet are locked in and the pad reaches at least half way up your thighs. Adopt a shoulder width stance with your toes slightly pointing outward. Maintain a straight back throughout the movement and keep your head up. This will be your starting position.

Inhale and begin to descend by bending at your knees and hips. You should lean backwards into the movement so that your weight is supported through the pad that is in contact with your calves. Continue to descend until your thighs are either parallel or just past to the floor.

After a brief pause, exhale and return the bar to the starting position along the same path, push through your heels with the force being driven through your quads . Stand to attention with your legs fully extended, back straight and shoulders relaxed.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: This is a very complex movement and will require a spotter. If you do not have a spotter, be cautious with your weights. If you suffer from knee issues, this exercise may not be suitable.
Variations: Dumbbell Squats or Leg Presses.

Adopt a shoulder width stance with your toes slightly pointing outward. Maintain a straight back throughout the movement and keep your head up. This will be your starting position.

Inhale and begin to descend by bending at your knees and hips. You should lean backwards into the movement so that your weight is supported through the pad that is in contact with your calves. Continue to descend until your thighs are either parallel or just past to the floor.

After a brief pause, exhale and return the bar to the starting position along the same path, push through your heels with the force being driven through your quads . Stand to attention with your legs fully extended, back straight and shoulders relaxed.

es: Toma una barra y colócala sobre la parte posterior de tus hombros. El siguiente paso es ingresar a la maquina de sentadillas sissy, asegurándose de que los pies estén bloqueados y que la almohadilla llegue al menos hasta la mitad de sus muslos. Adopte una postura a la altura de los hombros con los dedos de los pies ligeramente apuntando hacia afuera. Mantén la espalda recta durante todo el movimiento y mantén la cabeza erguida. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Inhala y comienza a descender doblando las rodillas y las caderas. Debes inclinarte hacia atrás en el movimiento para que tu peso quede apoyado a través de la almohadilla que está en contacto con tus gemelos. Continúa descendiendo hasta que sus muslos estén paralelos o justo al suelo.

Después de una breve pausa, exhala y regresa la barra a la posición inicial siguiendo el mismo camino, empujando con los talones con la fuerza impulsada a través de los cuadriceps. Colócate firme con las piernas completamente extendidas, la espalda recta y los hombros relajados.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.

Precaución: este es un movimiento muy complejo y requerirá un observador. Si no tiene un observador, tenga cuidado con sus pesas. Si sufre problemas de rodilla, es posible que este ejercicio no sea adecuado.
Variaciones: sentadillas con mancuernas o prensas de piernas.

name: V Bar Pulldowns
instructions: Attach the V-Bar, set the weight to the recommended amount and check that the leg brace is set to the correct height. Take a seat facing the machine (tuck your hips in so they are touching the leg brace) and grab the V-Bar with an overhand grip, your arms extended towards the ceiling. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and pull the V-Bar down towards your chest using the muscles across your back and your biceps. Lean back ever so slightly as your pull the weight downwards and lift your chest as much as you can. Continue to pull the V-Bar down until either your muscles are optimally contracted or it is in contact with your chest.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the V-Bar back along the same path into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Lat Pulldown or Barbell Rows.

Tome asiento frente a la máquina (meta las caderas hacia adentro para que toquen el soporte para las piernas) y agarre la barra V con un agarre por encima de la cabeza, con los brazos extendidos hacia el techo. Esta es tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, exhala y tira de la barra V hacia tu pecho usando los músculos de tu espalda y tus bíceps. Inclínese ligeramente hacia atrás mientras tira del peso hacia abajo y levanta el pecho tanto como pueda. Continúe tirando de la barra V hacia abajo hasta que sus músculos estén contraídos de manera óptima o esté en contacto con su pecho.
Después de una breve pausa, inhale y regrese la barra V por el mismo camino hasta su posición inicial.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Lat Pulldown o remo con barra.

name: Smith Machine Stiff Leg Deadlifts
instructions: Load up the smith machine with the required amount of weight and place the bar at mid thigh height. Adopt a standing position with your feet shoulder width apart so that the bar is gently placed against your thighs. Allow your arms to hang perpendicular to the floor with an overhand grip (palms facing your thighs). Next, lift the bar off the rack and slightly bend your knees. Tip: Keep a straight back and legs throughout the movement. This will be your starting position.

Inhale as you lean forwards from your waist (remember to keep a straight back), keeping the bar close to your thighs as you go. Keep lowering the bar towards your feet until you feel a stretch in your hamstrings.

After a brief pause bring your torso upright again by pushing your hips forward. Tip: Remember, this whole movement is performed with 'stiff' legs (slight bend at the knee, but no more) and a straight back throughout. Exhale as you perform this part of the movement.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: This is not an exercise for those with back issues. Avoid jerking motions as this could cause serious injury.
Variations: Dumbbell Stiff Legged Dead lifts or Barbell Stiff-Legged Deadlifts.

name.es: Peso muerto con piernas rígidas en máquina Smith

en: Load up the smith machine with the required amount of weight and place the bar at mid thigh height. Adopt a standing position with your feet shoulder width apart so that the bar is gently placed against your thighs. Allow your arms to hang perpendicular to the floor with an overhand grip (palms facing your thighs). Next, lift the bar off the rack and slightly bend your knees. Tip: Keep a straight back and legs throughout the movement. This will be your starting position.

Inhale as you lean forwards from your waist (remember to keep a straight back), keeping the bar close to your thighs as you go. Keep lowering the bar towards your feet until you feel a stretch in your hamstrings.

After a brief pause bring your torso upright again by pushing your hips forward. Tip: Remember, this whole movement is performed with 'stiff' legs (slight bend at the knee, but no more) and a straight back throughout. Exhale as you perform this part of the movement.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: This is not an exercise for those with back issues. Avoid jerking motions as this could cause serious injury.
Variations: Dumbbell Stiff Legged Dead lifts or Barbell Stiff-Legged Deadlifts.
es: Cargue la máquina Smith con la cantidad de peso requerida y coloque la barra a la altura de la mitad del muslo. Adopte una posición de pie con los pies separados a la altura de los hombros para que la barra se coloque suavemente contra sus muslos. Deje que sus brazos cuelguen perpendiculares al piso con un agarre por encima de la cabeza (con las palmas hacia los muslos). Luego, levante la barra del soporte y doble ligeramente las rodillas. Consejo: Mantenga la espalda y las piernas rectas durante todo el movimiento. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Inhala mientras te inclinas hacia adelante desde tu cintura (recuerda mantener la espalda recta), manteniendo la barra cerca de tus muslos a medida que avanzas. Sigue bajando la barra hacia tus pies hasta que sientas un estiramiento en los isquiosurales.

Después de una breve pausa, vuelva a enderezar el torso empujando las caderas hacia adelante. Consejo: Recuerde, todo este movimiento se realiza con las piernas "rígidas" (ligeramente doblada en la rodilla, pero no más) y la espalda recta en todo momento. Exhala mientras realizas esta parte del movimiento.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Precaución: este no es un ejercicio para personas con problemas de espalda. Evite movimientos bruscos ya que esto podría causar lesiones graves.
Variaciones: levantamiento muerto con piernas rígidas con mancuernas o peso muerto con piernas rígidas con barra.

name: Smith Machine Squats
instructions: Load the smith machine with the desired amount of weight and place the bar at shoulder height. Step underneath the bar and rotate it so that the weight is resting across the back of your shoulders. You should take hold of the bar loosely just to make sure it does not fall. Stand with a wider than shoulder width stance, toes pointing (slightly) outward. Throughout the movement you should keep your head up, chest out and maintain a straight back. This will be your starting position.

Descend slowly by bending at your knees and hips until your thighs are parallel with the floor. Keep a straight back so that your posture is not compromised. Tip: When at the bottom of the movement your knees should be behind your toes.

Once you have hit the bottom of the movement, pause for a second before pushing your torso back into the starting position through your heels. As you descend inhale and as you ascend, exhale. You should now be at the starting position, ready to go again.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: Always be aware of your posture with this exercise as if performed incorrectly, could cause injury.
Variations: Barbell Squats or Dumbbell Squats.

This will be your starting position.

Descend slowly by bending at your knees and hips until your thighs are parallel with the floor. Keep a straight back so that your posture is not compromised. Tip: When at the bottom of the movement your knees should be behind your toes.

Once you have hit the bottom of the movement, pause for a second before pushing your torso back into the starting position through your heels. As you descend inhale and as you ascend, exhale. You should now be at the starting position, ready to go again.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: Always be aware of your posture with this exercise as if performed incorrectly, could cause injury.
Variations: Barbell Squats or Dumbbell Squats.
es: Cargue la máquina smith con la cantidad de peso deseada y coloque la barra a la altura de los hombros. Pase debajo de la barra y gírela para que el peso descanse sobre la parte posterior de sus hombros. Debes agarrar la barra sin apretar para asegurarte de que no se caiga. Párese con una postura más ancha que el ancho de los hombros, con los dedos de los pies apuntando (ligeramente) hacia afuera. Durante todo el movimiento debes mantener la cabeza erguida, el pecho afuera y mantener la espalda recta. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Desciende lentamente doblando las rodillas y las caderas hasta que los muslos queden paralelos al suelo. Mantenga la espalda recta para que su postura no se vea comprometida. Consejo: cuando estés en la parte inferior del movimiento, tus rodillas deben estar detrás de los dedos de los pies.

Una vez que hayas llegado al final del movimiento, haz una pausa por un segundo antes de empujar el torso hacia la posición inicial a través de los talones. Al descender, inhala y al ascender, exhala. Ahora deberías estar en la posición inicial, listo para comenzar de nuevo.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Precaución: Esté siempre consciente de su postura al realizar este ejercicio, ya que, si se realiza incorrectamente, podría causar lesiones.
Variaciones: Sentadillas con barra o Sentadillas con mancuernas.

name: Smith Machine Shoulder Press
instructions: Load up the smith machine with the prescribed amount of weight and set it at a shoulder height. Grab the bar with a wider than shoulder width overhand grip. Take a seat on an incline bench (just off vertical) so that the bar can pass just in front of your face when it descends. Set the safety hooks in the correct position and lift the bar off the rack so that your arms (which are fully extended towards the ceiling) are weight baring. This is your starting position.
To initiate the movement, inhale and slowly lower the bar down towards your shoulders (in front of your head). Pause for a brief moment when the bar gently touches your shoulders.
Exhale and press the bar back along the same path into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Seated Barbell Military Press or Seated Cable Shoulder Press.

name.es: Press de hombros con máquina Smith

To initiate the movement, inhale and slowly lower the bar down towards your shoulders (in front of your head). Pause for a brief moment when the bar gently touches your shoulders.
Exhale and press the bar back along the same path into the starting position.

es: Cargue la máquina Smith con la cantidad de peso prescrita y colóquela a la altura de los hombros. Agarre la barra con un agarre por encima del ancho de los hombros. Siéntate en un banco inclinado (justo fuera de la vertical) para que la barra pueda pasar justo por delante de tu cara cuando descienda. Coloque los ganchos de seguridad en la posición correcta y levante la barra del estante de modo que sus brazos (que están completamente extendidos hacia el techo) queden expuestos al peso. Esta es tu posición inicial.
Para iniciar el movimiento, inhala y baja lentamente la barra hacia tus hombros (frente a tu cabeza). Haga una pausa por un breve momento cuando la barra toque suavemente sus hombros.
Exhala y presiona la barra hacia atrás por el mismo camino hasta la posición inicial.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Press militar con barra sentado o Press de hombros con cable sentado.

name: Smith Machine Incline Bench Press
instructions: Load the machine with the desired weight and set the position of the bar so it is at chest height. Place an incline bench (around 30-45 degrees) beneath the bar and lay down on your back so the bar is directly above your chest. Adopt an overhand grip (palms facing forwards) and lift the bar off the hooks. Press the bar upwards until your arms are at full extension (slight bend at your elbows) and make sure you have set the safety bars to the correct height. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, inhale and descend the bar towards your chest by flexing at your elbows, allowing them to flare out wide. Continue to descend the bar until either your elbows are at 90 degrees or the bar gently touches your chest.
After a brief pause, exhale and press the bar back along the same path into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Barbell Incline Bench Press or Incline Dumbbell Chest Press.

name.es: Press de banca inclinado con máquina Smith

en: Load the machine with the desired weight and set the position of the bar so it is at chest height. Place an incline bench (around 30-45 degrees) beneath the bar and lay down on your back so the bar is directly above your chest. Adopt an overhand grip (palms facing forwards) and lift the bar off the hooks. Press the bar upwards until your arms are at full extension (slight bend at your elbows) and make sure you have set the safety bars to the correct height. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, inhale and descend the bar towards your chest by flexing at your elbows, allowing them to flare out wide. Continue to descend the bar until either your elbows are at 90 degrees or the bar gently touches your chest.
After a brief pause, exhale and press the bar back along the same path into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Barbell Incline Bench Press or Incline Dumbbell Chest Press.
es: Cargue la máquina con el peso deseado y ajuste la posición de la barra para que quede a la altura del pecho. Coloque un banco inclinado (alrededor de 30 a 45 grados) debajo de la barra y recuéstese boca arriba de modo que la barra quede directamente sobre su pecho. Adopte un agarre por encima de la cabeza (con las palmas hacia adelante) y levante la barra de los ganchos. Presione la barra hacia arriba hasta que sus brazos estén completamente extendidos (ligeramente doblados los codos) y asegúrese de haber colocado las barras de seguridad a la altura correcta. Esta es tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, inhale y descienda la barra hacia su pecho flexionando los codos, permitiendo que se abran ampliamente. Continúe descendiendo la barra hasta que sus codos estén a 90 grados o la barra toque suavemente su pecho.
Después de una breve pausa, exhala y presiona la barra hacia atrás por el mismo camino hasta su posición inicial.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Press de banca inclinado con barra o Press de pecho inclinado con mancuernas.

name: Smith Machine Bent Over Rows
instructions: Load the smith machine with the desired amount of weight and allow the bar to rest as low as possible in front of you. Take hold of it with a wider than shoulder width, overhand grip by bending at your knees and waist (more so at your waist) whilst maintaining a straight back. Your arms should be hanging perpendicular to the floor at this point. This is your starting position.
Exhale and squeeze the muscles in your back to bring the bar in towards your torso. Bend at the elbow to allow the movement but try not to take any weight through your forearms/biceps.
Once the bar is as close to your body as it can be or the muscles in your back are at tight as they can be, inhale and return the barbell along the same path back into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: This exercise may not be suitable for people that suffer from any back pain/injuries.
Variations: Bent Over Barbell Row or Seated Row Machine (Neutral Grip).

es: Cargue la máquina Smith con la cantidad de peso deseada y permita que la barra descanse lo más bajo posible frente a usted. Sujételo con un agarre más ancho que el ancho de los hombros, doblando las rodillas y la cintura (más aún en la cintura) mientras mantiene la espalda recta. En este punto, tus brazos deben colgar perpendiculares al suelo. Esta es tu posición inicial.
Exhala y aprieta los músculos de tu espalda para llevar la barra hacia tu torso. Doble el codo para permitir el movimiento, pero trate de no pasar ningún peso por los antebrazos o bíceps.
Una vez que la barra esté lo más cerca posible de su cuerpo o que los músculos de su espalda estén lo más tensos posible, inhale y regrese la barra por el mismo camino hasta la posición inicial.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Precaución: Este ejercicio puede no ser adecuado para personas que sufren algún dolor o lesión en la espalda.
Variaciones: Remo inclinado con barra o máquina de remo sentado (agarre neutral).

Presione la barra hacia arriba hasta que sus brazos estén completamente extendidos (ligeramente doblados los codos) y asegúrese de haber colocado las barras de seguridad a la altura correcta. Esta es tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, inhale y descienda la barra hacia su pecho flexionando los codos, permitiendo que se abran ampliamente. Continúe descendiendo la barra hasta que sus codos estén a 90 grados o la barra toque suavemente su pecho.
Después de una breve pausa, exhala y presiona la barra hacia atrás por el mismo camino hasta su posición inicial.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Press de banca con barra o Press de banca con mancuernas.

name: Standing Hamstring Curl Machine
instructions: Adjust the machine lever to fit your height and lie with your torso bent at the waist facing forward around 30-45 degrees (since an angled position is more favorable for hamstrings recruitment) with the pad of the lever on the back of your right leg (just a few inches under the calves) and the front of the right leg on top of the machine pad.
Keeping the torso bent forward, ensure your leg is fully stretched and grab the side handles of the machine.  Position your toes straight.  This will be your starting position.
As you exhale, curl your right leg up as far as possible without lifting the upper leg from the pad.  Once you hit the fully contracted position, hold it for a second.
As you inhale, bring the legs back to the initial position.  Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Perform the same exercise now for the left leg.

name.es: Máquina de curl de isquiosurales de pie

en: Adjust the machine lever to fit your height and lie with your torso bent at the waist facing forward around 30-45 degrees (since an angled position is more favorable for hamstrings recruitment) with the pad of the lever on the back of your right leg (just a few inches under the calves) and the front of the right leg on top of the machine pad.
Keeping the torso bent forward, ensure your leg is fully stretched and grab the side handles of the machine.  Position your toes straight.  This will be your starting position.
As you exhale, curl your right leg up as far as possible without lifting the upper leg from the pad.  Once you hit the fully contracted position, hold it for a second.
As you inhale, bring the legs back to the initial position.  Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Perform the same exercise now for the left leg.
es: Ajuste la palanca de la máquina para que se ajuste a su altura y acuéstese con el torso doblado por la cintura mirando hacia adelante entre 30 y 45 grados (ya que una posición en ángulo es más favorable para el reclutamiento de los isquiosurales) con la almohadilla de la palanca en la parte posterior de la pierna derecha (solo unos pocos centímetros debajo de las gemelos) y la parte delantera de la pierna derecha encima de la almohadilla de la máquina.

Manteniendo el torso inclinado hacia adelante, asegúrese de que la pierna esté completamente estirada y agarre las manijas laterales de la máquina.  Coloque los dedos de los pies rectos.  Esta será tu posición inicial.

Mientras exhala, doble la pierna derecha hacia arriba lo más que pueda sin levantar la parte superior de la pierna de la almohadilla.  Una vez que llegues a la posición completamente contraída, mantenla por un segundo.
Mientras inhalas, lleva las piernas a la posición inicial.  Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Realiza el mismo ejercicio ahora para la pierna izquierda.

name: Seated Leg Curl
instructions: Set the machine to the desired weight and set the position of the back rest (when you sit on the machine, the back of your knees should be in contact with the edge of the seat). Next take a seat and check that when you rest your legs on the working pad, it is located just below your calves. The last guard to move is the one that gently locks your thighs in position. After you have done this, take hold of the handles in front of you and make sure your back is supported and in contact with the back rest. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale as you squeeze your heels in towards your glutes in an arcing motion by flexing your knees. Continue to do so until your hamstrings are as tight as can be or that you cannot bend your knees anymore.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the pad back along the same path into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Lying Hamstring Curls or Natural Glute Ham Raise.

en: Set the machine to the desired weight and set the position of the back rest (when you sit on the machine, the back of your knees should be in contact with the edge of the seat). Next take a seat and check that when you rest your legs on the working pad, it is located just below your calves. The last guard to move is the one that gently locks your thighs in position. After you have done this, take hold of the handles in front of you and make sure your back is supported and in contact with the back rest. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale as you squeeze your heels in towards your glutes in an arcing motion by flexing your knees. Continue to do so until your hamstrings are as tight as can be or that you cannot bend your knees anymore.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the pad back along the same path into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Lying Hamstring Curls or Natural Glute Ham Raise.
es: Ajuste la máquina al peso deseado y ajuste la posición del respaldo (cuando se siente en la máquina, la parte posterior de las rodillas debe estar en contacto con el borde del asiento). A continuación toma asiento y comprueba que cuando apoyes las piernas sobre la plataforma de trabajo, ésta quede justo debajo de tus gemelos. El último protector en moverse es el que bloquea suavemente los muslos en su posición. Después de haber hecho esto, agarre las manijas frente a usted y asegúrese de que su espalda esté apoyada y en contacto con el respaldo. Esta es tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, exhale mientras aprieta los talones hacia los glúteos formando un arco flexionando las rodillas. Continúe haciéndolo hasta que los isquiosurales estén lo más tensos posible o hasta que ya no pueda doblar las rodillas.
Después de una breve pausa, inhale y regrese la almohadilla por el mismo camino hasta su posición inicial.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: rizos de isquiosurales acostados o elevación natural de glúteos.

name: Seated Calf Raise Machine
instructions: Place the recommended amount of weight on the machine and take a seat. Once you are seated, place the balls of your feet on the foot plate with your toes pointed forward. Next, adjust the height of the lever pad and place your lower thighs under it. Place your hands on top of the lever pad in order to prevent it from slipping.
Lift the lever slightly by pushing through the balls of your feet and release the safety bar. This will be your starting position.
Inhale as you slowly lower your heels towards the floor and continue until your calves are fully stretched.

As you exhale, press through the balls of your feet, contracting the calves until your ankles are as high as possible. Hold and squeeze your calves for a second before repeating the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Seated Calf Raise Machine (Toes Out) or Seated Calf Raise Machine (Toes In).

name.es: Máquina de elevación de gemelos sentado

en: Place the recommended amount of weight on the machine and take a seat. Once you are seated, place the balls of your feet on the foot plate with your toes pointed forward. Next, adjust the height of the lever pad and place your lower thighs under it. Place your hands on top of the lever pad in order to prevent it from slipping.
Lift the lever slightly by pushing through the balls of your feet and release the safety bar. This will be your starting position.
Inhale as you slowly lower your heels towards the floor and continue until your calves are fully stretched.

As you exhale, press through the balls of your feet, contracting the calves until your ankles are as high as possible. Hold and squeeze your calves for a second before repeating the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Seated Calf Raise Machine (Toes Out) or Seated Calf Raise Machine (Toes In).
es: Coloca la cantidad de peso recomendada sobre la máquina y toma asiento. Una vez que esté sentado, coloque las puntas de los pies en el reposapiés con los dedos apuntando hacia adelante. A continuación, ajuste la altura de la palanca y coloque la parte inferior de los muslos debajo de ella. Coloque sus manos encima de la palanca para evitar que se resbale.
Levante ligeramente la palanca empujándola con las puntas de los pies y suelte la barra de seguridad. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Inhala mientras bajas lentamente los talones hacia el suelo y continúa hasta que las gemelos estén completamente estiradas.

Mientras exhala, presione las puntas de los pies, contrayendo las gemelos hasta que los tobillos estén lo más altos posible. Sostenga y apriete las gemelos durante un segundo antes de repetir el movimiento durante la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Máquina de elevación de gemelos sentado (con los dedos de los pies hacia afuera) o Máquina de elevación de gemelos sentado (con los dedos de los pies hacia adentro).

name: Pec Deck
instructions: Take a seat on the machine, facing forwards and adjust the height of the seat so that your hips and knees are at 90 degrees. Next adjust the handles to the correct position so that they gently stretch your pectoral muscles when you take hold of them. Grip the handles and make sure that your arms are parallel to the floor at this point. This is your starting position. Tip: Keep your elbows in line with your wrists and shoulders throughout the movement and they remain slightly bent.

To initiate the movement, exhale and bring your hands out on a wide arcing motion in front of you using your pectoral muscles to do so. Keep your chest as high as you can with your back in contact with the back rest. Continue to bring your hands together until they meet in the middle.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the handles back along the same path into their starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dumbbell Flyes or Cable Crossovers.

en: Take a seat on the machine, facing forwards and adjust the height of the seat so that your hips and knees are at 90 degrees. Next adjust the handles to the correct position so that they gently stretch your pectoral muscles when you take hold of them. Grip the handles and make sure that your arms are parallel to the floor at this point. This is your starting position. Tip: Keep your elbows in line with your wrists and shoulders throughout the movement and they remain slightly bent.

To initiate the movement, exhale and bring your hands out on a wide arcing motion in front of you using your pectoral muscles to do so. Keep your chest as high as you can with your back in contact with the back rest. Continue to bring your hands together until they meet in the middle.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the handles back along the same path into their starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dumbbell Flyes or Cable Crossovers.
es: Siéntese en la máquina, mirando hacia adelante y ajuste la altura del asiento para que sus caderas y rodillas queden a 90 grados. A continuación, ajuste las manijas a la posición correcta para que estiren suavemente los músculos pectorales cuando las agarre. Agarre las manijas y asegúrese de que sus brazos estén paralelos al piso en este punto. Esta es tu posición inicial. Consejo: Mantenga los codos alineados con las muñecas y los hombros durante todo el movimiento y permanezcan ligeramente doblados.

Para iniciar el movimiento, exhale y extienda las manos formando un amplio arco frente a usted utilizando los músculos pectorales para hacerlo. Mantenga el pecho lo más alto que pueda con la espalda en contacto con el respaldo. Continúe juntando las manos hasta que se encuentren en el medio.
Después de una breve pausa, inhale y regrese las manijas por el mismo camino a su posición inicial.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: aperturas con mancuernas o cruces con cable.

name: Abductor Machine External
instructions: Take a seat on the machine, placing the knee pads on the outside of your thighs with your feet in the stirrups. Make sure your knees and hips are at 90 degrees and you have the correct weight applied.
To initiate the movement, exhale and pull your knees apart until the pads are as wide as possible.
After a brief pause, inhale and reverse the movement returning the pads back along the same path into their starting position.

en: Take a seat on the machine, placing the knee pads on the outside of your thighs with your feet in the stirrups. Make sure your knees and hips are at 90 degrees and you have the correct weight applied.

es: Siéntate en la máquina, colocando las rodilleras en la parte exterior de los muslos con los pies en los estribos. Asegúrese de que sus rodillas y caderas estén a 90 grados y de aplicar el peso correcto.
Para iniciar el movimiento, exhala y separa las rodillas hasta que las almohadillas estén lo más anchas posible.
Después de una breve pausa, inhala e invierte el movimiento devolviendo las almohadillas por el mismo camino a su posición inicial.

name: Single Arm Pulldowns
instructions: Attach a handle to the machine, set the weight to the recommended amount and check that the leg brace is positioned correctly. Take a seat facing the machine (tuck your hips in so they are touching the leg brace) and grab the handle with an overhand grip so your arm is extended towards the ceiling. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and pull the handle down towards your chest using the muscles across your back and bicep. Lean back ever so slightly as your pull the weight downwards and maintain your posture throughout. Continue to pull the handle down until either your muscles are optimally contracted or it is in contact with your chest.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the handle back along the same path into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variations: Dumbbell Rows or Seated One-Arm Cable Pulley Rows.

en: Attach a handle to the machine, set the weight to the recommended amount and check that the leg brace is positioned correctly. Take a seat facing the machine (tuck your hips in so they are touching the leg brace) and grab the handle with an overhand grip so your arm is extended towards the ceiling. To initiate the movement, exhale and pull the handle down towards your chest using the muscles across your back and bicep. Lean back ever so slightly as your pull the weight downwards and maintain your posture throughout. Continue to pull the handle down until either your muscles are optimally contracted or it is in contact with your chest.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the handle back along the same path into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variations: Dumbbell Rows or Seated One-Arm Cable Pulley Rows.
es: Coloque un mango en la máquina, ajuste el peso a la carga indicada y verifique que la abrazadera para piernas esté colocada correctamente. Tome asiento frente a la máquina (meta las caderas hacia adentro para que toquen el soporte para las piernas) y agarre el mango con un agarre por encima de la cabeza para que su brazo quede extendido hacia el techo. Esta es tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, exhale y tire del mango hacia su pecho usando los músculos de la espalda y los bíceps. Inclínese ligeramente hacia atrás mientras tira del peso hacia abajo y mantenga la postura en todo momento. Continúe tirando del mango hacia abajo hasta que sus músculos estén contraídos de manera óptima o esté en contacto con su pecho.
Después de una breve pausa, inhale y regrese el mango por el mismo camino hasta su posición inicial.
Repita la número indicado de repeticiones y cambie de lado.
Variaciones: remo con mancuernas o remo sentado en polea con cable a un brazo.

name: Narrow Stance Leg Press
instructions: Set the machine to the desired weight and set the position of the seat (you will want your knees to be at a 90 degree angle when you get into position). Next take a seat and lift your feet up onto the foot plate in front of you. Have your feet and knees together, your knees at a 90 degree angle and your lower back supported. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and press the foot plate away by putting pressure though your heels and shoes laces. Contract your thigh and glute muscles whilst simultaneously pulling your hips into the seat. Continue to press the foot plate away until your legs are fully extended (slight bend at your knees).
After a brief pause, inhale and return your legs back along the same path into their starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Barbell Squats or Dumbbell Squats.

name.es: Press de piernas en posición estrecha

en: Set the machine to the desired weight and set the position of the seat (you will want your knees to be at a 90 degree angle when you get into position). Next take a seat and lift your feet up onto the foot plate in front of you. Have your feet and knees together, your knees at a 90 degree angle and your lower back supported. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and press the foot plate away by putting pressure though your heels and shoes laces. Contract your thigh and glute muscles whilst simultaneously pulling your hips into the seat. Continue to press the foot plate away until your legs are fully extended (slight bend at your knees).
After a brief pause, inhale and return your legs back along the same path into their starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Barbell Squats or Dumbbell Squats.
es: Configure la máquina con el peso deseado y establezca la posición del asiento (querrá que sus rodillas estén en un ángulo de 90 grados cuando se coloque en posición). Luego, siéntese y levante los pies sobre la plataforma para pies frente a usted. Mantenga los pies y las rodillas juntos, las rodillas en un ángulo de 90 grados y la zona lumbar apoyada. Esta es tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, exhale y presione la placa para los pies hacia afuera ejerciendo presión a través de los talones y los cordones de los zapatos. Contraiga los músculos de los muslos y los glúteos mientras simultáneamente empuja las caderas hacia el asiento. Continúe presionando la plataforma para los pies hasta que las piernas estén completamente extendidas (doble ligeramente las rodillas).
Después de una breve pausa, inhala y regresa las piernas por el mismo camino hasta su posición inicial.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Sentadillas con barra o Sentadillas con mancuernas.

name: Hack Squat Narrow Stance
instructions: Place the back of your torso against the back pad of the machine and hook your shoulders under the shoulder pads provided.

Position your legs in the platform using a less than shoulder width narrow stance with the toes slightly pointed out.  Your feet should be around 3 inches or less apart. Tip: Keep your head up at all times and also maintain the back on the pad at all times.
Place your arms on the side handles of the machine and disengage the safety bars (which on most designs is done by moving the side handles from a facing front position to a diagonal position).
Now straighten your legs without locking the knees.  This will be your starting position.

Begin to slowly lower the unit by bending the knees as you maintain a straight posture with the head up (back on the pad at all times).  Continue down until the angle between the upper leg and the calves becomes slightly less than 90-degrees (which is the point in which the upper legs are below parallel to the floor).  Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement.
Begin to raise the unit as you exhale by pushing the floor with mainly with the heels of your feet as you straighten the legs again and go back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

en: Place the back of your torso against the back pad of the machine and hook your shoulders under the shoulder pads provided.

Position your legs in the platform using a less than shoulder width narrow stance with the toes slightly pointed out.  Your feet should be around 3 inches or less apart. Tip: Keep your head up at all times and also maintain the back on the pad at all times.
Place your arms on the side handles of the machine and disengage the safety bars (which on most designs is done by moving the side handles from a facing front position to a diagonal position).
Now straighten your legs without locking the knees.  This will be your starting position.

Begin to slowly lower the unit by bending the knees as you maintain a straight posture with the head up (back on the pad at all times).  Continue down until the angle between the upper leg and the calves becomes slightly less than 90-degrees (which is the point in which the upper legs are below parallel to the floor).  Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement.
Begin to raise the unit as you exhale by pushing the floor with mainly with the heels of your feet as you straighten the legs again and go back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
es: Coloque la parte posterior de su torso contra la almohadilla trasera de la máquina y enganche sus hombros debajo de las hombreras provistas.

Coloque las piernas en la plataforma utilizando una postura estrecha que tenga menos del ancho de los hombros y con los dedos de los pies ligeramente apuntados.  Tus pies deben estar separados alrededor de 3 pulgadas o menos. Consejo: Mantén la cabeza erguida en todo momento y también mantén la espalda sobre la almohadilla en todo momento.

Coloque los brazos en las manijas laterales de la máquina y desenganche las barras de seguridad (lo que en la mayoría de los diseños se hace moviendo las manijas laterales desde una posición frontal a una posición diagonal).
Ahora estire las piernas sin bloquear las rodillas.  Esta será tu posición inicial.

Comience a bajar lentamente la unidad doblando las rodillas mientras mantiene una postura recta con la cabeza hacia arriba (de espaldas a la almohadilla en todo momento).  Continúe hacia abajo hasta que el ángulo entre la parte superior de la pierna y las gemelos sea ligeramente inferior a 90 grados (que es el punto en el que la parte superior de las piernas queda paralela al suelo).  Inhala mientras realizas esta parte del movimiento.
Comience a elevar la unidad mientras exhala empujando el suelo principalmente con los talones de los pies mientras estira las piernas nuevamente y regresa a la posición inicial.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.

name: Standing Calf Raise Machine
instructions: Adjust the seat so that your legs are only slightly bent in the start position. The balls of your feet should be firmly on the platform.
Select an appropriate weight, and grasp the handles. This will be your starting position.

Straighten the legs by extending the knees, just barely lifting the weight from the stack. Your ankle should be fully flexed, toes pointing up. Execute the movement by pressing downward through the balls of your feet as far as possible.
After a brief pause, reverse the motion and repeat.

es: Ajuste el asiento de modo que sus piernas queden ligeramente dobladas en la posición inicial. Las puntas de los pies deben estar firmemente apoyadas en la plataforma.
Seleccione un peso adecuado y agarre las asas. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Estire las piernas extendiendo las rodillas, levantando apenas el peso de la pila. Su tobillo debe estar completamente flexionado, con los dedos apuntando hacia arriba. Ejecute el movimiento presionando hacia abajo a través de las puntas de los pies lo más que pueda.
Después de una breve pausa, invierta el movimiento y repita.

name: Bicep Curl Machine
instructions: Sit down on the Preacher Curl Machine and select the weight.

Place the back of your upper arms (your triceps) on the preacher pad provided and grab the handles using an underhand grip (palms facing up).  Tip: Make sure that when you place the arms on the pad you keep the elbows in.  This will be your starting position.

Now lift the handles as you exhale and you contract the biceps.  At the top of the position make sure that you hold the contraction for a second.  Tip: Only the forearms should move.  The upper arms should remain stationary and on the pad at all times.
Lower the handles slowly back to the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

Variations: You can use free weights (barbells and dumbbells) to perform this exercise on a preacher bench.  Alternatively, you can use the pulley machine as well in conjunction with a preacher bench.

en: Sit down on the Preacher Curl Machine and select the weight.

Place the back of your upper arms (your triceps) on the preacher pad provided and grab the handles using an underhand grip (palms facing up).  Tip: Make sure that when you place the arms on the pad you keep the elbows in.  This will be your starting position.

Now lift the handles as you exhale and you contract the biceps.  At the top of the position make sure that you hold the contraction for a second.  Tip: Only the forearms should move.  The upper arms should remain stationary and on the pad at all times.
Lower the handles slowly back to the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

Variations: You can use free weights (barbells and dumbbells) to perform this exercise on a preacher bench.  Alternatively, you can use the pulley machine as well in conjunction with a preacher bench.
es: Siéntate en la máquina Preacher Curl y selecciona el peso.

Coloque la parte posterior de la parte superior de sus brazos (tríceps) sobre la almohadilla de predicador provista y agarre las manijas con las palmas hacia arriba.  Consejo: Asegúrate de que cuando coloques los brazos sobre la almohadilla mantengas los codos hacia adentro. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Ahora levanta las asas mientras exhalas y contraes el bíceps.  En la parte superior de la posición, asegúrate de mantener la contracción por un segundo.  Consejo: Sólo deben moverse los antebrazos.  La parte superior de los brazos debe permanecer fija y sobre la almohadilla en todo momento.
Baje las manijas lentamente hasta la posición inicial mientras inhala.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.

Variaciones: Puedes utilizar pesas libres (barras y mancuernas) para realizar este ejercicio en un banco de predicador.  Alternativamente, también puede utilizar la máquina de poleas junto con un banco de predicador.

name: Lying Hamstring Curls
instructions: Set the resistance of the machine to the prescribed amount and lay on the pad, face down with your heels tucked underneath the ankle brace. Lay with your forehead facing the floor so that your spine is in one straight line. Take hold of the handles and make sure your hips do not lift off the machine whilst you perform the movement. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and pull your heels in towards your glutes by contracting your hamstrings. Continue to pull the pad up and inwards on an arcing motion until the pad gently touches your glutes. Try to keep your hips down whilst you make this movement.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the pad back along the same path into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Standing Hamstring Curl Machine or Natural Glute Ham Raises.

en: Set the resistance of the machine to the prescribed amount and lay on the pad, face down with your heels tucked underneath the ankle brace. Lay with your forehead facing the floor so that your spine is in one straight line. Take hold of the handles and make sure your hips do not lift off the machine whilst you perform the movement. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and pull your heels in towards your glutes by contracting your hamstrings. Continue to pull the pad up and inwards on an arcing motion until the pad gently touches your glutes. Try to keep your hips down whilst you make this movement.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the pad back along the same path into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Standing Hamstring Curl Machine or Natural Glute Ham Raises.
es: Ajuste la resistencia de la máquina a la cantidad prescrita y recuéstese sobre la almohadilla, boca abajo con los talones metidos debajo de la tobillera. Acuéstese con la frente mirando al suelo de modo que la columna esté en línea recta. Sujeta las asas y asegúrate de que tus caderas no se levanten de la máquina mientras realizas el movimiento. Esta es tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, exhala y tira de los talones hacia los glúteos contrayendo los isquiosurales. Continúe tirando de la almohadilla hacia arriba y hacia adentro con un movimiento de arco hasta que la almohadilla toque suavemente sus glúteos. Intenta mantener las caderas hacia abajo mientras realizas este movimiento.
Después de una breve pausa, inhale y regrese la almohadilla por el mismo camino hasta su posición inicial.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: máquina de curl de isquiosurales de pie o elevaciones naturales de glúteos.

en: Hamstrings
es: Isquiotibiales

name: Chest Press Machine
instructions: Take a seat on the machine, facing forwards and adjust the height of the seat so that your hips and knees are at 90 degrees. Load the machine with the desired weight, grip the handles and make sure that your elbows are placed directly behind your wrists. This is your starting position.To initiate the movement, exhale and press the handles forward by flexing your pectoral muscles. It is important to try and relax your shoulders, keep your chest high and make sure your back stays in contact with the back rest. Continue to press the handles forward until either your pectoral muscles are fully contracted or your arms are fully extended (always have a slight bend when extended).After a brief pause, inhale and return the handles back along the same path into their starting position.Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.Variations: Dumbbell Bench Press or Smith Machine Bench Press.

en: Take a seat on the machine, facing forwards and adjust the height of the seat so that your hips and knees are at 90 degrees. Load the machine with the desired weight, grip the handles and make sure that your elbows are placed directly behind your wrists. This is your starting position.To initiate the movement, exhale and press the handles forward by flexing your pectoral muscles. It is important to try and relax your shoulders, keep your chest high and make sure your back stays in contact with the back rest. Continue to press the handles forward until either your pectoral muscles are fully contracted or your arms are fully extended (always have a slight bend when extended).After a brief pause, inhale and return the handles back along the same path into their starting position.Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.Variations: Dumbbell Bench Press or Smith Machine Bench Press.
es: Siéntese en la máquina, mirando hacia adelante y ajuste la altura del asiento para que sus caderas y rodillas queden a 90 grados. Cargue la máquina con el peso deseado, agarre las manijas y asegúrese de que sus codos estén colocados directamente detrás de sus muñecas. Esta es su posición inicial. Para iniciar el movimiento, exhale y presione las manijas hacia adelante flexionando los músculos pectorales. Es importante intentar relajar los hombros, mantener el pecho erguido y asegurarse de que la espalda permanezca en contacto con el respaldo. Continúe presionando las manijas hacia adelante hasta que sus músculos pectorales estén completamente contraídos o sus brazos estén completamente extendidos (siempre tenga una ligera flexión cuando estén extendidos). Después de una breve pausa, inhale y regrese las manijas por el mismo camino a su posición inicial. Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones. Variaciones: Press de banca con mancuernas o Press de banca con máquina Smith.

name: Leg Press
instructions: Set the machine to the desired weight and set the position of the seat (you will want your knees to be at a 90 degree angle when you get into position). Next take a seat and lift your feet up onto the foot plate in front of you. Have your feet shoulder width apart, your knees at 90 degrees and your lower back supported. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and press the foot plate away by putting pressure though your heels and shoes laces. Contract your thigh and glute muscles whilst simultaneously pulling your hips into the seat. Continue to press the foot plate away until your legs are fully extended (slight bend at your knees).
After a brief pause, inhale and return your legs back along the same path into their starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Barbell Squats or Dumbbell Squats.

en: Set the machine to the desired weight and set the position of the seat (you will want your knees to be at a 90 degree angle when you get into position). Next take a seat and lift your feet up onto the foot plate in front of you. Have your feet shoulder width apart, your knees at 90 degrees and your lower back supported. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and press the foot plate away by putting pressure though your heels and shoes laces. Contract your thigh and glute muscles whilst simultaneously pulling your hips into the seat. Continue to press the foot plate away until your legs are fully extended (slight bend at your knees).
After a brief pause, inhale and return your legs back along the same path into their starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Barbell Squats or Dumbbell Squats.
es: Configure la máquina con el peso deseado y establezca la posición del asiento (querrá que sus rodillas estén en un ángulo de 90 grados cuando se coloque en posición). Luego, siéntese y levante los pies sobre la plataforma para pies frente a usted. Mantenga los pies separados a la altura de los hombros, las rodillas a 90 grados y la parte baja de la espalda apoyada. Esta es tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, exhale y presione la placa para los pies hacia afuera ejerciendo presión a través de los talones y los cordones de los zapatos. Contraiga los músculos de los muslos y los glúteos mientras simultáneamente empuja las caderas hacia el asiento. Continúe presionando la plataforma para los pies hasta que las piernas estén completamente extendidas (doble ligeramente las rodillas).
Después de una breve pausa, inhala y regresa las piernas por el mismo camino hasta su posición inicial.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Sentadillas con barra o Sentadillas con mancuernas.

name: Leg Extension
instructions: Set the machine to the desired weight and set the position of the back rest (when you sit on the machine, the back of your knees should be in contact with the edge of the seat). Next take a seat and lock the shin pad in place and take hold of the handles either side of you. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and extend your knees to bring your shins up towards the ceiling. In order to do so, contract your thigh muscles whilst simultaneously pulling your hips into the seat.
After a brief pause, inhale and return your lower legs back along the same path into their starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: 45 Degree Leg Press Shoulder Width Stance or Alternating Dumbbell Lunges.

en: Set the machine to the desired weight and set the position of the back rest (when you sit on the machine, the back of your knees should be in contact with the edge of the seat). Next take a seat and lock the shin pad in place and take hold of the handles either side of you. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and extend your knees to bring your shins up towards the ceiling. In order to do so, contract your thigh muscles whilst simultaneously pulling your hips into the seat.
After a brief pause, inhale and return your lower legs back along the same path into their starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: 45 Degree Leg Press Shoulder Width Stance or Alternating Dumbbell Lunges.
es: Ajuste la máquina al peso deseado y ajuste la posición del respaldo (cuando se siente en la máquina, la parte posterior de las rodillas debe estar en contacto con el borde del asiento). Luego, siéntese, bloquee la espinillera en su lugar y sujete las manijas a cada lado de usted. Esta es tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, exhala y extiende las rodillas para llevar las espinillas hacia el techo. Para hacerlo, contraiga los músculos de los muslos mientras simultáneamente empuja las caderas hacia el asiento.
Después de una breve pausa, inhale y regrese la parte inferior de las piernas por el mismo camino hasta su posición inicial.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Postura de prensa de piernas a 45 grados a lo ancho de los hombros o estocadas alternas con mancuernas.

en: Quadriceps
es: Cuadriceps

name: Back Supported Hanging Knee Raises
instructions: Position your body on the vertical leg raise bench so that your forearms are resting on the pads next to the torso and holding on to the handles.  Your arms will be bent at a 90 degree angle.
The torso should be straight with the lower back pressed against the pad of the machine and the legs extended pointing towards the floor.  This will be your starting position.

Now as you breathe out, lift your legs up as you keep them extended.  Continue this movement until your legs are roughly parallel to the floor and then hold the contraction for a second.  Tip: Do not use any momentum or swinging as you perform this exercise.
Slowly go back to the starting position as you breathe in.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

Variations: As you become more advanced you can start to rotate your pelvis forward at the top of the movement to really engage the lower abs. You may also straighten your legs to increase the difficulty of this movement.

name.es: Elevaciones de rodillas colgantes con apoyo en la espalda

en: Position your body on the vertical leg raise bench so that your forearms are resting on the pads next to the torso and holding on to the handles.  Your arms will be bent at a 90 degree angle.
The torso should be straight with the lower back pressed against the pad of the machine and the legs extended pointing towards the floor.  This will be your starting position.

Now as you breathe out, lift your legs up as you keep them extended.  Continue this movement until your legs are roughly parallel to the floor and then hold the contraction for a second.  Tip: Do not use any momentum or swinging as you perform this exercise.
Slowly go back to the starting position as you breathe in.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

Variations: As you become more advanced you can start to rotate your pelvis forward at the top of the movement to really engage the lower abs. You may also straighten your legs to increase the difficulty of this movement.
es: Coloque su cuerpo en el banco vertical de elevación de piernas de modo que sus antebrazos descansen sobre las almohadillas al lado del torso y se sujeten a las manijas.  Tus brazos estarán doblados en un ángulo de 90 grados.
El torso debe estar recto con la zona lumbar apoyada contra la almohadilla de la máquina y las piernas extendidas apuntando hacia el suelo.  Esta será tu posición inicial.

Ahora, mientras exhalas, levanta las piernas mientras las mantienes extendidas.  Continúe este movimiento hasta que sus piernas estén aproximadamente paralelas al piso y luego mantenga la contracción por un segundo.  Consejo: No utilice ningún impulso ni balanceo mientras realiza este ejercicio.
Vuelve lentamente a la posición inicial mientras inhalas.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.

Variaciones: a medida que avanzas, puedes comenzar a rotar la pelvis hacia adelante en la parte superior del movimiento para involucrar realmente los abdominales inferiores. También puedes estirar las piernas para aumentar la dificultad de este movimiento.

name: Leverage Lat Pulldowns
instructions: Load an appropriate weight onto the pins and adjust the seat height so that you can just reach the handles above you. Adjust the knee pad to help keep you down. Grasp the handles with a pronated grip. This will be your starting position.
Pull the handles towards your torso, retracting your shoulder blades as you flex the elbow.
Pause at the bottom of the motion, and then slowly return the handles to the starting position.
For multiple repetitions, avoid completely returning the weight to the stops to keep tension on the muscles being worked.

en: Load an appropriate weight onto the pins and adjust the seat height so that you can just reach the handles above you. Adjust the knee pad to help keep you down. Grasp the handles with a pronated grip. This will be your starting position.
Pull the handles towards your torso, retracting your shoulder blades as you flex the elbow.
Pause at the bottom of the motion, and then slowly return the handles to the starting position.
For multiple repetitions, avoid completely returning the weight to the stops to keep tension on the muscles being worked.
es: Cargue un peso adecuado en los pasadores y ajuste la altura del asiento para que pueda alcanzar las manijas que están encima de usted. Ajuste la rodillera para ayudarle a mantenerse en el suelo. Sujete las manijas con un agarre en pronación. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Tire de las manijas hacia su torso, retrayendo los omóplatos mientras flexiona el codo.
Haga una pausa en la parte inferior del movimiento y luego regrese lentamente las manijas a la posición inicial.
Para repeticiones múltiples, evite devolver completamente el peso a los topes para mantener la tensión en los músculos que se trabajan.

name: Tricep Dips
instructions: Set the bars of a dip machine to their 'narrow' setting and take a hold of them. Once you are ready, take your feet off the foot plates so that your arms are weight baring. Bent your knees behind you so they are at a 90 degree angle. Keep your elbows extended at this point with your elbows close to your torso. This will be your starting position. Tip: Keep your torso as up right as possible with a straight back throughout.
To initiate the movement, inhale, bend your elbows and descend your torso towards the floor until your elbows are at a 90 degree angle.
After a brief pause, exhale and return your torso back along the same path into its starting position by pushing through your triceps. Tip: Keep your elbows tucked in throughout the movement.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Bench Dips or Cable Skull Crushers.

en: Set the bars of a dip machine to their 'narrow' setting and take a hold of them. Once you are ready, take your feet off the foot plates so that your arms are weight baring. Bent your knees behind you so they are at a 90 degree angle. Keep your elbows extended at this point with your elbows close to your torso. This will be your starting position. Tip: Keep your torso as up right as possible with a straight back throughout.
To initiate the movement, inhale, bend your elbows and descend your torso towards the floor until your elbows are at a 90 degree angle.
After a brief pause, exhale and return your torso back along the same path into its starting position by pushing through your triceps. Tip: Keep your elbows tucked in throughout the movement.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Bench Dips or Cable Skull Crushers.
es: Coloque las barras de una máquina de inmersión en su posición "estrecha" y sujételas. Una vez que esté listo, retire los pies de los reposapiés para que sus brazos queden al descubierto. Doble las rodillas detrás de usted para que formen un ángulo de 90 grados. Mantenga los codos extendidos en este punto con los codos cerca del torso. Esta será tu posición inicial. Consejo: mantenga el torso lo más erguido posible con la espalda recta en todo momento.
Para iniciar el movimiento, inhala, dobla los codos y baja el torso hacia el suelo hasta que los codos formen un ángulo de 90 grados.
Después de una breve pausa, exhala y regresa el torso por el mismo camino hasta su posición inicial empujando los tríceps. Consejo: mantenga los codos doblados durante todo el movimiento.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: fondos en banco o trituradores de cráneos con cable.

name: Chest Supported Rows
instructions: Load up the T-bar Row Machine with the desired weight and adjust the leg height so that your upper chest is at the top of the pad. Tip: In some machines all you can do is stand on the appropriate step that allows you to be at a height that has the upper chest at the top of the pad.
Lay face down on the pad and grab the handles. You can either use a palms down, palms up, or palms in position depending on what part of your back you want to emphasize.
Lift the bar off the rack and extend your arms in front of you.  This will be your starting position.

As you exhale slowly pull the weight up and squeeze your back at the top of the movement. Tip: Keep the upper arms as close to the torso as possible throughout the movement in order to better engage the back muscles.  Also, do not lift your body off of the pad at any time and refrain from using the biceps to lift the weight.
After a second contraction at the top of the movement, as you inhale, slowly go back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

name.es: Remo con apoyo en el pecho

en: Load up the T-bar Row Machine with the desired weight and adjust the leg height so that your upper chest is at the top of the pad. Tip: In some machines all you can do is stand on the appropriate step that allows you to be at a height that has the upper chest at the top of the pad.
Lay face down on the pad and grab the handles. You can either use a palms down, palms up, or palms in position depending on what part of your back you want to emphasize.
Lift the bar off the rack and extend your arms in front of you.  This will be your starting position.

As you exhale slowly pull the weight up and squeeze your back at the top of the movement. Tip: Keep the upper arms as close to the torso as possible throughout the movement in order to better engage the back muscles.  Also, do not lift your body off of the pad at any time and refrain from using the biceps to lift the weight.
After a second contraction at the top of the movement, as you inhale, slowly go back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
es: Cargue la máquina de remo con barra en T con el peso deseado y ajuste la altura de las piernas para que la parte superior del pecho quede en la parte superior de la almohadilla. Consejo: En algunas máquinas lo único que puedes hacer es pararte en el escalón adecuado que te permita estar a una altura que tenga la parte superior del pecho en la parte superior de la almohadilla.

Acuéstese boca abajo sobre la almohadilla y agarre las asas. Puede usar las palmas hacia abajo, las palmas hacia arriba o las palmas en posición dependiendo de qué parte de su espalda desee enfatizar.
Levanta la barra del soporte y extiende los brazos frente a ti.  Esta será tu posición inicial.

Mientras exhalas, levanta lentamente el peso y aprieta la espalda en la parte superior del movimiento. Consejo: Mantenga la parte superior de los brazos lo más cerca posible del torso durante todo el movimiento para activar mejor los músculos de la espalda.  Además, no levante su cuerpo de la almohadilla en ningún momento y absténgase de utilizar los bíceps para levantar el peso.
Después de una segunda contracción en la parte superior del movimiento, mientras inhala, regrese lentamente a la posición inicial.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.

name: Chest Dips
instructions: Set the bars of a dip machine to their 'wide' setting and take a hold of them. Once you are ready, take your feet off the foot plates so that your arms are weight baring. Bent your knees behind you so they are at a 90 degree angle. Keep your elbows extended at this point and gently lean your torso forward by 20-30 degrees. This will be your starting position. Tip: Keep a straight back throughout.
To initiate the movement, inhale, bend your elbows and descend your torso towards the floor until your elbows are at a 90 degree angle.
After a brief pause, exhale and return your torso back along the same path into its starting position by pushing through your chest and triceps.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Smith Machine Bench Press or Machine Bench Press.

en: Set the bars of a dip machine to their 'wide' setting and take a hold of them. Once you are ready, take your feet off the foot plates so that your arms are weight baring. Bent your knees behind you so they are at a 90 degree angle. Keep your elbows extended at this point and gently lean your torso forward by 20-30 degrees. This will be your starting position. Tip: Keep a straight back throughout.
To initiate the movement, inhale, bend your elbows and descend your torso towards the floor until your elbows are at a 90 degree angle.
After a brief pause, exhale and return your torso back along the same path into its starting position by pushing through your chest and triceps.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Smith Machine Bench Press or Machine Bench Press.
es: Coloque las barras de una máquina de inmersión en su posición "ancha" y sujételas. Una vez que esté listo, retire los pies de los reposapiés para que sus brazos queden al descubierto. Doble las rodillas detrás de usted para que formen un ángulo de 90 grados. Mantenga los codos extendidos en este punto e incline suavemente el torso hacia adelante entre 20 y 30 grados. Esta será tu posición inicial. Consejo: mantenga la espalda recta en todo momento.
Para iniciar el movimiento, inhala, dobla los codos y baja el torso hacia el suelo hasta que los codos formen un ángulo de 90 grados.
Después de una breve pausa, exhala y regresa el torso por el mismo camino hasta su posición inicial empujando a través del pecho y los tríceps.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Press de banca con máquina Smith o Press de banca con máquina.
