name: Step Up With Knee Raise
instructions: Stand facing a box or bench of an appropriate height with your feet together. This will be your starting position.

Begin the movement by stepping up, putting your left foot on the top of the bench. Extend through the hip and knee of your front leg to stand up on the box. As you stand on the box with your left leg, flex your right knee and hip, bringing your knee as high as you can.
Reverse this motion to step down off the box, and then repeat the sequence on the opposite leg.

name.es: Da un paso adelante con elevación de rodilla

en: Stand facing a box or bench of an appropriate height with your feet together. This will be your starting position.

Begin the movement by stepping up, putting your left foot on the top of the bench. Extend through the hip and knee of your front leg to stand up on the box. As you stand on the box with your left leg, flex your right knee and hip, bringing your knee as high as you can.
Reverse this motion to step down off the box, and then repeat the sequence on the opposite leg.
es: Párese frente a una caja o banco de una altura adecuada con los pies juntos. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Comience el movimiento subiendo y poniendo el pie izquierdo en la parte superior del banco. Extiende la cadera y la rodilla de la pierna delantera para pararte sobre la caja. Mientras estás parado sobre la caja con la pierna izquierda, flexiona la rodilla y la cadera derechas, elevando la rodilla lo más que puedas.
Invierte este movimiento para bajar de la caja y luego repite la secuencia en la pierna opuesta.

name: Bodyweight Bulgarian Split Squats
instructions: Being in a standing position. Jump into a split leg position, with one leg forward and one leg back, flexing the knees and lowering your hips slightly as you do so.
As you descend, immediately reverse direction, standing back up and jumping, reversing the position of your legs. Repeat 5-10 times on each leg.

name.es: Sentadillas divididas búlgaras con peso corporal

en: Being in a standing position. Jump into a split leg position, with one leg forward and one leg back, flexing the knees and lowering your hips slightly as you do so.
As you descend, immediately reverse direction, standing back up and jumping, reversing the position of your legs. Repeat 5-10 times on each leg.
es: Estar en posición de pie. Salta a una posición de pierna dividida, con una pierna hacia adelante y otra hacia atrás, flexionando las rodillas y bajando ligeramente las caderas mientras lo haces.
A medida que desciendes, invierte inmediatamente la dirección, levantándote y saltando, invirtiendo la posición de tus piernas. Repita de 5 a 10 veces en cada pierna.

name: Narrow Grip Press Ups
instructions: Lie on the floor face down and place your hands closer than shoulder width for a close hand position. Make sure that you are holding your torso up at arms' length.
Lower yourself until your chest almost touches the floor as you inhale.
Using your triceps and some of your pectoral muscles, press your upper body back up to the starting position and squeeze your chest. Breathe out as you perform this step.
After a second pause at the contracted position, repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
Variations:

If you are new at this exercise and do not have the strength to perform it, you can either bend your legs at the knees to take off resistance or perform the exercise against the wall instead of the floor.
For the most advanced lifters, you can place your feet at a high surface such as a bench in order to increase the resistance.
See Also: Push-Up

en: Lie on the floor face down and place your hands closer than shoulder width for a close hand position. Make sure that you are holding your torso up at arms' length.
Lower yourself until your chest almost touches the floor as you inhale.
Using your triceps and some of your pectoral muscles, press your upper body back up to the starting position and squeeze your chest. Breathe out as you perform this step.
After a second pause at the contracted position, repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
Variations:

If you are new at this exercise and do not have the strength to perform it, you can either bend your legs at the knees to take off resistance or perform the exercise against the wall instead of the floor.

es: Acuéstese en el suelo boca abajo y coloque las manos más cerca que el ancho de los hombros para lograr una posición más cercana. Asegúrate de sostener el torso con los brazos extendidos.
Bájate hasta que tu pecho casi toque el suelo mientras inhalas.
Usando los tríceps y algunos de los músculos pectorales, presione la parte superior del cuerpo hacia la posición inicial y apriete el pecho. Exhale mientras realiza este paso.
Después de una segunda pausa en la posición contraída, repita el movimiento durante la cantidad prescrita de repeticiones.
Variaciones:

Si eres nuevo en este ejercicio y no tienes la fuerza para realizarlo, puedes doblar las piernas a la altura de las rodillas para quitar resistencia o realizar el ejercicio contra la pared en lugar del suelo.
Para los levantadores más avanzados, puedes colocar los pies en una superficie alta, como un banco, para aumentar la resistencia.
Ver también: Flexiones

name: Wide Grip Pull Ups
instructions: Take hold of a pull up bar with a wide, overhand grip (palms facing away from you). After you have securely taken hold of the handles, take your feet off the floor so that your body is now hanging from your grip. Pull your heels in towards your glutes so your knees are bent to a 90 degree angle and your hips are pushed forwards. Your arms should be at full extension at this point. This will be your starting position.

To initiate this movement, exhale and pull your torso upward towards your hands as you contract your biceps and the muscles across your back (more so with your back). Continue to pull yourself up until your chest is as high as it can be.
After a brief pause, return your torso back along the same path into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Lat Pulldowns or T-Bar Rows with a Handle.

en: Take hold of a pull up bar with a wide, overhand grip (palms facing away from you). After you have securely taken hold of the handles, take your feet off the floor so that your body is now hanging from your grip. Pull your heels in towards your glutes so your knees are bent to a 90 degree angle and your hips are pushed forwards. Your arms should be at full extension at this point. This will be your starting position.

To initiate this movement, exhale and pull your torso upward towards your hands as you contract your biceps and the muscles across your back (more so with your back). Continue to pull yourself up until your chest is as high as it can be.
After a brief pause, return your torso back along the same path into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Lat Pulldowns or T-Bar Rows with a Handle.
es: Sujete una barra de dominadas con un agarre amplio y por encima de la cabeza (con las palmas hacia afuera). Después de haber agarrado firmemente las manijas, levante los pies del piso para que su cuerpo cuelgue de su agarre. Tire de los talones hacia los glúteos para que las rodillas queden dobladas en un ángulo de 90 grados y las caderas empujadas hacia adelante. Tus brazos deben estar completamente extendidos en este punto. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar este movimiento, exhale y tire del torso hacia las manos mientras contrae los bíceps y los músculos de la espalda (más aún en la espalda). Continúe levantándose hasta que su pecho esté lo más alto posible.
Después de una breve pausa, regrese el torso por el mismo camino hasta su posición inicial.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Jalones laterales o remo con barra en T con mango.

name: Parallel Bar Dips
instructions: Stand between a set of parallel bars. Place a hand on each bar, and then take a small jump to help you get into the starting position with your arms locked out.
Begin by flexing the elbow, lowering your body until your arms break 90 degrees. Avoid swinging, and maintain good posture throughout the descent.
Reverse the motion by extending the elbow, pushing yourself back up into the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

en: Stand between a set of parallel bars. Place a hand on each bar, and then take a small jump to help you get into the starting position with your arms locked out.
Begin by flexing the elbow, lowering your body until your arms break 90 degrees. Avoid swinging, and maintain good posture throughout the descent.
Reverse the motion by extending the elbow, pushing yourself back up into the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
es: Párate entre un conjunto de barras paralelas. Coloque una mano en cada barra y luego dé un pequeño salto para ayudarlo a llegar a la posición inicial con los brazos bloqueados.
Comienza flexionando el codo, bajando el cuerpo hasta que los brazos rompan los 90 grados. Evite balancearse y mantenga una buena postura durante todo el descenso.
Invierta el movimiento extendiendo el codo y empujándose hacia arriba hasta la posición inicial.
Repita hasta el número deseado de repeticiones.

name: Mountain Climbers
instructions: Start off in a press up position with your hands just wider than shoulder width and your toes being the only other point of contact with the floor. Your body should be suspended in a straight line from your heels to your shoulders above the floor. This will be your starting position.
Bring your right knee underneath your body so that it is as close to your chest as you can get it.
Exhale and swap your right leg for your left and as fast as you can.
Continue to alternate your legs and bring each knee in as close to your chest as possible. Tip: Take shallow breaths whilst you are performing the movement.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Ab Bike or High Knees.

en: Start off in a press up position with your hands just wider than shoulder width and your toes being the only other point of contact with the floor. Your body should be suspended in a straight line from your heels to your shoulders above the floor. This will be your starting position.
Bring your right knee underneath your body so that it is as close to your chest as you can get it.
Exhale and swap your right leg for your left and as fast as you can.
Continue to alternate your legs and bring each knee in as close to your chest as possible. Tip: Take shallow breaths whilst you are performing the movement.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Ab Bike or High Knees.
es: Comience en una posición de flexión hacia arriba con las manos un poco más anchas que el ancho de los hombros y los dedos de los pies siendo el único otro punto de contacto con el suelo. Su cuerpo debe estar suspendido en línea recta desde los talones hasta los hombros por encima del suelo. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Coloque la rodilla derecha debajo de su cuerpo para que quede lo más cerca posible de su pecho.
Exhala y cambia tu pierna derecha por la izquierda y lo más rápido que puedas.
Continúe alternando las piernas y acerque cada rodilla lo más posible al pecho. Consejo: respire superficialmente mientras realiza el movimiento.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Ab Bike o Rodillas Altas.

name: Bodyweight Squat Jumps
instructions: Stand with a slightly wider than shoulder width stance, toes pointing (slightly) outward with your back straight and chest out.
Throughout the movement you should keep your head up and maintain good posture. This will be your starting position.
Inhale and descend slowly by bending your knees and hips until your thighs are parallel with the floor. Tip: When at the bottom of the movement your knees should be behind your toes.

Once you have hit the bottom of the movement, exhale and push hard through your heels to drive your hips forward. Extend at your knee and ankle joints in order to jump as high as you can before landing into your next rep.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Kettlebell Jump Squats or Barbell Jump Squats.

name.es: Saltos en cuclillas con peso corporal

en: Stand with a slightly wider than shoulder width stance, toes pointing (slightly) outward with your back straight and chest out.
Throughout the movement you should keep your head up and maintain good posture. This will be your starting position.
Inhale and descend slowly by bending your knees and hips until your thighs are parallel with the floor. Tip: When at the bottom of the movement your knees should be behind your toes.

Once you have hit the bottom of the movement, exhale and push hard through your heels to drive your hips forward. Extend at your knee and ankle joints in order to jump as high as you can before landing into your next rep.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Kettlebell Jump Squats or Barbell Jump Squats.
es: Párese con una postura ligeramente más ancha que el ancho de los hombros, con los dedos de los pies apuntando (ligeramente) hacia afuera con la espalda recta y el pecho hacia afuera.
Durante todo el movimiento debes mantener la cabeza erguida y mantener una buena postura. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Inhala y desciende lentamente doblando las rodillas y las caderas hasta que los muslos queden paralelos al suelo. Consejo: cuando estés en la parte inferior del movimiento, tus rodillas deben estar detrás de los dedos de los pies.

Una vez que hayas llegado al final del movimiento, exhala y empuja con fuerza los talones para impulsar las caderas hacia adelante. Extiende las articulaciones de la rodilla y el tobillo para saltar lo más alto que puedas antes de aterrizar en tu siguiente repetición.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: sentadillas con salto con pesa rusa o sentadillas con salto con barra.

name: Alternating Bodyweight Curtsy Squats
instructions: Stand with your feet shoulder width apart. This will be your starting position.
Perform a rear lunge by stepping back with one foot and flexing the hips and front knee. As you do so, rotate your torso across the front leg.
After a brief pause, return to the starting position and repeat on the other side, continuing in an alternating fashion.

name.es: Sentadillas con reverencias alternas con peso corporal

en: Stand with your feet shoulder width apart. This will be your starting position.
Perform a rear lunge by stepping back with one foot and flexing the hips and front knee. As you do so, rotate your torso across the front leg.
After a brief pause, return to the starting position and repeat on the other side, continuing in an alternating fashion.
es: Párese con los pies separados a la altura de los hombros. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Realice una estocada trasera dando un paso atrás con un pie y flexionando las caderas y la rodilla delantera. Mientras lo hace, gire el torso sobre la pierna delantera.
Después de una breve pausa, regresa a la posición inicial y repite del otro lado, continuando de forma alterna.

name: Chin Ups
instructions: Take hold of a pull up bar with a shoulder width, underhand grip (palms facing towards you). After you have securely taken hold of the handles, take your feet off the floor so that your body is now hanging from your grip. Pull your heels in towards your glutes so your knees are bent to a 90 degree angle and your hips are pushed forwards. Your arms should be at full extension at this point. This will be your starting position.

To initiate this movement, exhale and pull your torso upward towards your palms as you contract your biceps and the muscles across your back. Continue to pull yourself up until your chest is as high as you can get it.
After a brief pause, return your torso back along the same path into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Underhand Cable Pulldowns or Horizontal Barbell Pull Ups.

name: Bodyweight Box Squats
instructions: Adopt a shoulder width stance with your toes slightly pointing outward just in front of a box. Maintain a straight back throughout the movement and keep your head up. This will be your starting position.
Inhale and begin to descend by bending at your knees and hips. Your weight should be put predominantly through your heels as you sit back into the movement until your glutes gently touch the box.

After a brief pause, exhale and return your torso back into its starting position along the same path, push through your heels with the force being driven through your quads and glutes to do so. Stand to attention with your legs fully extended, back straight and shoulders relaxed.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dumbbell Squats To A Bench or Barbell Squats To A Box.

name.es: Sentadillas en caja con peso corporal

en: Adopt a shoulder width stance with your toes slightly pointing outward just in front of a box. Maintain a straight back throughout the movement and keep your head up. This will be your starting position.
Inhale and begin to descend by bending at your knees and hips. Your weight should be put predominantly through your heels as you sit back into the movement until your glutes gently touch the box.

After a brief pause, exhale and return your torso back into its starting position along the same path, push through your heels with the force being driven through your quads and glutes to do so. Stand to attention with your legs fully extended, back straight and shoulders relaxed.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dumbbell Squats To A Bench or Barbell Squats To A Box.
es: Adopte una postura a la altura de los hombros con los dedos de los pies ligeramente apuntando hacia afuera, justo en frente de una caja. Mantenga la espalda recta durante todo el movimiento y mantenga la cabeza erguida. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Inhala y comienza a descender doblando las rodillas y las caderas. Su peso debe colocarse predominantemente a través de los talones mientras se sienta hacia atrás en el movimiento hasta que sus glúteos toquen suavemente la caja.

Después de una breve pausa, exhala y regresa el torso a su posición inicial siguiendo el mismo camino, empuja los talones con la fuerza impulsada a través de los cuádriceps y los glúteos para hacerlo. Párese firme con las piernas completamente extendidas, la espalda recta y los hombros relajados.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: sentadillas con mancuernas en un banco o sentadillas con barra en una caja.

name: Bent Knee Hip Raises
instructions: Lay down on a mat (face up) with your knees bent to a 90 degree angle (feet still on the floor) with your arms placed beside your torso. This will be your starting position.
Exhale and use your lower abs to lift your feet up and off the floor and contract your knees in towards your chest (maintain the bend at your knees throughout the movement).
Once your abs are as tight as they can be, inhale and return your knees back along the same path into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variation: Cocoons or Reverse Crunches.

name.es: Elevaciones de cadera con rodilla doblada

en: Lay down on a mat (face up) with your knees bent to a 90 degree angle (feet still on the floor) with your arms placed beside your torso. This will be your starting position.
Exhale and use your lower abs to lift your feet up and off the floor and contract your knees in towards your chest (maintain the bend at your knees throughout the movement).
Once your abs are as tight as they can be, inhale and return your knees back along the same path into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variation: Cocoons or Reverse Crunches.
es: Acuéstese sobre una colchoneta (boca arriba) con las rodillas dobladas en un ángulo de 90 grados (los pies todavía en el suelo) y los brazos colocados al lado del torso. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Exhale y use sus abdominales inferiores para levantar los pies del piso y contraer las rodillas hacia el pecho (mantenga las rodillas dobladas durante todo el movimiento).
Una vez que tus abdominales estén lo más tensos posible, inhala y regresa las rodillas por el mismo camino hasta la posición inicial.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variación: Capullos o Crujidos Inversos.

name: Bench Dips
instructions: Place your hands just wider than shoulder width on the side of a bench and elevate your feet onto a parallel bench. Your legs should be straight with your hips at a 90 degree angle suspended off the floor. This will be your starting position.
To initiate this movement, inhale and descend your pelvis towards the floor through gently bending your elbows until they create a 90 degree angle.
Pause for a brief moment in this position, then exhale and flex your triceps to extend your elbows, returning your torso back along the same path into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Narrow Grip Bench Press or Tricep Rope Extension.

es: Coloque las manos un poco más anchas que el ancho de los hombros al costado de un banco y levante los pies sobre un banco paralelo. Tus piernas deben estar rectas con las caderas en un ángulo de 90 grados suspendidas del suelo. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Para iniciar este movimiento, inhale y descienda la pelvis hacia el suelo doblando suavemente los codos hasta crear un ángulo de 90 grados.
Haga una pausa por un breve momento en esta posición, luego exhale y flexione los tríceps para extender los codos, regresando el torso por el mismo camino hasta la posición inicial.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Press de banca con agarre estrecho o extensión de cuerda para tríceps.

name: Ankle Circles

Lift your right foot a couple of inches off the floor and draw a big circle with your big toe.
Continue in this fashion until you have completed the required amount of repetitions and swap sides.

name: Bodyweight Squats
instructions: Adopt a wide standing stance with your hands behind your head, elbows relaxed out wide. This will be your starting position.
To initiate the movement, inhale and bend at your knees and hips to descend your pelvis either in line or just past your knees. Tip: Keep a straight back throughout and maintain good posture.
Once you get to the bottom of the movement, exhale and press through your heels to extend your hip and knee joints, elevating your torso back along the same path into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dumbbell Squats or Barbell Squats.

en: Adopt a wide standing stance with your hands behind your head, elbows relaxed out wide. This will be your starting position.

Once you get to the bottom of the movement, exhale and press through your heels to extend your hip and knee joints, elevating your torso back along the same path into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dumbbell Squats or Barbell Squats.
es: Adopte una postura amplia de pie con las manos detrás de la cabeza y los codos completamente relajados. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, inhale y doble las rodillas y las caderas para descender la pelvis, ya sea en línea o justo por encima de las rodillas. Consejo: Mantenga la espalda recta en todo momento y mantenga una buena postura.

Una vez que llegue al final del movimiento, exhale y presione con los talones para extender las articulaciones de la cadera y la rodilla, elevando el torso hacia atrás por el mismo camino hasta la posición inicial.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: sentadillas con mancuernas o sentadillas con barra.

name: Alternating Kettlebell Renegade Rows
instructions: Place two kettlebells on the floor about shoulder width apart. Adopt an 'all-fours' position but instead of having your hands on the floor, take hold of the kettlebells with a neutral (palms facing each other) grip. At this point you should extend your legs out behind you so that your body is suspended above the floor in a straight line with your toes and the kettlebells being the only points of contact you have with the floor. The kettlebells should be directly below your chest so that your arms are perpendicular to the floor. This will be your starting position.

Whilst exhaling, row one of the kettlebells towards the side of your torso by squeezing the muscles in your back. Continue to pull your elbow as high as you can until your body wants to rotate. Keep your other arm stationary in the starting position.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the kettlebell back along the same path to the starting position.
Repeat for the opposite side and alternate between arms.
Continue in this manner until you complete the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Single Arm Rows or Alternating Dumbbell Renegade Rows.

mientras exhaling, row one of the kettlebells hacia the lado of tu torso by squeezing the muscles in tu espalda. Continúa to tira tu codo as high as can hasta que tu cuerpo wants to rota. Mantén tu other brazo stationary in la posición inicial.

name: Alternating Kettlebell Hang Clean
instructions: Grab a kettlebell in each hand and adopt a slightly wider than shoulder width stance. Take hold of the kettlebells with an overhand grip (palms facing your thighs) and stand upright with your arms hanging perpendicular to the floor in front of your body. This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and bring one of the kettlebells up to shoulder height whilst relaxing your grip to allow the kettlebell to swing up and over to the back of your wrist. To do this, you will need to pull your elbow up toward the ceiling as fast as you can.

Immediately after doing this, take shallow breaths and return the kettlebell back along the same path back to its starting position. Whilst you are returning the first kettlebell back to its original position, pull your other kettlebell up to your shoulder. Once again, pull your elbow upwards as fast as you can and relax your grip to allow the kettlebell to flip over to the reverse side of your wrist.
Continue to alternate as you go and repeat this movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Cleans or Dumbbell Cleans.

en: Grab a kettlebell in each hand and adopt a slightly wider than shoulder width stance. Take hold of the kettlebells with an overhand grip (palms facing your thighs) and stand upright with your arms hanging perpendicular to the floor in front of your body. This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and bring one of the kettlebells up to shoulder height whilst relaxing your grip to allow the kettlebell to swing up and over to the back of your wrist. To do this, you will need to pull your elbow up toward the ceiling as fast as you can.

Immediately after doing this, take shallow breaths and return the kettlebell back along the same path back to its starting position. Whilst you are returning the first kettlebell back to its original position, pull your other kettlebell up to your shoulder. Once again, pull your elbow upwards as fast as you can and relax your grip to allow the kettlebell to flip over to the reverse side of your wrist.
Continue to alternate as you go and repeat this movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Cleans or Dumbbell Cleans.

name: Alternating Kettlebell Bent Over Rows
instructions: Grab a kettlebell in each hand (palms facing your torso), bend your knees slightly and bring your torso forward by bending at your hips; as you bend make sure to keep your back straight until it is almost parallel to the floor. Tip: Make sure that you keep your spine in a neutral position. The weights should hang directly in front of you as your arms are perpendicular to the floor and your torso. This is your starting position.

While keeping the torso stationary, lift one of the kettlebells to your side (as you exhale), elevating your elbow towards the ceiling (do not exert any force with the forearm other than holding the weights). At the top contracted position, squeeze the back muscles and hold for a second.
Slowly lower the weight to the starting position as you inhale.
Once you have completed this movement, repeat for the opposite side.
Continue in this manner until you have completed the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution:
This exercise is not recommended for people with back issues. A Low Cable Row is a better choice for people with back pain.
Ensure perfect form and never round the back as this can cause injury.
Be cautious with the weights you are using. If you are in doubt, use a lesser weight.
Variations: Dumbbell Bent Over Rows or Barbell Bent Over Rows.

en: Grab a kettlebell in each hand (palms facing your torso), bend your knees slightly and bring your torso forward by bending at your hips; as you bend make sure to keep your back straight until it is almost parallel to the floor. Tip: Make sure that you keep your spine in a neutral position. The weights should hang directly in front of you as your arms are perpendicular to the floor and your torso. This is your starting position.

While keeping the torso stationary, lift one of the kettlebells to your side (as you exhale), elevating your elbow towards the ceiling (do not exert any force with the forearm other than holding the weights). At the top contracted position, squeeze the back muscles and hold for a second.
Slowly lower the weight to the starting position as you inhale.
Once you have completed this movement, repeat for the opposite side.
Continue in this manner until you have completed the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution:
This exercise is not recommended for people with back issues. A Low Cable Row is a better choice for people with back pain.
Ensure perfect form and never round the back as this can cause injury.
Be cautious with the weights you are using. If you are in doubt, use a lesser weight.
Variations: Dumbbell Bent Over Rows or Barbell Bent Over Rows.
es: Coge a kettlebell in each mano (palmas facing tu torso), flexiona tu rodillas slightly and lleva tu torso hacia delante by flexionaing at tu caderas; as flexiona make sure to mantén tu espalda recto hasta que it is almost parallel to el suelo. Consejo: Make sure that mantén tu spine in a neutral posición. The pesos should hang directamente delante de as tu brazos are perpendicular to el suelo and tu torso. Esta es tu posición inicial.

While manténing the torso stationary, eleva one of the kettlebells to tu lado (as exhala), elevating tu codo hacia el techo (do not exert any fuerza with the antebrazo other than holding the pesos). At the parte superior contracted posición, squeeze la espalda muscles and hold for a second.
Slowly baja the peso to la posición inicial as inhala.
Once have completed this movimiento, repeat for the contrario lado.
Continúa in this manner hasta que have completed the número indicado de repeticiones.
Precaución:
This exercise is not recommended for people with espalda issues. A Low Cable Row is a better choice for people with espalda pain.
Ensure perfect form and never round la espalda as this can cause injury.
Be cautious with the pesos are using. If are in doubt, use a lesser peso.
Variaciones: Dumbbell Bent Over Rows or Barbell Bent Over Rows.

name: Sit Ups
instructions: Grab a mat and lay down flat on your back. Place your hands gently on your temples/chest and bend your knees so that you have a 90 degree angle (you can tuck your feet under a couple of dumbbells for assistance). This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and curl your shoulders up and off the mat towards your knees by contracting your abdominal muscles. Continue in this fashion until your torso is vertical to the floor and your chest is very close to your knees.
After a brief pause, inhale and return your body back along the same path into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Crunches or Cable Crunches.

Después de una breve pausa, inhala and vuelve tu cuerpo espalda along the same path into la posición inicial.

Variaciones: Crunches or Cable Crunches.

name: Reverse Crunches
instructions: Grab a mat and lay down flat on your back. Have your hands gently placed on your temples with your knees and hips bent at a 90 degree angle. Your thighs should be vertical from the floor and lower legs parallel to the floor. This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and pull your knees in towards your torso by contracting your abdominal muscles. Continue with this movement until your knees are as close to your shoulders as they can be.
After a brief pause, inhale and return your body along the same path back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Flat Bench Leg Pull-In or Cocoons.

name: Push Up to Side Plank
instructions: To start this exercise kneel down on the floor, and lean forward so that you are now weight baring on your arms. Have your hands placed just outside of where your chest would be. Now you should come up onto your feet so that your body is suspended above the floor, the only points of contact (with the floor) should be your hands and feet. Your body should be in one straight line from head to toe and your arms perpendicular to the floor under your chest. This will be your starting position.

Whilst inhaling, slowly lower your chest towards the ground whist flaring your elbows out wide. When you are about an inch or so from the ground, you should have created a triangle with your hand positions and your eye line.

Pause for a brief movement, exhale and press through your palms to return your body along the same path to the starting position. Tip: Squeeze your pectoral muscles as you do so and when you get to the top of the movement, do not lock your elbows out.

Next, Whilst still exhaling, lift one of your hands off the floor whilst roating your torso. You should continue to rotate until your chest is perpendicular to the floor (facing the wall rather than the floor) creating a side on 'T' position.
After a brief pause, inhale and return your torso back along the same path into the starting position.
You can either complete all repetitions on one side first or alternate as you go.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variation: Plank With Twist or Plank.

name: Plank
instructions: Firstly, place a mat on the floor underneath your torso as you adopt an 'all-fours' position above it. From here you will need to bend your elbows to a 90 degree angle and place your upper body weight onto your forearms. After you have done that, take a step backwards with your feet and place your remaining bodyweight through your toes. At this point your body should be suspended (in a straight line) above the floor with just your forearms and toes as points of contact. This will be your starting position.

Keep your abdominal muscles tight throughout this exercise and keep your pelvis in line with the rest of your body to minimise risk of injury to your lower back (you can elevate your pelvis slightly to reduce lower back pain).
Hold this position for as long as you can or for the recommended amount of time.

Hold this posición for as long as can or for the recommended cantidad of time.

name: Leg Pull Ins
instructions: Grab a flat bench, take a seat on it and grip the bench with your hands behind your back. At this point you should bend at your knees and hips in order to tuck your knees in as close to your chest as possible. Lean your torso forward into your knees to create optimal contraction within your abdominal muscles. This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, inhale and simultaneously extend your knee and hip joints so that your legs are just above parallel to the floor whilst leaning your torso backwards to lengthen your abdominals. Your arms should be taking as little weight as possible so that your core is working at it's maximum, this is at your discretion.
After a brief pause, exhale and return your torso and legs back along the same path into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Cocoons or Flat Bench Leg Pull Ins.

name: Hanging Leg Raises
instructions: Take hold of a chin up bar/handles and allow your body to hang perpendicular to the floor. This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and elevate your legs in front of your body by contracting your abdominal muscles (either keeping them as straight as possible, or bending at the knees) until they create a 90 degree angle with your torso (if you have bent your knees, you should have a 90 degree angle at both your hips and knees).
After a brief pause, inhale and return your legs back along the same path into the starting position. Tip: This movement should be slow and controlled so that you do not swing.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Hip Raises or Flat Bench Leg Pull Ins.

After a brief pause, inhale and return your legs back along the same path into the starting position. Tip: This movement should be slow and controlled so that you do not swing.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Hip Raises or Flat Bench Leg Pull Ins.

name: Flat Bench Lying Leg Raises
instructions: Grab a bench and lay flat on your back, your arms should be holding onto the bench by the side of your head. Elevate your legs (at full extension) vertically towards the ceiling until you create a 90 degree bend at your hips. Tip: Keep your legs extended throughout the movement. This will be your starting position.
To initiate the movement, inhale and start to descend your legs on an arcing motion towards the floor. Continue to descend until your legs are parallel with the floor.
After a brief pause, exhale and return your legs along the same path back into their starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Hanging Leg Raises or Reverse Crunches.

name: Decline Crunches
instructions: Find yourself a decline bench (around 30 degrees) and lay down flat on your back. Place your hands gently on your temples/chest and secure your legs so you don't slip down the bench (you can tuck your feet under a couple of dumbbells for assistance). This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and curl your shoulders up and off the bench towards your knees by contracting your abdominal muscles. Continue in this fashion until your torso is vertical to the floor and your chest is very close to your knees.
After a brief pause, inhale and return your body back along the same path into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Crunches or Cable Crunches.

After a brief pause, inhale and return your body back along the same path into the starting position.

name: Alternating Heel Touches
instructions: Grab a mat and lay down flat on your back. Place your hands gently on your chest and lift your legs so that you have a 90 degree angle at both your hips and knees. Crunch your abs so that you lift your shoulders up from the mat and you are ready to go. This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and reach around the side of your body with your right hand towards your right heel, your legs should remain stationary. Tip: To acheive a peak contraction, crunch upward slightly as you go.
After a brief pause inhale and return your body along the same path back to the starting position.
Now repeat the movement for your left hand side. Exhale and reach around your body with your left arm towards your left heel. Inhale and return to the starting position.
Continue alternating in this manner until you complete the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variation: Weighted Side Bends.

en: Grab a mat and lay down flat on your back. Place your hands gently on your chest and lift your legs so that you have a 90 degree angle at both your hips and knees. Crunch your abs so that you lift your shoulders up from the mat and you are ready to go. This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and reach around the side of your body with your right hand towards your right heel, your legs should remain stationary. Tip: To acheive a peak contraction, crunch upward slightly as you go.
After a brief pause inhale and return your body along the same path back to the starting position.
Now repeat the movement for your left hand side. Exhale and reach around your body with your left arm towards your left heel. Inhale and return to the starting position.
Continue alternating in this manner until you complete the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variation: Weighted Side Bends.

Para iniciar el movimiento, exhala and reach around the lado of tu cuerpo con tu derecho mano hacia tu derecho talón, tu piernas should remain stationary. Consejo: To acheive a peak contraction, crunch arriba slightly durante el movimiento.
Después de una breve pausa inhala and vuelve tu cuerpo along the same path espalda to la posición inicial.

name: Ab Wheels Rollout
instructions: Grab an ab-wheel and place it on the floor at the end of a mat. Kneel down on the mat and adopt an overhand grip on the wheel. With a bend at your knees and hips, lean your bodyweight forward so that your (straight) arms are holding you upright. This will be your starting position.
To initiate the movement, inhale and slowly roll the wheel forward, stretching your arms out as far as you can whilst dropping your pelvis down at the same time.
After a brief pause, exhale and use your abdominal muscles to pull the wheel back along the same path into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: If you suffer from any lower back pain or hernias, this exercise is not suitable.
Variation: Barbell Roll Out.

en: Grab an ab-wheel and place it on the floor at the end of a mat. Kneel down on the mat and adopt an overhand grip on the wheel. With a bend at your knees and hips, lean your bodyweight forward so that your (straight) arms are holding you upright. This will be your starting position.
To initiate the movement, inhale and slowly roll the wheel forward, stretching your arms out as far as you can whilst dropping your pelvis down at the same time.
After a brief pause, exhale and use your abdominal muscles to pull the wheel back along the same path into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: If you suffer from any lower back pain or hernias, this exercise is not suitable.
Variation: Barbell Roll Out.
es: Coge an ab-wtalón and coloca it on el suelo at the end of a colchoneta. Kneel down on the colchoneta and adopt an agarre prono on the wtalón. With a flexiona at tu rodillas and caderas, inclínate tu peso corporal hacia delante so that tu (recto) brazos are holding erguido. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Para iniciar el movimiento, inhala and lentamente roll the wtalón hacia delante, estiramientoing tu brazos out todo lo as can mientras dropping tu pelvis down at the same time.
Después de una breve pausa, exhala and use tu músculos abdominales to tira the wtalón espalda along the same path into la posición inicial.
Repite el número indicado de repeticiones.
Precaución: If suffer from any zona lumbar pain or hernias, this exercise is not suitable.
Variación: Barbell Roll Out.

name: 3:4 Sit Up
instructions: Grab a mat and lay down flat on your back. Place your hands gently on your temples/chest and bend your knees so that you have a 90 degree angle (you can tuck your feet under a couple of dumbbells for assistance). This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and curl your shoulders up and off the mat towards your knees by contracting your abdominal muscles. Continue in this fashion until your torso is 3/4 of the way towards being vertical to the floor.
After a brief pause, inhale and return your body back along the same path into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Crunches or Sit-Ups.

en: Grab a mat and lay down flat on your back. Place your hands gently on your temples/chest and bend your knees so that you have a 90 degree angle (you can tuck your feet under a couple of dumbbells for assistance). This will be your starting position.

es: Coge a colchoneta and lay down flat on tu espalda. Coloca tu manos suavemente on tu temples/pecho and flexiona tu rodillas so that have a 90 degree angle ( can tuck tu pies under a couple of mancuernas for assipostura). Esta será tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, exhala and curl tu hombros up and off the colchoneta hacia tu rodillas by contracting tu músculos abdominales. Continúa in this fashion hasta que tu torso is 3/4 of the way hacia being vertical to el suelo.
Después de una breve pausa, inhala and vuelve tu cuerpo espalda along the same path into la posición inicial.
Repite el número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Crunches or Siéntate-Ups.

name: Banded Glute Bridges
instructions: Securely attach a dynaband around two rigid structures very close to, if not on the floor. Once you have done this, lay down (face up) so that your hips are under the band. Have your torso flat on the floor with your arms by your sides. Your feet should be planted on the floor with your knees bent at an acute angle (less than 90 degrees). This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and drive through your heels to lift your hips toward the ceiling by squeezing your glutes. As you do so, lean back onto your shoulders and keep driving upward until your glutes are fully contracted.

After a brief pause, inhale and gently relax your glutes to drop your pelvis towards the floor (the resistance should be placed through your heels). Continue to drop your pelvis until your glutes touch the floor.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Barbell Glute Bridge or Barbell Hip Thrust.

es: Fijaly attach a dynabanda around two rigid structures very close to, if not on the suelo. Once you have done this, lay down (boca arriba) so that your caderas are under the banda. Have your torso flat on the suelo with your brazos by your sides. Your pies should be planted on the suelo with your rodillas bent at an acute angle (less than 90 degrees). Esta es la posición inicial.

To initiate the movimiento, espira and drive through your talones to lift your caderas toward the techo by squeezing your glúteos. As you do so, lean espalda onto your hombros and keep driving upward until your glúteos are fully contracted.

Tras una breve pausa, inspira and gently relax your glúteos to drop your pelvis hacia the suelo (the resistencia should be placed through your talones). Continue to drop your pelvis until your glúteos touch the suelo.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variaciones: barra Glute Bridge or barra Hip Thrust.

name: Band Pull Aparts
instructions: Grab a band and take hold of it with both hands (adjust the width of your hands for more or less resistance). Keeping your arms straight (slight bend at your elbows), lift the band up to shoulder height in front of you.

To initiate the movement, exhale and pull your arms back out wide beside you, stretching the band as you go. Your body should now be in a 'T' shape with the band gently touching your chest. Tip: Keep your elbows slightly bent throughout the movement and try not to rock or sway in order to stretch the band.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the band back along the same path into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

es: Coge a banda and take hold of it with both manos (adjust the width of your manos for more or less resistencia). Manténing your brazos straight (slight bend at your codos), lift the banda up to hombro height in front of you.

To initiate the movimiento, espira and pull your brazos espalda out wide beside you, stretching the banda as you go. Your body should now be in a 'T' shape with the banda gently touching your pecho. Consejo: Mantén your codos slightly bent throughout the movimiento and try not to rock or sway in order to stretch the banda.
Tras una breve pausa, inspira and return the banda espalda along the same path into the posición inicial.

name: Hamstring Curls On Exercise Ball
instructions: Lay on your back on a mat with your feet propped up on top of a swiss ball. Your arms should be laying flat alongside your torso. Have your heels so that they are in the centre of the swiss ball so that you can apply pressure directly down through the ball and into the floor. Squeeze your glutes to lift your pelvis and elevate your body off the floor, your body should now be in one straight line. Your arms and shoulders should be taking the weight as well as your hamstrings from your heel position. This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and pull your heels in towards your hips. Bend at your knees to do so but keep your pelvis pushed forward so that you still have a straight line from your shoulders to knees.
Pause for a brief moment, inhale and return your ankles along the same path to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Lying Leg Curls or Seated Leg Curls.

es: Túmbate on your espalda on a mat with your pies propped up on top of a swiss ball. Your brazos should be laying flat alongside your torso. Have your talones so that they are in the centre of the swiss ball so that you can apply pressure directly down through the ball and into the suelo. Squeeze your glúteos to lift your pelvis and elevate your body off the suelo, your body should now be in one straight line. Your brazos and hombros should be taking the peso as well as your isquios from your talón posición. Esta será la posición inicial.

To initiate the movimiento, espira and pull your talones in hacia your caderas. Bend at your rodillas to do so but keep your pelvis pushed forward so that you still have a straight line from your hombros to rodillas.
Pause for a brief moment, inspira and return your ankles along the same path to the posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variaciones: Lying Leg Curls or Seated Leg Curls.

name: Wide Grip Lat Pulldown
instructions: Set the weight to the recommended amount and check that the leg brace is set to the correct height. Take a seat facing the machine (tuck your hips in so they are touching the leg brace) and take a wide, overhand grip with your arms extended towards the ceiling. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and pull the bar down towards your chest using the muscles across your back and your biceps. Lean back ever so slightly as your pull the weight downwards and lift your chest as much as you can. Continue to pull the bar down until either your muscles are optimally contracted or it is in contact with your chest.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the bar back along the same path into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Pull-Ups or Cable Pullovers.

es: Coloca the peso to the recommended amount and check that the leg brace is set to the correct height. Take a seat facing the máquina (tuck your caderas in so they are touching the leg brace) and take a wide, overmano grip with your brazos extended hacia the techo. Esta es la posición inicial.

To initiate the movimiento, espira and pull the barra down hacia your pecho using the muscles across your espalda and your bíceps. Lean espalda ever so slightly as your pull the peso downwards and lift your pecho as much as you can. Continue to pull the barra down until either your muscles are optimally contracted or it is in contact with your pecho.
Tras una breve pausa, inspira and return the barra espalda along the same path into its posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variaciones: dominadass or Polea Pullovers.

name: Cable Tricep Push Down V Bar Attachment
instructions: Attach a V-bar to a high cable pulley. Adopt a shoulder width, upright stance (about 18 inches away from the machine) and take hold of the bar with an overhand grip (palm facing the floor).

Once you have hold of the bar, take the weight by tucking your elbow into the side of your torso. Your forearms and upper arms should create an acute angle (less than 90 degrees) when ready to go. This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and push the bar down towards your thighs on an arcing motion. Use your triceps to do this and contract fully when your arms are by your thighs. At this point, your arms should be perpendicular to the floor. Tip: Keep your elbows tucked in to your sides as only the forearms should move.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the bar along the same path back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Tricep Kickbacks or Overhead Tricep Extensions.

At this point, your brazos should be perpendicular to the suelo. Consejo: Mantén your codos tucked in to your sides as only the forebrazos should move.

name: Standing Cable Crunches
instructions: Adopt a shoulder width stance underneath a high cable with a rope attached. Face away from the machine but be as close to it as possible, keep your legs straight throughout (slight bend at the knees). When setting the weight for this exercise, be cautious as if it is too heavy, your abs will not be taking the load and your lower back will play a part.
Take hold of the ropes and bring them down so they are next to your head on your upper chest. Push your hips back and lean forward from your hips so that your torso is taking the weight.

From here you should try to arch your back by taking a deep breath, pulling your shoulders back and pushing your chest out. This will be your starting position. Tip: Throughout this movement your hips and your lower limbs should remain stationary.

Exhale and flex your abs to move your shoulders (and rope) downward towards your thighs. As you flex your abs, the arch in your back reverses so that your back is now rounding over. Your elbows should remain as close to your torso as possible throughout.
After a brief pause, inhale and return along the same path to your starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: If you suffer from lower back pain, be cautious of the resistance.
Variations: Kneeling Cable Crunches or Cocoons.

Take hold of the ropes and bring them down so they are next to your cabeza on your upper pecho. Push your caderas espalda and lean forward from your caderas so that your torso is taking the peso.

From here you should try to arch your espalda by taking a deep breath, pulling your hombros espalda and pushing your pecho out. Esta será la posición inicial. Consejo: Throughout this movimiento your caderas and your lower limbs should remain stationary.

Espira and flex your abs to move your hombros (and rope) downward hacia your thighs. As you flex your abs, the arch in your espalda reverses so that your espalda is now rounding over. Your codos should remain as close to your torso as possible throughout.
Tras una breve pausa, inspira and return along the same path to your posición inicial.

name: Cable Curls
instructions: Attach a straight bar to a low cable pulley and take hold of it with an underhand grip (palms facing upwards). Stand upright around 12 inches away from the cable, maintaining a straight back throughout.

Whilst holding the upper arm stationary, exhale as you curl the bar up towards your shoulders by contracting your biceps. Continue the movement until your biceps are fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a second as you squeeze your biceps.
(Tip: Only the forearms should move.)
Inhale as you slowly begin to return the bar along the same path to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Standing Hammer Curls or Barbell Bicep Curls.

Whilst holding the upper brazo stationary, espira as you curl the barra up hacia your hombros by contracting your bíceps. Continue the movimiento until your bíceps are fully contracted and the barra is at hombro level. Hold the contracted posición for a second as you squeeze your bíceps.
(Consejo: Only the forebrazos should move.)
Inspira as you slowly begin to return the barra along the same path to the posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variaciones: Colócate de pieing Hammer Curls or barra Bicep Curls.

name: Pallof Press
instructions: Attach a handle to a cable pulley that is at chest height and adopt a shoulder width stance adjacent to the cable machine (on your right side) about a foot away.
Take hold of the handle with an both hands, bend your elbows and keep your hands tucked in to your chest at this point. This will be your starting position. Tip: Maintain good posture throughout.
Exhale and press your hands out in front of your torso, keeping them parallel to the floor as you go. Continue to press forwards until your arms are at full extension.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the handle back along the same path to its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.

Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.

Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado and swap sides.

name: Seated Cable Rows
instructions: Attach two handles to a low cable pulley, take hold of them with a neutral grip and sit about 2 feet away from the pulley system. Once seated, you should have your arms and legs out in front of you (slightly bent) with your posture held in an upright position (this is paramount to maintain throughout the movement) with your chest pushed out. This is your starting position.

Exhale and pull the handles in towards your lower abdominals by contracting your back muscles. Your posture should remain upright throughout the movement and your arms should remain as passive as possible.
Once the handles touch your abdominals, pause for a brief moment before inhaling and returning them along the same path back into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: If you suffer from back pain, this may not be a suitable movement for you.
Variations: Landmine T Bar Rows or Underhand Cable Pulldowns.

Esta es la posición inicial.

Espira and pull the asas in hacia your lower abdominals by contracting your espalda muscles. Your posture should remain upright throughout the movimiento and your brazos should remain as passive as possible.
Once the asas touch your abdominals, pause for a brief moment before inhaling and returning them along the same path espalda into the posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Precaución: If you suffer from espalda pain, this may not be a suitable movimiento for you.
Variaciones: Landmine T Bar Rows or Undermano Polea Pulldowns.

name: Cable Reverse Crunch
instructions: Attach two handles to a low cable pulley and place a mat in front of it. Lay down on your back and securely put the handles over your toes.

Lift your feet off the ground so that your knees and hips are both at 90 degrees and place your hands on your temples. Tip: Try not to pull your neck or head in to the movement with your hands. If your neck starts to ache, put one hand behind your head for support and to take some weight.
Now exhale and whilst crunching your up torso upward, bring your knees in towards your chest.
Once your abs are as tight as they can be pause for a brief moment, inhale and return your body back along the same path into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variation: Cocoons or Jack-Knives.

Lift your pies off the ground so that your rodillas and caderas are both at 90 degrees and place your manos on your temples. Consejo: Try not to pull your neck or cabeza in to the movimiento with your manos. If your neck starts to ache, put one mano behind your cabeza for support and to take some peso.
Now espira and mientras crunching your up torso upward, bring your rodillas in hacia your pecho.

Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variación: Cocoons or Jack-Knives.

name: Straight Arm Pulldowns Rope
instructions: Attach a bar to a high cable pulley, adopt a shoulder width, upright stance and take hold of the bar with an overhand grip (palms facing down). Take a step backwards (around 2 feet or so) and bend slightly forward from your waist whilst maintaining a straight back. Pull the weight down with straight arms so that they are now parallel with the floor. Tip: Keep a slight bend at your elbows throughout. This will be your starting position.

Exhale and pull the bar downwards towards your thighs whilst maintaining both your posture and straight arms. Contract your lats to make this movement happen. Continue to pull the bar downwards towards your thighs until the bar is just a few centimetres away from them.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the bar along the same path back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variation: Dumbbell Pull Overs or Bent Arm Barbell Pullover.

Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.

name: Cable Preacher Curls
instructions: Place the preacher curl machine in front of a low cable pulley (with the bar attachment on) and take a seat. Place your upper arms over the pad of the machine and grab hold of the bar with your palms facing forward. Set the height of the seat so that your arm pits are snug on top of the pad and have your arms extended. This will be your starting position.
Exhale and contract your biceps to lift the bar up towards your shoulders. Keep your triceps on the pad and squeeze your biceps until they are fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder height.
After a brief pause, inhale and slowly lower the bar along the same path back into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Cable Curls or Barbell Preacher Curl.

Variaciones: Polea Curls or barra Preacher Curl.

name: Cable Lateral Raises
instructions: Place a handle attachment onto a low cable pulley. Stand side on to the machine with your right side being closest. Adopt a shoulder width, upright standing position, maintaining a straight back throughout. Reach across your body and take hold of the handle with your left hand. Return to your original, standing position. This will be your starting position.

Initiate the movement by exhaling and elevating your left hand on a wide arc out to your side. Keep a slight bend at your elbow and continue to elevate upward until your arm is parallel with the floor.
After a brief pause, inhale and return your arm along the same path back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variation: Dumbbell Lateral Raises or Dynaband Lateral Raises.

name: Cable Hammer Curls Rope
instructions: Attach a rope to a low cable pulley. Take hold of the ropes with a neutral grip (palms facing each other) making sure that the plastic/rubber part on the end is touching your thumbs and index fingers. Stand upright around 12 inches away from the cable, maintaining a straight back throughout.

Whilst holding the upper arm stationary, exhale as you curl the rope up towards your shoulders by contracting your biceps. Continue the movement until your biceps are fully contracted and the the rope is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a second as you squeeze your biceps.
(Tip: Only the forearms should move.)
Inhale as you slowly begin to return the rope along the same path to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Standing Hammer Curls or Seated Hammer Curls.

name: Cable Crunches
instructions: Adopt a kneeling position underneath a high cable with a rope attached. When setting the weight for this exercise, be cautious as if it is too heavy, your abs will not be taking the load and your lower back will play a part.
Take hold of the ropes and bring them down so they are beside your head on your upper chest. Push your hips back and lean forward to create a 90 degree angle from your lower back and thighs.

From here you should try to arch your back by taking a deep breath, pulling your shoulders back and pushing your chest out. This will be your starting position. Tip: Throughout this movement your hips and your lower limbs should remain stationary.

Exhale and flex your abs to move your shoulders (and rope) downward towards your thighs. As you flex your abs, the arch in your back reverses so that your back is now rounding over. Your elbows should remain as close to your torso as possible throughout.
After a brief pause, inhale and return along the same path to your starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: If you suffer from lower back pain, be cautious of the resistance.
Variations: Crunches or Cocoons.

Take hold of the ropes and bring them down so they are beside your cabeza on your upper pecho. Push your caderas espalda and lean forward to create a 90 degree angle from your zona lumbar and thighs.

From here you should try to arch your espalda by taking a deep breath, pulling your hombros espalda and pushing your pecho out. Esta será la posición inicial. Consejo: Throughout this movimiento your caderas and your lower limbs should remain stationary.

Espira and flex your abs to move your hombros (and rope) downward hacia your thighs. As you flex your abs, the arch in your espalda reverses so that your espalda is now rounding over. Your codos should remain as close to your torso as possible throughout.
Tras una breve pausa, inspira and return along the same path to your posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Precaución: If you suffer from zona lumbar pain, be cautious of the resistencia.
Variaciones: Crunches or Cocoons.

name: Cable Chest Press
instructions: Attach handles to two cables (placed at shoulder height). Take one in each hand and face away from the machine. Bring the handles up to shoulder height with your elbows parallel with the floor, flared out wide at a 90 degree angle. Adopt a standing, shoulder width stance, maintaining a straight back troughout the movement. Your palms should be facing the floor. This will be your starting position.
Whilst exhaling, press the handles in front of you until your elbow becomes fully extended (straight) and bring your hands together.
After a brief pause and squeeze of your pectoral muscles, return the handles back along the same path to the starting position.
Complete the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dumbbell Chest Press or Chest Press Machine

en: Attach handles to two cables (placed at shoulder height). Take one in each hand and face away from the machine. Adopt a standing, shoulder width stance, maintaining a straight back troughout the movement. Your palms should be facing the floor. This will be your starting position.
Whilst exhaling, press the handles in front of you until your elbow becomes fully extended (straight) and bring your hands together.
After a brief pause and squeeze of your pectoral muscles, return the handles back along the same path to the starting position.
Complete the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dumbbell Chest Press or Chest Press Machine

Adopt a standing, hombro width stance, maintaining a straight espalda troughout the movimiento. Your palms should be facing the suelo. Esta será la posición inicial.
Whilst exhaling, press the asas in front of you until your codo becomes fully extended (straight) and bring your manos together.
Tras una breve pausa and squeeze of your pectoral muscles, return the asas espalda along the same path to the posición inicial.
Complete the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variaciones: mancuerna Chest Press or Chest Press Machine

name: Alternating Barbell Lunges
instructions: Set the height of the pins in a squat rack so that the barbell can lay across your shoulders comfortably. Next, set the safety bars at the desired height (typically waist high) so that if you fail on a rep, they will take the weight and you will be safe. Load up the barbell with the correct amount of weight on it and you are now ready to go.
Step underneath the bar so that it is resting on your shoulders. Take hold of the bar and step back from the rack maintaining a straight back throughout.This will be your starting position.

Inahle and take a slightly exaggerated step forwardand plant your foot firmly on the floor. Whilst maintaining a stragiht back descend your torso towards the floor by bending both knees into a 90 degree position. Tip: Keep your weight central and drop directly downward rather than forward or back, your knees should be at right angles when at the bottom of the movement.
After a brief pause press through your front thigh and heel to push your body back along the same path into the starting position.
Alternate in this fashion and repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: If you have any balance issues, you should use an alternative method of adding weight to this exercise. For example, use dumbbells.
Variations: Alternating Dumbbell Lunges or Dumbbell Walking Lunges.

name: Sumo Deadlifts
instructions: Load up a barbell and stand behind it with a wide stance. Your shins should be gently touching the bar.

Whilst maintaining good posture (a straight back), bend at your knees and hips to lower your torso enabling you to take a narrow (index finger 6-12 inches apart), overhand grip between your legs. Your hips should be higher than your knees at this point. This will be the starting position. Tip: You can adopt an alternate grip (one overhand and one underhand) if it is more comfortable for you.

Grip the bar and initiate the movement by pressing through your heels and quads whilst simultaneously use the muscles in your back to bring your torso into a vertical position. Throughout the movement keep the bar close to your body, maintain strict form (straight back) and exhale. Once you are in a standing position you should push your chest out by pulling your shoulder blades together.
After a brief pause, descend the barbell back along the same path and inhale until you are back in the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: Be very careful when performing this exercise and if you suffer from any back pain, this may not be suitable movement for you.
Variation: Rack Pulls or Plie Dumbbell Squats.

name: Standing Barbell Shoulder Press
instructions: Grab a barbell and adopt a shoulder width, over hand grip. Lift the bar above your head so that it is directly above your shoulders. Keep your elbows locked at this point for safety. Maintain a straight back throughout this movement. This will be your starting position.
Whilst inhaling, start to lower the bar by bending at your elbows until the bar is below your chin.
After a brief pause, exhale and press the bar back into the starting position by contracting your deltoid muscles (shoulders).
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: Those with back problems, may find a seated version more comfortable.
Variations: Dumbbell Shoulder Press or Smith Machine Shoulder Press.

name: Skull Crushers (Behind The Head)
instructions: Grab a barbell and lay flat on a bench with the bar pressed straight up towards the ceiling. Adopt a pronated (overhand) grip with your elbows tucked in. This will be your starting position.

Inhale as you descend the barbell down towards the back of your head. Be sure to keep your elbows tucked in and stretch your triceps as you go. When you get to within an inch of the bench pause for a second.
Then whilst exhaling, use your triceps to return the bar along the same path to the starting position. Your arms should be fully extended once again and pointing towards the ceiling.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dumbbell Skull Crusher or Tricep Rope Extensions.

name: Barbell Bulgarian Split Squat
instructions: Place a barbell on the back of your shoulders and position yourself so that one foot is flat on the floor and the other is behind you, at knee height supported by a bench (an exaggerated step's distance away). This will be your starting position.

From here, start to descend by bending at your knees (maintaining good posture) until you create a 90 degree angle at your front knee. As you descend you should be inhaling and ensuring that your front knee does not extend past your toes.
Pause for a brief moment at the bottom of the movement, before exhaling and driving up through your front heel and thigh, until you return to your starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dumbbell Split Squats or TRX Split Squats.

Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dumbbell Split Squats or TRX Split Squats.
es: Coloca a barrara on the espalda of your hombros and posición yourself so that one pie is flat on the suelo and the other is behind you, at rodilla height supported by a banco (an exaggerated step's distance away). Esta será la posición inicial.

From here, start to descend by bending at your rodillas (maintaining good posture) until you create a 90 degree angle at your front rodilla. As you descend you should be inhaling and ensuring that your front rodilla does not extend past your toes.
Pause for a brief moment at the bottom of the movimiento, before exhaling and driving up through your front talón and thigh, until you return to your posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variaciones: mancuerna Split Squats or TRX Split Squats.

name: Rack Pulls
instructions: Place a barbell on the safety bars within a squat rack. Make sure that the bars are set up at the desired height (below/above your knees or mid thigh) and adopt a deadlift position. So step up to the bar with your feet placed underneath your hips, a slight bend at your knees, hips pushed back, a slight arch in your lower back as you lean forward to grab the barbell with an overhand, shoulder width grip. This will be your starting position.

Keeping your head up, drive force through your heels and hips to lift the barbell. Exhale as you do so and use the muscles in your back to help achieve an upright standing position. Tip: Keep the bar close to your body and maintain a straight back throughout the movement. Once you are in this position, pull your shoulder blades together and push your chest out.
Next, inhale and reverse the movement, returning the barbell along the same path back into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variation: Barbell Deadlifts

So step up to the barra with your pies placed underneath your caderas, a slight bend at your rodillas, caderas pushed espalda, a slight arch in your zona lumbar as you lean forward to grab the barrara with an overmano, hombro width grip. Esta será la posición inicial.

Manténing your cabeza up, drive force through your talones and caderas to lift the barrara. Espira as you do so and use the muscles in your espalda to help achieve an upright standing posición. Next, inspira and reverse the movimiento, returning the barrara along the same path espalda into the posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variación: barra Deadlifts

name: Barbell Overhead squats
instructions: Set the pins of a squat rack at shoulder height. Place your barbell on those pins and load up with the required weight. Now take a wider than shoulder width grip and lift the bar off the rack keeping it close to your body. Next, press the bar above your head and fully extend your arms. Lock out your elbows and take a small step backwards. Adopt a shoulders width stance with your toes slightly pointing outward. Maintain a straight back throughout this movement. This will be your starting position.

Inhale and begin to descend by bending at your knees and hips. Your weight should be put predominantly through your heels as you sit back into the movement until your thighs are either parallel or just past to the floor.

After a brief pause, exhale and return the bar to the starting position along the same path, push through your heels with the force being driven through your quads and glutes to do so. Stand to attention with your legs fully extended, back straight and arms perpendicular to the ground..
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: This is a very complex movement and will require a spotter. If you do not have a spotter, be cautious with your weights. If you suffer from back issues, this exercise may not be suitable.
Variations: Dumbbell Squats or Kettlebell Squats.

name: Narrow Grip Bench Press
instructions: Lay flat on a bench with a barbell in the rack above you. Take a close grip (6-12 inches between your index fingers) and lift the bar off the rack so that it is directly above your chest. Keep your elbows locked at this point for safety. This will be your starting position.

Whilst inhaling, start to lower the bar by bending at your elbows until the bar gently touches the middle of your chest. Your elbows should remain close together and should brush along the sides of your torso as you go.
After a brief pause, exhale and press the bar back along the same path into the starting position by contracting your triceps and pectoral muscles.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
When you are done, place the bar back in the rack.
Caution: You should always have a spotter when attempting this movement. If a spotter is not available you should be conservative with the weight you are using.
Variation: Smith Machine Close Grip Bench Press.

Tras una breve pausa, espira and press the barra espalda along the same path into the posición inicial by contracting your tríceps and pectoral muscles.
Repite el movimiento el número de repeticiones recomendado.
When you are done, place the barra espalda in the rack.
Precaución: You should always have a spotter when attempting this movimiento. If a spotter is not available you should be conservative with the peso you are using.
Variación: multipower Close Grip Bench Press.

name: Incline Bicep Curls
instructions: Hold a dumbbell in each hand and lie back on an incline bench.
The dumbbells should be at arm's length hanging at your sides and your palms should be facing out.  This will be your starting position.

Now as you exhale curl the weight outward and up while keeping your forearms in line with your side deltoids. Continue the curl until the dumbbells are at shoulder height and to the sides of your deltoids. Tip: The end of the movement should look similar to a double biceps pose.
After a second contraction at the top of the movement, start to inhale and slowly lower the weights back to the starting position using the same path used to bring them up.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: You can also perform this exercise with cables or exercise bands.

Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variaciones: You can also perform this exercise with poleas or exercise bandas.
