name: Incline Hammer Curls
instructions: Grab two dumbbells and take a seat on an incline bench (around 45 degrees) with your arms by your side.
The palms of your hands should be facing your torso. This will be your starting position.

Whilst holding the upper arm stationary, exhale as you curl both dumbbells forward, contracting your biceps. Continue the movement until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a second as you squeeze your biceps.
(Tip: Only the forearms should move.)
Inhale as you slowly begin to bring the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Standing Hammer Curls or Cable Curls.

en: Grab two dumbbells and take a seat on an incline bench (around 45 degrees) with your arms by your side.
The palms of your hands should be facing your torso. This will be your starting position.

Whilst holding the upper arm stationary, exhale as you curl both dumbbells forward, contracting your biceps. Continue the movement until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a second as you squeeze your biceps.
(Tip: Only the forearms should move.)
Inhale as you slowly begin to bring the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Standing Hammer Curls or Cable Curls.
es: Coge dos mancuernas y siéntate en un banco inclinado (alrededor de 45 grados) con los brazos a los lados.
Las palmas de tus manos deben mirar hacia tu torso. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Mientras mantienes inmóvil la parte superior del brazo, exhala mientras flexionas ambas mancuernas hacia adelante, contrayendo los bíceps. Continúa el movimiento hasta que tus bíceps estén completamente contraídos y las mancuernas a la altura de los hombros. Mantén la posición contraída por un segundo mientras aprietas los bíceps.
(Consejo: sólo deben moverse los antebrazos).
Inhale mientras comienza lentamente a bajar las mancuernas a la posición inicial.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Curl de martillo de pie o Curl de cable.

name: Incline Dumbbell Chest Press
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and lay down on an incline bench (around 30 degrees), bringing the dumbbells beside your chest. Keep your elbows at a 90-degree angle and your forearms perpendicular to the floor. Once here, keep your palms facing away from you, exhale and press the dumbbells towards the ceiling.
Squeeze your pectoral muscles when your arms are at full extension. Once you have completed this, inhale and bring your arms back down beside your chest until your elbows are at 90-degrees once more.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: Always have a spotter with you to help you throughout the movement and to help unload the dumbbells after completion.
Variations: Incline Barbell Bench Press or Smith Machine Incline Bench Press

name.es: Press de pecho inclinado con mancuernas

en: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and lay down on an incline bench (around 30 degrees), bringing the dumbbells beside your chest. Keep your elbows at a 90-degree angle and your forearms perpendicular to the floor. Once here, keep your palms facing away from you, exhale and press the dumbbells towards the ceiling.
Squeeze your pectoral muscles when your arms are at full extension. Once you have completed this, inhale and bring your arms back down beside your chest until your elbows are at 90-degrees once more.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: Always have a spotter with you to help you throughout the movement and to help unload the dumbbells after completion.
Variations: Incline Barbell Bench Press or Smith Machine Incline Bench Press
es: Toma una mancuerna en cada mano y recuéstate en un banco inclinado (alrededor de 30 grados), colocando las mancuernas al lado de tu pecho. Mantén los codos en un ángulo de 90 grados y los antebrazos perpendiculares al suelo. Una vez aquí, mantén las palmas de las manos alejadas de ti, exhala y presiona las mancuernas hacia el techo.

Apriete los músculos pectorales cuando los brazos estén completamente extendidos. Una vez que haya completado esto, inhale y baje los brazos al lado del pecho hasta que los codos estén a 90 grados una vez más.
Repite el movimiento durante la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Precaución: siempre tenga un observador contigo para ayudarte durante todo el movimiento y para ayudar a descargar las mancuernas una vez finalizado.
Variaciones: Press de banca inclinado con barra o Press de banca inclinado con máquina Smith

name: Incline Dumbbell Flyes
instructions: Grab two dumbbells and lie on an incline bench (chest facing the ceiling) that is set to an incline angle of around 30 degrees.
With a slight bend at the elbows, extend your arms until they are nearly locked out, towards the ceiling.
Rotate your wrists so that your palms are now facing one another. This will be your starting position.
As you inhale, Lower your arms down on a wide arc until you feel a stretch across your chest. Tip: Keep your elbows slightly bent throughout the movement to reduce stress on your joints.

Once you have reached the bottom of the movement, pause for a brief moment before exhaling and returning the dumbbells (along the same path) to their starting position, above your chest. At this point your arms should still be extended and the motion is controlled through your pectoral muscles.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Incline Flyes With A Twist or Pec Deck

en: Grab two dumbbells and lie on an incline bench (chest facing the ceiling) that is set to an incline angle of around 30 degrees.
With a slight bend at the elbows, extend your arms until they are nearly locked out, towards the ceiling.
Rotate your wrists so that your palms are now facing one another. This will be your starting position.
As you inhale, Lower your arms down on a wide arc until you feel a stretch across your chest. Tip: Keep your elbows slightly bent throughout the movement to reduce stress on your joints.

Once you have reached the bottom of the movement, pause for a brief moment before exhaling and returning the dumbbells (along the same path) to their starting position, above your chest. At this point your arms should still be extended and the motion is controlled through your pectoral muscles.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Incline Flyes With A Twist or Pec Deck
es: Coge dos mancuernas y acuéstese en un banco inclinado (con el pecho mirando hacia el techo) que tenga un ángulo de inclinación de aproximadamente 30 grados.
Con una ligera flexión de los codos, extienda los brazos hasta que queden casi bloqueados, hacia el techo.
Gire las muñecas para que las palmas queden ahora una frente a la otra. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Mientras inhala, baje los brazos formando un arco amplio hasta que sienta un estiramiento en el pecho. Consejo: Mantén los codos ligeramente doblados durante todo el movimiento para reducir la tensión en las articulaciones.

Una vez que hayas llegado al final del movimiento, haz una breve pausa antes de exhalar y devolver las mancuernas (por el mismo camino) a su posición inicial, encima de tu pecho. En este punto, tus brazos aún deben estar extendidos y el movimiento debe controlarse a través de los músculos pectorales.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: aperturas inclinadas con giro o plataforma Pec.

name: Neutral Grip Incline Dumbbell Chest Press
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and lay down on an incline bench (around 30 degrees), bringing the dumbbells beside your chest. Keep your elbows at a 90-degree angle and your forearms perpendicular to the floor. Once here, bring your thumb the same side of the dumbbell as your fingers. keep your palms facing away from you.
To initiate this movement, exhale and press the dumbbells towards the ceiling. Squeeze your pectoral muscles as you go and continue to press until your arms are at full extension.
After a brief pause, inhale and bring your arms back down beside your chest until your elbows are at 90 degrees once more.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: Always have a spotter with you (especially with this grip) to help you throughout the movement and to help unload the dumbbells after completion.
Variations: Incline Barbell Bench Press or Smith Machine Incline Bench Press.

Keep your elbows at a 90-degree angle and your forearms perpendicular to the floor. Once here, bring your thumb the same side of the dumbbell as your fingers. keep your palms facing away from you.
To initiate this movement, exhale and press the dumbbells towards the ceiling. Squeeze your pectoral muscles as you go and continue to press until your arms are at full extension.
After a brief pause, inhale and bring your arms back down beside your chest until your elbows are at 90 degrees once more.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: Always have a spotter with you (especially with this grip) to help you throughout the movement and to help unload the dumbbells after completion.

es: Toma una mancuerna en cada mano y recuéstate en un banco inclinado (alrededor de 30 grados), colocando las mancuernas al lado de tu pecho. Mantén los codos en un ángulo de 90 grados y los antebrazos perpendiculares al suelo. Una vez aquí, lleve el pulgar al mismo lado de la mancuerna que los dedos. Mantén las palmas de las manos alejadas de ti.

Para iniciar este movimiento, exhala y presiona las mancuernas hacia el techo. Aprieta los músculos pectorales durante el movimientos y continúa presionando hasta que tus brazos estén completamente extendidos.
Después de una breve pausa, inhale y baje los brazos al lado del pecho hasta que los codos vuelvan a estar a 90 grados.
Repite el movimiento durante la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Precaución: siempre tenga un observador contigo (especialmente con este agarre) para ayudarte durante todo el movimiento y para ayudar a descargar las mancuernas una vez finalizado.
Variaciones: Press de banca inclinado con barra o Press de banca inclinado con máquina Smith.

name: Dumbbell Goblet Squats
instructions: Grab a dumbbell and hold it by one of it's ends, close to your chest. Adopt a standing position with a shoulder width stance. This will be your starting position.
As you inhale, bend at your knees and waist in order to squat until your thighs become parallel (or just past) to the floor. Tip: Maintain an upright torso throughout the movement.
At the bottom of the movement, pause for a moment, then push through your heels whilst exhaling until you return to a standing position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: If you have any lower back issues, this may not be the most suitable exercise for you. A suggestion would be to try a Leg Press Machine instead.
Variation: Kettlebell Goblet Squat or Wide Stance Leg Press.

en: Grab a dumbbell and hold it by one of it's ends, close to your chest. Adopt a standing position with a shoulder width stance. This will be your starting position.
As you inhale, bend at your knees and waist in order to squat until your thighs become parallel (or just past) to the floor. Tip: Maintain an upright torso throughout the movement.
At the bottom of the movement, pause for a moment, then push through your heels whilst exhaling until you return to a standing position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: If you have any lower back issues, this may not be the most suitable exercise for you. A suggestion would be to try a Leg Press Machine instead.
Variation: Kettlebell Goblet Squat or Wide Stance Leg Press.
es: Coge una mancuerna y sujétala por uno de sus extremos, cerca de tu pecho. Adopte una posición de pie con una postura a la altura de los hombros. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Mientras inhala, doble las rodillas y la cintura para ponerse en cuclillas hasta que los muslos queden paralelos (o justo más allá) del suelo. Consejo: Mantén el torso erguido durante todo el movimiento.
En la parte inferior del movimiento, haz una pausa por un momento, luego empuja con los talones mientras exhalas hasta volver a la posición de pie.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Precaución: si tiene problemas de espalda baja, puede que este no sea el ejercicio más adecuado para ti. Una sugerencia sería probar una máquina de press de piernas.
Variación: sentadilla en copa con pesa rusa o press de piernas en posición amplia.

name: Standing Dumbbell Front Raises
instructions: Pick a couple of dumbbells and stand with a straight torso and the dumbbells on front of your thighs at arms length with the palms of the hand facing your thighs.  This will be your starting position.

While maintaining the torso stationary (no swinging), lift the left dumbbell to the front with a slight bend on the elbow and the palms of the hands always facing down.  Continue to go up until you arm is slightly above parallel to the floor.  Exhale as you execute this portion of the movement and pause for a second at the top. Inhale after the second pause.
Now lower the dumbbell back down slowly to the starting position as you simultaneously lift the right dumbbell.
Continue alternating in this fashion until all of the recommended amount of repetitions have been performed for each arm.
Variations: This exercise can also be performed both arms at the same time.  Also, you could use a barbell as well.

name.es: Elevaciones frontales con mancuernas de pie

en: Pick a couple of dumbbells and stand with a straight torso and the dumbbells on front of your thighs at arms length with the palms of the hand facing your thighs.  This will be your starting position.

While maintaining the torso stationary (no swinging), lift the left dumbbell to the front with a slight bend on the elbow and the palms of the hands always facing down.  Continue to go up until you arm is slightly above parallel to the floor.  Exhale as you execute this portion of the movement and pause for a second at the top. Inhale after the second pause.
Now lower the dumbbell back down slowly to the starting position as you simultaneously lift the right dumbbell.
Continue alternating in this fashion until all of the recommended amount of repetitions have been performed for each arm.
Variations: This exercise can also be performed both arms at the same time.  Also, you could use a barbell as well.
es: Elija un par de mancuernas y párese con el torso recto y las mancuernas frente a los muslos con los brazos extendidos y las palmas de las manos hacia los muslos.  Esta será tu posición inicial.

Mientras mantiene el torso inmóvil (sin balancearse), levante la mancuerna izquierda hacia el frente con una ligera flexión del codo y las palmas de las manos siempre hacia abajo.  Continúa subiendo hasta que tu brazo esté ligeramente por encima del paralelo al suelo.  Exhala mientras ejecutas esta parte del movimiento y haz una pausa por un segundo en la parte superior. Inhala después de la segunda pausa.
Ahora baje la mancuerna lentamente hasta la posición inicial mientras levanta simultáneamente la mancuerna derecha.
Continúa alternando de esta manera hasta que se haya realizado toda la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones para cada brazo.
Variaciones: Este ejercicio también se puede realizar con ambos brazos al mismo tiempo.  Además, también puedes usar una barra.

name: Dumbbell Upright Rows
instructions: Grab two dumbbells with an overhand grip. The ends of the dumbbells gently touching one another as they rest on your thighs, arms hanging perpendicular to the floor. Tip: Maintain a straight back and keep the dumbbells as close to your body as possible throughout the movement.

Exhale and pull the dumbbells up towards your chin by contracting your shoulders and flaring your elbows out wide. Continue to pull them upward until you reach your chin. At this point your elbows should be above the dumbbells.
Pause for a brief moment, then inhale and return the dumbbells along the same path towards the starting position.
Variations: Barbell Upright Rows or Smith Machine Upright Row

en: Grab two dumbbells with an overhand grip. The ends of the dumbbells gently touching one another as they rest on your thighs, arms hanging perpendicular to the floor. Tip: Maintain a straight back and keep the dumbbells as close to your body as possible throughout the movement.

Exhale and pull the dumbbells up towards your chin by contracting your shoulders and flaring your elbows out wide. Continue to pull them upward until you reach your chin. At this point your elbows should be above the dumbbells.
Pause for a brief moment, then inhale and return the dumbbells along the same path towards the starting position.
Variations: Barbell Upright Rows or Smith Machine Upright Row
es: Agarra dos mancuernas con un agarre prono. Los extremos de las mancuernas se tocan suavemente entre sí mientras descansan sobre los muslos, con los brazos colgando perpendiculares al suelo. Consejo: mantenga la espalda recta y mantenga las mancuernas lo más cerca posible de tu cuerpo durante todo el movimiento.

Exhale y levante las mancuernas hacia la barbilla contrayendo los hombros y abriendo bien los codos. Continúa tirando de ellos hacia arriba hasta llegar a la barbilla. En este punto tus codos deben estar por encima de las mancuernas.
Haz una pausa por un breve momento, luego inhale y regrese las mancuernas por el mismo camino hacia la posición inicial.
Variaciones: remo vertical con barra o remo vertical con máquina Smith

name: Stiff Leg Dumbbell Deadlifts
instructions: Grab a couple of dumbbells and adopt a standing position with your feet shoulder width apart. Have your arms in front of you but still perpendicular to the floor (palms facing your thighs). Slightly bend at your knees and maintain a straight back throughout. This will be your starting position.

Whilst keeping your knees stationary, inhale as you lean forwards from your waist (remember to keep a straight back), keeping the dumbbells close to you as you go. Keep lowering the dumbbells towards your feet until you feel a stretch in your hamstrings.

After a brief pause bring your torso straight again by pushing your hips forward. Tip: Remember, this whole movement is performed with 'stiff' legs (slight bend at the knee, but no more) and a straight back throughout. Exhale as you perform this part of the movement.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: This is not an exercise for those with back issues. Avoid jerking motions as this could cause serious injury.
Variation: Barbell Stiff Legged Deadlift.

name.es: Peso muerto con piernas rígidas con mancuernas

en: Grab a couple of dumbbells and adopt a standing position with your feet shoulder width apart. Have your arms in front of you but still perpendicular to the floor (palms facing your thighs). Slightly bend at your knees and maintain a straight back throughout. This will be your starting position.

Whilst keeping your knees stationary, inhale as you lean forwards from your waist (remember to keep a straight back), keeping the dumbbells close to you as you go. Keep lowering the dumbbells towards your feet until you feel a stretch in your hamstrings.

After a brief pause bring your torso straight again by pushing your hips forward. Tip: Remember, this whole movement is performed with 'stiff' legs (slight bend at the knee, but no more) and a straight back throughout. Exhale as you perform this part of the movement.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: This is not an exercise for those with back issues. Avoid jerking motions as this could cause serious injury.
Variation: Barbell Stiff Legged Deadlift.
es: Coge un par de mancuernas y adopta una posición de pie con los pies separados a la altura de los hombros. Mantén los brazos frente a ti pero aún perpendiculares al suelo (con las palmas hacia los muslos). Doble ligeramente las rodillas y mantenga la espalda recta en todo momento. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Mientras mantienes las rodillas quietas, inhala mientras te inclinas hacia adelante desde la cintura (recuerda mantener la espalda recta), manteniendo las mancuernas cerca del cuerpo durante el movimiento. Sigue bajando las mancuernas hacia tus pies hasta que sientas un estiramiento en los isquiosurales.

Después de una breve pausa, vuelva a enderezar el torso empujando las caderas hacia adelante. Consejo: Recuerde, todo este movimiento se realiza con las piernas "rígidas" (ligeramente doblada en la rodilla, pero no más) y la espalda recta en todo momento. Exhala mientras realizas esta parte del movimiento.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Precaución: este no es un ejercicio para personas con problemas de espalda. Evite movimientos bruscos ya que esto podría causar lesiones graves.
Variación: Peso muerto con piernas rígidas con barra.

name: Dumbbell Step Ups
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and stand with a shoulder width stance in front of a step. The height of the step should be realistic to the ability of the user (palms facing each other). This is your starting position.

Place your right foot on the step/bench. Step up onto the step/bench by pushing through your right heel. As your do so your hip and knee joints should straighten out. Lift your left leg onto the step/bench at this point. Exhale as you perform this part of the movement.

Step off the step/bench with the left leg by bending at the hip and knee joints of the right leg, inhale as you do so. Return to the original standing position by taking your right foot off the step/bench.
Alternate as you go along and repeat until you have performed the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Barbell Step Ups or Single Leg Leg Press.

en: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and stand with a shoulder width stance in front of a step. The height of the step should be realistic to the ability of the user (palms facing each other). This is your starting position.

Place your right foot on the step/bench. Step up onto the step/bench by pushing through your right heel. As your do so your hip and knee joints should straighten out. Lift your left leg onto the step/bench at this point. Exhale as you perform this part of the movement.

Step off the step/bench with the left leg by bending at the hip and knee joints of the right leg, inhale as you do so. Return to the original standing position by taking your right foot off the step/bench.
Alternate as you go along and repeat until you have performed the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Barbell Step Ups or Single Leg Leg Press.
es: Coge una mancuerna en cada mano y párese con una postura a la altura de los hombros frente a un escalón. La altura del escalón debe ser realista para la capacidad del usuario (con las palmas una frente a la otra). Esta es tu posición inicial.

Coloca su pie derecho en el escalón/banco. Sube al escalón/banco empujando con el talón derecho. Mientras lo hace, las articulaciones de la cadera y la rodilla deben enderezarse. En este punto, levante la pierna izquierda sobre el escalón/banco. Exhala mientras realizas esta parte del movimiento.

Bájese del escalón/banco con la pierna izquierda doblando las articulaciones de la cadera y la rodilla de la pierna derecha, inhale mientras lo haces. Vuelva a la posición de pie original quitando el pie derecho del escalón/banco.
Alterne durante el movimiento y repita hasta que haya realizado la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Step Ups con barra o Press de piernas con una sola pierna.

name: Dumbbell Deadlifts
instructions: Grab two dumbbells and stand with a shoulder width stance, toes pointing slightly outward (palms facing the side of your legs).
Throughout the movement you should keep your head up and maintain a straight back. This will be your starting position.

Descend slowly by bending your knees until your thighs are parallel with the floor. Keep a straight back so that your posture is not compromised. Tip: When at the bottom of the movement your knees should be behind your toes.

Once you have hit the bottom of the movement, pause for a second before pushing your torso back into the starting position through your heels. As you descend inhale and as you ascend, exhale. You should now be at the starting position, ready to go again.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: Always be aware of your posture with this exercise as if performed incorrectly, could cause injury.
Variations: Barbell Squats or Smith Machine Squats.

en: Grab two dumbbells and stand with a shoulder width stance, toes pointing slightly outward (palms facing the side of your legs).
Throughout the movement you should keep your head up and maintain a straight back. This will be your starting position.

Descend slowly by bending your knees until your thighs are parallel with the floor. Keep a straight back so that your posture is not compromised. Tip: When at the bottom of the movement your knees should be behind your toes.

Once you have hit the bottom of the movement, pause for a second before pushing your torso back into the starting position through your heels. As you descend inhale and as you ascend, exhale. You should now be at the starting position, ready to go again.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: Always be aware of your posture with this exercise as if performed incorrectly, could cause injury.
Variations: Barbell Squats or Smith Machine Squats.
es: Agarra dos mancuernas y párese con una postura a la altura de los hombros, con los dedos de los pies apuntando ligeramente hacia afuera (con las palmas hacia los costados de las piernas).
Durante todo el movimiento debes mantener la cabeza erguida y mantener la espalda recta. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Desciende lentamente doblando las rodillas hasta que tus muslos queden paralelos al suelo. Mantén la espalda recta para que su postura no se vea comprometida. Consejo: cuando estés en la parte inferior del movimiento, tus rodillas deben estar detrás de los dedos de los pies.

Una vez que hayas llegado al final del movimiento, haz una pausa por un segundo antes de empujar el torso hacia la posición inicial a través de los talones. Al descender, inhala y al ascender, exhala. Ahora deberías estar en la posición inicial, listo para comenzar de nuevo.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Precaución: Esté siempre consciente de su postura al realizar este ejercicio, ya que, si se realiza incorrectamente, podría causar lesiones.
Variaciones: sentadillas con barra o sentadillas con máquina Smith.

name: Dumbbell Skull Crusher
instructions: Grab two dumbbells and lay flat on a bench with the dumbbells pressed straight up towards the ceiling. Adopt a pronated grip (palms facing away from you), with the ends of the dumbbells gently touching one another and your elbows tucked in. This will be your starting position.

Inhale as you descend the dumbbells down towards your forehead. Be sure to keep your upper arms stationary and your elbows tucked in. When you get to within an inch of your forehead pause for a second.
Then whilst exhaling, use your triceps to return the dumbbells along the same path to the starting position. Your arms should be fully extended once again and pointing towards the ceiling.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: EZ Bar Skull Crushers or Tricep Rope Extensions.

name.es: Extensión de tríceps tumbado con mancuernas

en: Grab two dumbbells and lay flat on a bench with the dumbbells pressed straight up towards the ceiling. Adopt a pronated grip (palms facing away from you), with the ends of the dumbbells gently touching one another and your elbows tucked in. This will be your starting position.

Inhale as you descend the dumbbells down towards your forehead. Be sure to keep your upper arms stationary and your elbows tucked in. When you get to within an inch of your forehead pause for a second.
Then whilst exhaling, use your triceps to return the dumbbells along the same path to the starting position. Your arms should be fully extended once again and pointing towards the ceiling.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: EZ Bar Skull Crushers or Tricep Rope Extensions.
es: Coge dos mancuernas y recuéstese en un banco con las mancuernas extendidas hacia el techo. Adopte un agarre en pronación (con las palmas hacia afuera), con los extremos de las mancuernas tocándose suavemente y los codos pegados al cuerpo. Esta será su posición inicial.

Inhala mientras bajas las mancuernas hacia tu frente. Asegúrate de mantener la parte superior de los brazos inmóviles y los codos pegados al cuerpo. Cuando llegue a unos 2-3 cm de su frente, haga una pausa por un segundo.

Luego, mientras exhala, use sus tríceps para regresar las mancuernas por el mismo camino hasta la posición inicial. Tus brazos deben estar completamente extendidos una vez más y apuntando hacia el techo.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: extensiones de tríceps tumbado con barra EZ o extensiones de cuerda para tríceps.

en: Triceps
es: Triceps

name: Dumbbell Side Bends
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in your right hand with a neutral grip and adopt a shoulder width stance. Allow your arm to hang perpendicular to the floor by your side. Place your left hand across your body to reduce influence. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, inhale and lean laterally towards your right side, descending the dumbbell towards your knee. Continue to descend until either you cannot lean any further or the dumbbell is next to your knee.
After a brief pause, exhale and flex the obliques and intercostal muscles on your left side and return your torso along the same path back to its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variations: Oblique Crunch or Kneeling Oblique Cable Crunch.

en: Grab a dumbbell in your right hand with a neutral grip and adopt a shoulder width stance. Allow your arm to hang perpendicular to the floor by your side. Place your left hand across your body to reduce influence. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, inhale and lean laterally towards your right side, descending the dumbbell towards your knee. Continue to descend until either you cannot lean any further or the dumbbell is next to your knee.
After a brief pause, exhale and flex the obliques and intercostal muscles on your left side and return your torso along the same path back to its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variations: Oblique Crunch or Kneeling Oblique Cable Crunch.
es: Agarra una mancuerna en su mano derecha con un agarre neutral y adopte una postura a la altura de los hombros. Deja que tu brazo cuelgue perpendicular al suelo a su lado. Coloca su mano izquierda sobre tu cuerpo para reducir la influencia. Esta es tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, inhala e inclínate lateralmente hacia tu lado derecho, bajando la mancuerna hacia tu rodilla. Continúa descendiendo hasta que no pueda inclinarse más o la mancuerna esté al lado de su rodilla.
Después de una breve pausa, exhala y flexiona los músculos oblicuos e intercostales de tu lado izquierdo y regresa tu torso por el mismo camino hasta su posición inicial.
Repite la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones y cambie de lado.
Variaciones: Crunch oblicuo o Crunch con cable oblicuo de rodillas.

en: Obliques
es: Oblicuos

name: Dumbbell Shrugs
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and stand with a shoulder width stance. Your arms should be fully extended by your sides, your palms facing each other. This will be your starting position.

As you exhale, lift the dumbbells by lifting your shoulders and squeezing them in towards your ears. Hold this position for a second. Tip: This movement is generated through the lifting motion created from your shoulders. Therefore your arms should remain by your sides throughout and relaxed for the most part.
After this pause, return the dumbbells back to the starting position through the descent of your shoulders.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Barbell Shrugs or Smith Machine Shrugs.

en: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and stand with a shoulder width stance. Your arms should be fully extended by your sides, your palms facing each other. This will be your starting position.

As you exhale, lift the dumbbells by lifting your shoulders and squeezing them in towards your ears. Hold this position for a second. Tip: This movement is generated through the lifting motion created from your shoulders. Therefore your arms should remain by your sides throughout and relaxed for the most part.
After this pause, return the dumbbells back to the starting position through the descent of your shoulders.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Barbell Shrugs or Smith Machine Shrugs.
es: Toma una mancuerna en cada mano y párate con una postura a la altura de los hombros. Tus brazos deben estar completamente extendidos a los lados, con las palmas una frente a la otra. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Mientras exhalas, levanta las mancuernas levantando los hombros y apretándolas hacia las orejas. Mantén esta posición por un segundo. Consejo: este movimiento se genera mediante el movimiento de elevación creado desde los hombros. Por lo tanto, tus brazos deben permanecer a los lados y relajados en su mayor parte.
Después de esta pausa, regresa las mancuernas a la posición inicial mediante el descenso de los hombros.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: encogimiento de hombros con barra o encogimiento de hombros con máquina Smith.

en: Upper Traps

name: Standing Dumbbell Shoulder Press
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and adopt a shoulder width stance. Without leaning backward or putting your posture into jeopardy, press the dumbbells above your head so that you arms are fully extended, yet slightly flexed/bent at your elbows. Make sure your palms are facing forward at this point. This will be your starting position.

Slowly and in a controlled fashion, descend the dumbbells until they reach the side of your head (parallel with your ears), creating a 90 degree angle at your elbows. Inhale on the downward motion and flare your elbows out wide.
After a brief pause, exhale and press the dumbbells back along this path to their starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Seated Dumbbell Shoulder Press or Cable Shoulder Press.

name.es: Press de hombros de pie con mancuernas

en: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and adopt a shoulder width stance. Without leaning backward or putting your posture into jeopardy, press the dumbbells above your head so that you arms are fully extended, yet slightly flexed/bent at your elbows. Make sure your palms are facing forward at this point. This will be your starting position.

Slowly and in a controlled fashion, descend the dumbbells until they reach the side of your head (parallel with your ears), creating a 90 degree angle at your elbows. Inhale on the downward motion and flare your elbows out wide.
After a brief pause, exhale and press the dumbbells back along this path to their starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Seated Dumbbell Shoulder Press or Cable Shoulder Press.
es: Coge una mancuerna en cada mano y adopta una postura a la altura de los hombros. Sin inclinarse hacia atrás ni poner en peligro su postura, presione las mancuernas por encima de su cabeza para que sus brazos estén completamente extendidos, pero ligeramente flexionados/doblados a la altura de los codos. Asegúrate de que sus palmas estén mirando hacia adelante en este punto. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Lentamente y de forma controlada, desciende las mancuernas hasta llegar al costado de tu cabeza (paralelo a tus orejas), creando un ángulo de 90 grados en tus codos. Inhale con el movimiento hacia abajo y abra bien los codos.
Después de una breve pausa, exhala y empuja las mancuernas hacia atrás a lo largo de este camino hasta su posición inicial.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Press de hombros sentado con mancuernas o Press de hombros con cable.

name: Single Arm Rows
instructions: Grab two dumbbells and place them next a flat bench. With your right knee, kneel on one end of the bench with your left leg remaining straight and on the floor for support. Lean on the bench with your right hand whilst taking hold of the dumbbell with your left hand. Your torso at this point should be parallel with the floor with a neutral spine. This will be your starting position.

Keeping your upper arm close to your body, pull the dumbbell up to the side of your hip whilst maintaining a stationary torso. Exhale as you lift the dumbbell. Tip: Contract your back muscles in order to create this movement. Your arms should remain as passive as possible.
Lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position. Inhale as you perform this step.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions and then switch sides.
Variations: Seated Cable Row or Alternating Kettlebell Row.

Lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position. Inhale as you perform this step.

Variations: Seated Cable Row or Alternating Kettlebell Row.
es: Coge dos mancuernas y colócalas junto a un banco plano. Con la rodilla derecha, arrodíllate en un extremo del banco con la pierna izquierda estirada y apoyada en el suelo. Apóyate en el banco con la mano derecha mientras agarras la mancuerna con la mano izquierda. Su torso en este punto debe estar paralelo al suelo con la columna neutra. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Manteniendo la parte superior del brazo cerca del cuerpo, tire de la mancuerna hacia el costado de la cadera mientras mantiene el torso estacionario. Exhala mientras levantas la mancuerna. Consejo: Contrae los músculos de la espalda para crear este movimiento. Tus brazos deben permanecer lo más pasivos posible.
Baja la mancuerna hasta la posición inicial. Inhala mientras realizas este paso.
Repite el movimiento durante la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones y luego cambie de lado.
Variaciones: remo con cable sentado o remo alterno con pesas rusas.

name: Alternating Reverse Dumbbell Lunges
instructions: Whilst in a standing position, grab two dumbbells and keep your arms by your sides. This will be your starting position.

Take a step backwards (slightly larger than a normal step) and as you land, drop your body down so that you create two right angles at your knees. Inhale as you do so whilst maintaining a straight torso.
Make sure that you keep your front knee over your hell and not over your toes. Your front shin should now be perpendicular to the floor.
As you exhale, use mainly the heel of your front foot and push off the floor towards the starting position again.
Alternate legs as you go and repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dumbbell Walking Lunges or Alternating Barbell Lunges.

en: Whilst in a standing position, grab two dumbbells and keep your arms by your sides. This will be your starting position.

Take a step backwards (slightly larger than a normal step) and as you land, drop your body down so that you create two right angles at your knees. Inhale as you do so whilst maintaining a straight torso.
Make sure that you keep your front knee over your hell and not over your toes. Your front shin should now be perpendicular to the floor.
As you exhale, use mainly the heel of your front foot and push off the floor towards the starting position again.
Alternate legs as you go and repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dumbbell Walking Lunges or Alternating Barbell Lunges.
es: Mientras estás de pie, toma dos mancuernas y mantén los brazos a los lados. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Da un paso hacia atrás (un poco más grande que un paso normal) y, cuando aterrices, deja caer tu cuerpo hacia abajo para crear dos ángulos rectos en tus rodillas. Inhala mientras lo haces manteniendo el torso recto.
Asegúrate de mantener la rodilla delantera sobre el talón y no sobre los dedos de los pies. Tu espinilla delantera ahora debería estar perpendicular al suelo.
Mientras exhalas, utiliza principalmente el talón del pie delantero y empuja el suelo hacia la posición inicial nuevamente.
Alterne las piernas durante el movimiento y repita hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: estocadas caminando con mancuernas o estocadas alternas con barra.

name: Dumbbell Rear Delt Raise
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in your left hand and lay face down on an incline bench (around 30-45 degrees) and allow your left arm to hang perpendicular to the floor. Have your head off the end of the bench so that only your torso is supported with your right arm, placed behind your back. This will be your starting position.
Inhale and pull the back of your left hand towards the ceiling.
Once the dumbbell is horizontal to the floor, pause for a brief second, exhale and slowly return the dumbbell along the same path, back into its starting position.
Repeat until you have completed the prescribed amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variations: Rear Delt Machine Flyes or Cable Rear Delt Fly.

name.es: Elevación de deltoide posterior con mancuernas

en: Grab a dumbbell in your left hand and lay face down on an incline bench (around 30-45 degrees) and allow your left arm to hang perpendicular to the floor. Have your head off the end of the bench so that only your torso is supported with your right arm, placed behind your back. This will be your starting position.
Inhale and pull the back of your left hand towards the ceiling.
Once the dumbbell is horizontal to the floor, pause for a brief second, exhale and slowly return the dumbbell along the same path, back into its starting position.
Repeat until you have completed the prescribed amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variations: Rear Delt Machine Flyes or Cable Rear Delt Fly.
es: Coge una mancuerna en su mano izquierda y recuéstese boca abajo en un banco inclinado (alrededor de 30 a 45 grados) y permita que tu brazo izquierdo cuelgue perpendicular al suelo. Mantén la cabeza alejada del extremo del banco de modo que solo el torso quede apoyado con el brazo derecho, colocado detrás de la espalda. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Inhala y tira el dorso de tu mano izquierda hacia el techo.
Una vez que la mancuerna esté horizontal con respecto al suelo, haga una pausa por un breve segundo, exhale y lentamente regrese la mancuerna por el mismo camino, nuevamente a su posición inicial.
Repite hasta que haya completado la cantidad prescrita de repeticiones y cambie de lado.
Variaciones: Flyes con máquina de deltoides traseros o Flyes de deltoides traseros con cable.

name: Standing Dumbbell Lat Raises
instructions: Grab two dumbbells with a neutral grip and stand with a shoulder width stance. Make sure you are standing upright with a slight bend at your knees and elbows. Let your arms hang infront of you, perpendicular to the floor. This will be your starting position.
Whilst exhaling and maintaining a stationary torso, lift the dumbbells out to your side, taking them as wide as you can. Continue to lift until your arms are parallel to the floor.
Pause at the top of the movement for a split second.
As you inhale, lower the dumbbells to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variation: Seated Lateral Raises or Cable Lateral Raises.

name.es: Elevaciones laterales con mancuernas de pie

en: Grab two dumbbells with a neutral grip and stand with a shoulder width stance. Make sure you are standing upright with a slight bend at your knees and elbows. Let your arms hang infront of you, perpendicular to the floor. This will be your starting position.
Whilst exhaling and maintaining a stationary torso, lift the dumbbells out to your side, taking them as wide as you can. Continue to lift until your arms are parallel to the floor.
Pause at the top of the movement for a split second.
As you inhale, lower the dumbbells to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variation: Seated Lateral Raises or Cable Lateral Raises.
es: Agarra dos mancuernas con un agarre neutral y párese con una postura a la altura de los hombros. Asegúrate de estar de pie con una ligera flexión de rodillas y codos. Deja que tus brazos cuelguen frente a ti, perpendiculares al suelo. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Mientras exhalas y mantienes el torso inmóvil, levanta las mancuernas hacia un lado, alejándolas lo más que puedas. Continúa levantando hasta que sus brazos queden paralelos al suelo.
Haz una pausa en la parte superior del movimiento durante una fracción de segundo.
Mientras inhala, baje las mancuernas a la posición inicial.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variación: Elevaciones laterales sentado o Elevaciones laterales con cable.

name: Bent Over Tricep Kickbacks
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and adopt a shoulder width stance. Whilst maintaining a straight back, you should lean forward from your hips until your torso is almost parallel with the floor. Have your knees slightly bent and your elbows pinned in to the sides of your body. Your elbows should be at 90 degrees at this point. This is your starting position.

Whilst keeping your upper arms stationary, use your triceps to lift the dumbbells on an arcing motion behind you. Exhale as you do so and continue to lift the dumbbells until your forearms are parallel to the floor and your elbows are fully extended. Tip: Only your forearms should move.
After a brief pause, slowly lower the dumbbells along the same path back into their starting position as you inhale.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Overhead Rope Tricep Extensions or Narrow Grip Barbell Bench Press.

Have your knees slightly bent and your elbows pinned in to the sides of your body. Your elbows should be at 90 degrees at this point. This is your starting position.

Whilst keeping your upper arms stationary, use your triceps to lift the dumbbells on an arcing motion behind you. Exhale as you do so and continue to lift the dumbbells until your forearms are parallel to the floor and your elbows are fully extended. Tip: Only your forearms should move.
After a brief pause, slowly lower the dumbbells along the same path back into their starting position as you inhale.

es: Coge una mancuerna en cada mano y adopta una postura a la altura de los hombros. Mientras mantienes la espalda recta, debes inclinarte hacia adelante desde las caderas hasta que tu torso quede casi paralelo al suelo. Mantén las rodillas ligeramente dobladas y los codos pegados a los lados del cuerpo. En este punto, tus codos deben estar a 90 grados. Esta es tu posición inicial.

Mientras mantienes la parte superior de los brazos inmóviles, usa los tríceps para levantar las mancuernas con un movimiento de arco detrás de ti. Exhala mientras lo haces y continúa levantando las mancuernas hasta que tus antebrazos queden paralelos al suelo y tus codos completamente extendidos. Consejo: solo deben moverse tus antebrazos.
Después de una breve pausa, baje lentamente las mancuernas por el mismo camino hasta su posición inicial mientras inhala.
Repite el movimiento durante la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Extensiones de tríceps con cuerda sobre la cabeza o Press de banca con barra con agarre estrecho.

name: Flat Dumbbell Flyes
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and take a seat on a flat bench. Lay down and bring the weights by the side of your chest. Press the dumbbells towards the ceiling with a neutral grip (palms facing each other) until you have nearly locked out your elbows, a slight bend should be present to preserve your joints. This will be your starting position.
Maintaining this slight flex at your elbows, lower your arms in a wide arcing motion until you feel your chest stretching, inhale as you do so.
Following the same path as you went down, squeeze your pectoral muscles and bring your arms back to the starting position, remembering to exhale as you go.
Pause for a second and then repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Flat Bench Cable Flyes or Pec Deck.

en: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and take a seat on a flat bench. Lay down and bring the weights by the side of your chest. Press the dumbbells towards the ceiling with a neutral grip (palms facing each other) until you have nearly locked out your elbows, a slight bend should be present to preserve your joints. This will be your starting position.
Maintaining this slight flex at your elbows, lower your arms in a wide arcing motion until you feel your chest stretching, inhale as you do so.
Following the same path as you went down, squeeze your pectoral muscles and bring your arms back to the starting position, remembering to exhale as you go.
Pause for a second and then repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Flat Bench Cable Flyes or Pec Deck.
es: Toma una mancuerna en cada mano y siéntate en un banco plano. Acuéstate y lleva las pesas al costado de tu pecho. Empuja las mancuernas hacia el techo con un agarre neutral (las palmas una frente a la otra) hasta que casi haya bloqueado los codos; debe haber una ligera flexión para preservar las articulaciones. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Manteniendo esta ligera flexión en los codos, baje los brazos formando un amplio arco hasta que sienta que el pecho se estira, inhale mientras lo haces.
Siguiendo el mismo camino por el que bajaste, aprieta los músculos pectorales y lleva los brazos a la posición inicial, recordando exhalar durante el movimientos.
Haz una pausa por un segundo y luego repita hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Cable Flyes de banco plano o Pec Deck.

name: Dumbbell Floor Press
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and lay on your back. Have your elbows bent at a 90 degree angle, flared out wide with your forearms vertical from the floor. Your palms should be facing your lower body. This will be your starting position.
Initiate the movement by exhaling and pressing the dumbbells towards the ceiling until your elbow joint is nearly at full extension.
After a brief pause, inhale and slowly return the dumbbells along the same path, back into their starting position.
Repeat until you have completed the prescribed amount of repetitions.
Variations: Barbell Bench Press or Chest Press.

en: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and lay on your back. Have your elbows bent at a 90 degree angle, flared out wide with your forearms vertical from the floor. Your palms should be facing your lower body. This will be your starting position.
Initiate the movement by exhaling and pressing the dumbbells towards the ceiling until your elbow joint is nearly at full extension.
After a brief pause, inhale and slowly return the dumbbells along the same path, back into their starting position.
Repeat until you have completed the prescribed amount of repetitions.
Variations: Barbell Bench Press or Chest Press.
es: Toma una mancuerna en cada mano y acuéstate boca arriba. Mantén los codos doblados en un ángulo de 90 grados, ensanchados con los antebrazos verticales desde el suelo. Tus palmas deben mirar hacia la parte inferior de tu cuerpo. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Inicie el movimiento exhalando y presionando las mancuernas hacia el techo hasta que la articulación del codo esté casi en extensión completa.
Después de una breve pausa, inhala y regresa lentamente las mancuernas por el mismo camino, hasta su posición inicial.
Repite hasta que haya completado la cantidad prescrita de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Press de banca con barra o Press de pecho.

name: Dumbbell Curls
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and adopt a shoulder width stance with your arms hanging perpendicular to the floor, by your sides.This will be your starting position.
To initiate the movement, exhale and curl the dumbbells both up and outward whilst rotating your palms to face the ceiling.
Continue on an upward motion until your biceps are optimally contracted.
After this, inhale and return the dumbbells along the same path back to their starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Standing Concentration Curls or Concentration Curls.

en: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and adopt a shoulder width stance with your arms hanging perpendicular to the floor, by your sides.This will be your starting position.

es: Agarra una mancuerna en cada mano y adopta una postura a la altura de los hombros con los brazos colgando perpendiculares al suelo, a los lados. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Para iniciar el movimiento, exhale y doble las mancuernas hacia arriba y hacia afuera mientras gira las palmas de las manos hacia el techo.
Continúa con un movimiento ascendente hasta que sus bíceps estén óptimamente contraídos.
Después de esto, inhala y regresa las mancuernas por el mismo camino a su posición inicial.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Curls de concentración de pie o Curls de concentración.

name: Standing Bicep Curls
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand, in a standing position, with your arms at full length, palms facing away from you. This will be your starting position.
Whilst exhaling, contract your biceps and bring the dumbbells up to shoulder height. Hold the contraction for a second as you squeeze your biceps. Tip: Only the forearms should move.
Inhale as you lower the dumbbells toward the starting position.
Continue for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Seated Rotating Bicep Curls or Standing Barbell Curls.

en: Grab a dumbbell in each hand, in a standing position, with your arms at full length, palms facing away from you. This will be your starting position.

Whilst exhaling, contract your biceps and bring the dumbbells up to shoulder height. Mantén la contracción por un segundo mientras aprietas el bíceps. Consejo: Sólo deben moverse los antebrazos.
Inhala mientras bajas las mancuernas hacia la posición inicial.
Continúa con la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Curl de bíceps giratorio sentado o Curl de pie con barra.

name: Flat Dumbbell Chest Press
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and lay down on a bench, bringing the dumbbells beside your chest. Keep your elbows at a 90-degree angle and your forearms perpendicular to the floor. Once here, keep your palms facing away from you, exhale and press the dumbbells towards the ceiling.
Squeeze your pectoral muscles when your arms are at full extension. Once you have completed this, inhale and bring your arms back down beside your chest until your elbows are at 90-degrees once more.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: Always have a spotter with you to help you throughout the movement and to help unload the dumbbells after completion.
Variations: Neutral Grip Dumbbell Chest Press or Barbell Bench Press.

name.es: Press de pecho plano con mancuernas

en: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and lay down on a bench, bringing the dumbbells beside your chest. Keep your elbows at a 90-degree angle and your forearms perpendicular to the floor. Once here, keep your palms facing away from you, exhale and press the dumbbells towards the ceiling.
Squeeze your pectoral muscles when your arms are at full extension. Once you have completed this, inhale and bring your arms back down beside your chest until your elbows are at 90-degrees once more.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: Always have a spotter with you to help you throughout the movement and to help unload the dumbbells after completion.
Variations: Neutral Grip Dumbbell Chest Press or Barbell Bench Press.
es: Toma una mancuerna en cada mano y recuéstate en un banco, colocando las mancuernas al lado de tu pecho. Mantén los codos en un ángulo de 90 grados y los antebrazos perpendiculares al suelo. Una vez aquí, mantén las palmas de las manos alejadas de ti, exhala y presiona las mancuernas hacia el techo.

Apriete los músculos pectorales cuando los brazos estén completamente extendidos. Una vez que haya completado esto, inhale y baje los brazos al lado del pecho hasta que los codos estén a 90 grados una vez más.
Repite el movimiento durante la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Precaución: siempre tenga un observador contigo para ayudarte durante todo el movimiento y para ayudar a descargar las mancuernas una vez finalizado.
Variaciones: Press de pecho con mancuernas con agarre neutro o Press de banca con barra.

name: Decline Dumbbell Chest Press
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and secure your legs on a decline bench. Once you have done this, lay down on the decline bench bringing the dumbbells to the side of your chest at shoulders width. Have your palms facing away from you. This will be your starting position.

Whilst breathing out, press the dumbbells towards the ceiling using your pectoral muscles until your elbows are fully extended. Tip: Throughout the motion, the forearms should always be perpendicular to the floor.
Squeeze your chest at the top of the movement for a second and then descend the dumbbells back into their starting position, whilst inhaling.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: When you have completed your set, have a spotter help you with your dumbbells.
Variations: Decline Barbell Press.

name.es: Press de pecho declinado con mancuernas

en: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and secure your legs on a decline bench. Once you have done this, lay down on the decline bench bringing the dumbbells to the side of your chest at shoulders width. Have your palms facing away from you. This will be your starting position.

Whilst breathing out, press the dumbbells towards the ceiling using your pectoral muscles until your elbows are fully extended. Tip: Throughout the motion, the forearms should always be perpendicular to the floor.
Squeeze your chest at the top of the movement for a second and then descend the dumbbells back into their starting position, whilst inhaling.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: When you have completed your set, have a spotter help you with your dumbbells.
Variations: Decline Barbell Press.
es: Toma una mancuerna en cada mano y asegura tus piernas en un banco declinado. Una vez que hayas hecho esto, túmbate en el banco de descenso llevando las mancuernas al costado de tu pecho a la altura de los hombros. Mantén las palmas de las manos alejadas de ti. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Mientras exhala, presione las mancuernas hacia el techo usando los músculos pectorales hasta que los codos estén completamente extendidos. Consejo: Durante todo el movimiento, los antebrazos siempre deben estar perpendiculares al suelo.
Aprieta el pecho en la parte superior del movimiento durante un segundo y luego baja las mancuernas a su posición inicial, mientras inhalas.
Repite el movimiento durante la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Precaución: cuando haya completado su serie, pide a un observador que lo ayude con sus mancuernas.
Variaciones: Press declinado con barra.

name: Cross Body Hammer Curl
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and adopt a standing position with your elbows turned outwards and palms facing your thighs. This will be your starting position.

Whilst maintaining a stationary upper arm, bend at your right elbow to bring the dumbbell up and across your body towards your left shoulder. Exhale as you do so and contract your bicep to create the movement.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the dumbbell to the starting position along the same path.
Repeat the movement with your left side.
Continue alternating for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Alternate Hammer Curls or Cable Curls.

en: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and adopt a standing position with your elbows turned outwards and palms facing your thighs. This will be your starting position.

Whilst maintaining a stationary upper arm, bend at your right elbow to bring the dumbbell up and across your body towards your left shoulder. Exhale as you do so and contract your bicep to create the movement.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the dumbbell to the starting position along the same path.
Repeat the movement with your left side.
Continue alternating for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Alternate Hammer Curls or Cable Curls.
es: Coge una mancuerna en cada mano y adopta una posición de pie con los codos hacia afuera y las palmas hacia los muslos. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Mientras mantiene la parte superior del brazo inmóvil, doble el codo derecho para llevar la mancuerna hacia arriba y a través de tu cuerpo hacia el hombro izquierdo. Exhala mientras lo haces y contrae el bíceps para crear el movimiento.
Después de una breve pausa, inhala y regresa la mancuerna a la posición inicial por el mismo camino.
Repite el movimiento con tu lado izquierdo.
Continúa alternando durante la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: rizos en martillo alternativos o rizos con cable.

name: Dumbbell Concentration Curls
instructions: Stand on the reverse side of an incline bench as if you were spotting someone. Grab a dumbbell in one hand and rest your elbow on the headrest of the bench. Have a ‘palms up’ grip and position yourself so that your arm is running down the length of the bench. Position your non-lifting hand on the incline bench for stability. Your chest should be pressed up against the top part of the incline bench and you should adopt a wide stance with your feet. This will be your starting position.

While holding the upper arm stationary, contract the bicep and curl the dumbbell upward as you exhale. Only your forearm should move. Continue the movement until your bicep is fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level. Hold this position for a second and as you inhale, slowly reverse the movement until you are in the starting position once again.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variation: Low Cable Bicep Curl.

en: Stand on the reverse side of an incline bench as if you were spotting someone. Grab a dumbbell in one hand and rest your elbow on the headrest of the bench. Have a ‘palms up’ grip and position yourself so that your arm is running down the length of the bench. Position your non-lifting hand on the incline bench for stability. Your chest should be pressed up against the top part of the incline bench and you should adopt a wide stance with your feet. This will be your starting position.

While holding the upper arm stationary, contract the bicep and curl the dumbbell upward as you exhale. Only your forearm should move. Continue the movement until your bicep is fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level. Hold this position for a second and as you inhale, slowly reverse the movement until you are in the starting position once again.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variation: Low Cable Bicep Curl.
es: Párate en el reverso de un banco inclinado como si estuvieras viendo a alguien. Coge una mancuerna con una mano y apoya el codo en el reposacabezas del banco. Agarra las palmas hacia arriba y colóquese de modo que tu brazo corra a lo largo del banco. Coloca la mano que no levanta sobre el banco inclinado para mayor estabilidad. Tu pecho debe estar presionado contra la parte superior del banco inclinado y debes adoptar una postura amplia con los pies. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Mientras mantiene inmóvil la parte superior del brazo, contraiga el bíceps y doble la mancuerna hacia arriba mientras exhala. Sólo tu antebrazo debe moverse. Continúa el movimiento hasta que tu bíceps esté completamente contraído y la mancuerna esté al nivel de los hombros. Mantén esta posición por un segundo y mientras inhalas, invierte lentamente el movimiento hasta estar nuevamente en la posición inicial.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variación: Curl de bíceps con cable bajo.

name: Neutral Grip Dumbbell Chest Press
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and lay on a flat bench. Have your hands by the side of your chest with a neutral grip. This will be your starting position.
Ensuring that your elbows remain as close to your body whilst remaining parallel to each other throughout the movement, press both dumbbells towards the ceiling in a controlled manner.
Squeeze your triceps at the top of the contraction for a second before reversing the movement back into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variation: Narrow Grip Barbell Bench Press.

name.es: Press de pecho con mancuernas, agarre neutro

en: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and lay on a flat bench. Have your hands by the side of your chest with a neutral grip. This will be your starting position.
Ensuring that your elbows remain as close to your body whilst remaining parallel to each other throughout the movement, press both dumbbells towards the ceiling in a controlled manner.
Squeeze your triceps at the top of the contraction for a second before reversing the movement back into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variation: Narrow Grip Barbell Bench Press.
es: Toma una mancuerna en cada mano y recuéstate en un banco plano. Mantén sus manos a los lados de tu pecho con un agarre neutral. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Asegurándose de que sus codos permanezcan lo más cerca de tu cuerpo y paralelos entre sí durante todo el movimiento, presione ambas mancuernas hacia el techo de manera controlada.
Aprieta el tríceps en la parte superior de la contracción durante un segundo antes de invertir el movimiento y volver a la posición inicial.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variación: Press de banca con barra con agarre estrecho.

name: Chest-supported Row
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and lay face down on an incline bench (around 30-45 degrees) and allow your arms to hang perpendicular to the floor. Have your head off the end of the bench so that only your torso is supported. This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and pull the dumbbells up to the side of your hips whilst keeping your torso in contact with the bench. Keep your upper arms close to your body as you go to activate your lats as much as possible. Tip: Contract your back muscles in order to create this movement. Your arms should remain as passive as possible.
Lower the dumbbells back to the starting position, inhaling as you go.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions and then switch sides.
Variations: One Arm Dumbbell Row or Seated One-Arm Cable Pulley Row.

en: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and lay face down on an incline bench (around 30-45 degrees) and allow your arms to hang perpendicular to the floor. Have your head off the end of the bench so that only your torso is supported. This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and pull the dumbbells up to the side of your hips whilst keeping your torso in contact with the bench. Keep your upper arms close to your body as you go to activate your lats as much as possible. Tip: Contract your back muscles in order to create this movement. Your arms should remain as passive as possible.
Lower the dumbbells back to the starting position, inhaling as you go.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions and then switch sides.
Variations: One Arm Dumbbell Row or Seated One-Arm Cable Pulley Row.
es: Coge una mancuerna en cada mano y recuéstese boca abajo en un banco inclinado (alrededor de 30 a 45 grados) y permita que sus brazos cuelguen perpendiculares al suelo. Mantén la cabeza alejada del extremo del banco para que solo se apoye su torso. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, exhala y tira de las mancuernas hacia el costado de las caderas mientras mantienes el torso en contacto con el banco. Mantén la parte superior de sus brazos cerca de tu cuerpo durante el movimiento para activar sus dorsales tanto como sea posible. Consejo: Contrae los músculos de la espalda para crear este movimiento. Tus brazos deben permanecer lo más pasivos posible.
Baja las mancuernas a la posición inicial, inhalando durante el movimiento.
Repite el movimiento durante la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones y luego cambie de lado.
Variaciones: remo con mancuernas a un brazo o remo en polea con cable a un brazo sentado.

name: Chest Supported Dumbbell Rows
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and lean into an incline bench, making sure your head is off the end.
Using a neutral grip, allow your arms to hang perpendicular to the floor. This will be your starting position.
Pull your shoulder blades together and bend at your elbows in order to row the dumbbells to your side. Try to keep your elbows as close to your body as possible throughout the movement.
Pause at the contracted position, and return to the starting position in a controlled manner.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

name.es: Remo con mancuernas y apoyo de pecho

en: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and lean into an incline bench, making sure your head is off the end.

Pause at the contracted position, and return to the starting position in a controlled manner.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

Usando un agarre neutral, permita que sus brazos cuelguen perpendiculares al suelo. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Junte los omóplatos y doble los codos para remar las mancuernas hacia un lado. Intenta mantener los codos lo más cerca posible del cuerpo durante todo el movimiento.
Hacer una pausa en la posición contraída y volver a la posición inicial de forma controlada.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.

name: Dumbbell Bent Over Rows Neutral Grip
instructions: With a dumbbell in each hand (palms facing each other), bend your knees slightly and bring your torso forward by bending at your hips; as you bend make sure to keep your back straight until it is almost parallel to the floor. Tip: Make sure that you keep your spine in a neutral position. The weights should hang directly in front of you as your arms are perpendicular to the floor and your torso. This is your starting position.

While keeping the torso stationary, lift the dumbbells to your side (as you exhale), elevating elbows towards the ceiling (do not exert any force with the forearm other than holding the weights). At the top contracted position, squeeze the back muscles and hold for a second.
Slowly lower the weight to the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution:
This exercise is not recommended for people with back issues. A Low Cable Row is a better choice for people with back pain.
Ensure perfect form and never round the back as this can cause injury.
Be cautious with the weights you are using. If you are in doubt, use a lesser weight.
Variations: Low Cable Row or a Bent Over Barbell Row

name.en: Dumbbell Bent Over Rows Neutral Grip
name.es: Remo inclinado con mancuernas, agarre neutro

en: With a dumbbell in each hand (palms facing each other), bend your knees slightly and bring your torso forward by bending at your hips; as you bend make sure to keep your back straight until it is almost parallel to the floor. Tip: Make sure that you keep your spine in a neutral position. The weights should hang directly in front of you as your arms are perpendicular to the floor and your torso. This is your starting position.

While keeping the torso stationary, lift the dumbbells to your side (as you exhale), elevating elbows towards the ceiling (do not exert any force with the forearm other than holding the weights). At the top contracted position, squeeze the back muscles and hold for a second.
Slowly lower the weight to the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution:
This exercise is not recommended for people with back issues. A Low Cable Row is a better choice for people with back pain.
Ensure perfect form and never round the back as this can cause injury.
Be cautious with the weights you are using. If you are in doubt, use a lesser weight.
Variations: Low Cable Row or a Bent Over Barbell Row
es: Con una mancuerna en cada mano (con las palmas una frente a la otra), doble ligeramente las rodillas y lleve el torso hacia adelante doblando las caderas; Mientras te inclinas, asegúrate de mantener la espalda recta hasta que quede casi paralela al suelo. Consejo: asegúrate de mantener la columna en una posición neutral. Las pesas deben colgar directamente frente a ti, ya que sus brazos están perpendiculares al suelo y al torso. Esta es tu posición inicial.

Manteniendo el torso inmóvil, levanta las mancuernas hacia un lado (mientras exhalas), elevando los codos hacia el techo (no ejerzas ninguna fuerza con el antebrazo que no sea sujetar las pesas). En la posición más contraída, aprieta los músculos de la espalda y mantén la posición durante un segundo.
Baja lentamente el peso hasta la posición inicial mientras inhala.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Precaución:
Este ejercicio no se recomienda para personas con problemas de espalda. Un Low Cable Row es una mejor opción para las personas con dolor de espalda.
Asegúrate de que la forma sea perfecta y nunca redondee la espalda, ya que esto puede causar lesiones.
Tenga cuidado con las pesas que está utilizando. Si tienes dudas, utiliza un peso menor.
Variaciones: remo bajo con cable o remo inclinado con barra

name: Dumbbell Bent Over Rows
instructions: Grab your dumbbells and place them on the floor in front of you. Take hold of them whilst bending at your knees and waist (more so at your waist, maintaining a straight back. Your arms should be hanging perpendicular to the floor at this point. This is your starting position.
Exhale and squeeze the muscles in your back to bring the dumbbells towards your torso. Bend at the elbow to allow the movement but try not to take any weight through your forearms/ biceps.

Once the dumbbells are close to where your pocket usually are or when the muscles in your back are at tight as they can be, inhale and return the dumbbells along the same path back into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: This exercise may not be suitable for people that suffer from any back pain/injuries.
Variations: Bent Over Row (Reverse Grip) or Seated Cable Rows.

en: Grab your dumbbells and place them on the floor in front of you. Take hold of them whilst bending at your knees and waist (more so at your waist, maintaining a straight back. Your arms should be hanging perpendicular to the floor at this point. This is your starting position.
Exhale and squeeze the muscles in your back to bring the dumbbells towards your torso. Bend at the elbow to allow the movement but try not to take any weight through your forearms/ biceps.

Once the dumbbells are close to where your pocket usually are or when the muscles in your back are at tight as they can be, inhale and return the dumbbells along the same path back into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: This exercise may not be suitable for people that suffer from any back pain/injuries.
Variations: Bent Over Row (Reverse Grip) or Seated Cable Rows.
es: Toma tus mancuernas y colócalas en el suelo frente a ti. Sujételos mientras dobla las rodillas y la cintura (más aún la cintura, manteniendo la espalda recta. En este punto, los brazos deben colgar perpendiculares al suelo. Esta es su posición inicial.
Exhala y aprieta los músculos de tu espalda para llevar las mancuernas hacia tu torso. Doble el codo para permitir el movimiento, pero trate de no pasar ningún peso por los antebrazos o bíceps.

Una vez que las mancuernas estén cerca de donde normalmente están sus bolsillos o cuando los músculos de su espalda estén lo más tensos posible, inhale y regrese las mancuernas por el mismo camino a la posición inicial.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Precaución: Este ejercicio puede no ser adecuado para personas que sufren algún dolor o lesión en la espalda.
Variaciones: remo inclinado (agarre inverso) o remo con cable sentado.

name: Around The Worlds
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and lay on an incline bench (around 30-45 degrees). Start with your palms facing the ceiling arms at full extension (slight bend at your elbows) next to your thighs. This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, inhale and draw a semi circle from your thighs to above your head whilst keeping your arms extended and stretching the pectoral muscle as you go. Tip: Feel as though you are sweeping the floor with your elbows!
After a brief pause, exhale and return the dumbbells along the same path back to their starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Incline Dumbbell Flyes - With A Twist or Pec Deck.

en: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and lay on an incline bench (around 30-45 degrees). Start with your palms facing the ceiling arms at full extension (slight bend at your elbows) next to your thighs. This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, inhale and draw a semi circle from your thighs to above your head whilst keeping your arms extended and stretching the pectoral muscle as you go. Tip: Feel as though you are sweeping the floor with your elbows!
After a brief pause, exhale and return the dumbbells along the same path back to their starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Incline Dumbbell Flyes - With A Twist or Pec Deck.
es: Coge una mancuerna en cada mano y recuéstese en un banco inclinado (alrededor de 30 a 45 grados). Empieza con las palmas mirando hacia el techo y los brazos en extensión completa (ligeramente doblados los codos) al lado de los muslos. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, inhala y dibuja un semicírculo desde tus muslos hasta encima de tu cabeza mientras mantienes los brazos extendidos y estiras el músculo pectoral durante el movimientos. Consejo: ¡Siente como si estuvieras barriendo el suelo con los codos!
Después de una breve pausa, exhala y regresa las mancuernas por el mismo camino a su posición inicial.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: aperturas inclinadas con mancuernas: con giro o plataforma Pec.
